18.title: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Notice
18.content: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Notice URL: https://delivr.com/page/710/california-consumer-privacy-act-ccpa-notice Title: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Notice URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/710/california-consumer-privacy-act-ccpa-notice Markdown Content: On January 1, 2020, the California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018 (CCPA) took effect. Building on the privacy foundation established through our GDPR compliance efforts, Delivr is committed to ensuring that our services comply with CCPA. The California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) does not apply to Delivr. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How does CCPA apply to the relationship between Delivr and its customers? ------------------------------------------------------------------------- If you are using Delivr services as a customer, there is an agreement between you and Delivr that describes the services that Delivr provides to you. This agreement may include order forms, exhibits, or addenda, and serves as your instruction to Delivr to process personal data as part of Delivr ’s performance of our services. For the purposes of CCPA, the data that Delivr collects on behalf of its customers may include Personal Information. In this context, if you are subject to CCPA, you are a Business and Delivr is your Service Provider. Your sharing of Personal Information related to your end users with Delivr, and Delivr’s collection of Personal Information related to your end users, are done to facilitate Delivr ’s performance of its services that you contracted for. Delivr Will Never Sell Personal Information ------------------------------------------- Delivr Does Not Sell Personal Information of you or your end users as defined under CCPA, or under any other circumstances. Pursuant to the terms of your agreement with Delivr , you pay fees or other valuable consideration only in return for the services that Delivr performs on your behalf. Delivr does not receive from you, and you do not pay Delivr, any monetary or other valuable consideration for making Personal Information available to Delivr. What is the CCPA? ----------------- The California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) is a bill meant to enhance privacy rights and consumer protection for residents of California, United States. Targeted at companies that collect and/or sell personal information, it is designed to give Californians more control over their own data. CCPA AB 37) gives California consumers the right to request all the data a company has collected on them over the previous 12 months, as well as a full list of all the third parties that data is shared with. What entities are subject to the CCPA? -------------------------------------- The CCPA applies to any for-profit entity that does business in California, collects personal information about California consumers and meets at least one of the following threshold criteria: Earns annual gross revenue above $25 million, Annually buys, sells or, for commercial purposes, receives or shares personal information of at least 50,000 California consumers, households or devices, or Derives at least 50% of its annual revenue from selling California consumers’ personal information. Companies don't have to be based in California or have a physical presence there to fall under the law. They don't even have to be based in the United States. Who has rights under the CCPA? ------------------------------ The CCPA applies to “consumers,” which is broadly defined as any natural person who is a California resident. The California law takes a broader approach to what constitutes sensitive data than the GDPR. Under CCPA, “personal information” means any “information that identifies, relates to, describes, is capable of being associated with, or could reasonably be linked, directly or indirectly, with a particular consumer or household.” Here’s what AB 375 considers “personal information”: Identifiers such as a real name, alias, postal address, unique personal identifier, online identifier IP address, email address, account name, Social Security number, driver’s license number, passport number, or other similar identifiers Characteristics of protected classifications under California or federal law Commercial information including records of personal property, products or services purchased, obtained or considered, or other purchasing or consuming histories or tendencies Biometric information Internet or other electronic network activity information including, but not limited to, browsing history, search history and information regarding a consumer’s interaction with a website, application or advertisement Geolocation data Audio, electronic, visual, thermal, olfactory or similar information Professional or employment-related information Education information, defined as information that is not publicly available personally identifiable information (PII) as defined in the Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (20 U.S.C. section 1232g, 34 C.F.R. Part 99) Inferences drawn from any of the information identified in this subdivision to create a profile about a consumer reflecting the consumer’s preferences, characteristics, psychological trends, preferences, predispositions, behavior, attitudes, intelligence, abilities and aptitudes An amendment, AB 874, currently awaiting the governor's signature would exempt publicly available, deidentified and aggregate consumer information from being classified as PII. Publicly available information is defined as data available and maintained from government records. What rights does CCPA provide? ------------------------------ The CCPA expands upon rights afforded under existing California legislation—including the California Online Privacy Protection Act, the Privacy Rights for California Minors in the Digital World Act (often referred to as SB 568) and the Shine the Light law—and creates some new rights for California consumers. These rights generally fall into the following categories: Transparency. Several provisions of the CCPA address consumers’ rights to know about a company’s data collection practices, such as the categories of personal information collected, the sources from which personal information is collected, the business or commercial purpose of such collection and categories of third parties with whom personal information is shared. Additionally, consumers have a right to know whether and to whom their personal information was sold or disclosed for a business purpose. Some of this information must be provided through notices, such as in privacy policy disclosures, whereas other disclosures must be made in response to verifiable consumer requests. Access. Consumers have a right to access information about the personal information a business collects about them, including a right to the specific pieces of personal information collected. Upon receipt of a verifiable consumer request, a company must provide the requesting consumer with access to the specific pieces of information collected about that consumer over the prior 12 months, sometimes in a portable format. Choices Related to Sale of Personal Information. In addition to requiring businesses to make disclosures about the sale of personal information, the CCPA gives consumers more control over this business activity. Like other aspects of the law, “sale” is defined broadly to include “renting, releasing, disclosing or otherwise communicating a consumer’s personal information to a third party for monetary or other valuable consideration.” Some data sharing is exempt from the definition of sale, including certain information sharing with service providers. Generally, businesses that sell personal information to other businesses or third parties must permit consumers to opt-out of such sales. Note, however, that explicit opt-in consent to the sale of personal information is required if such information relates to consumers under the age of 16. Finally, companies that sell personal information must also include a clear link on their websites’ homepage (or platform or download page for mobile apps) and in their privacy policies labeled “Do Not Sell My Personal Information” that enables consumers to exercise their opt-out rights. Deletion. Consumers have the right to request deletion of their personal information. Upon receipt of a verifiable request, a company must delete personal information held about a consumer unless an exception applies, such as the need to retain the information to complete a transaction, comply with a legal obligation, exercise free speech or enable internal uses that are aligned with consumer expectations, among others. Non-Discrimination. Consumers also enjoy a general right to equal service and price, meaning that companies generally cannot discriminate against those who have exercised their privacy rights, subject to some exceptions. The law specifically prohibits denying good or services, charging different prices, or providing different levels or quality of products or services to consumers who exercise their rights under the law, although certain exceptions may apply. At the same time, the CCPA also permits businesses to offer financial incentives in exchange for the collection or sale of personal information.

19.content: California Online Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) Notice URL: https://delivr.com/page/709/california-online-privacy-protection-act-caloppa-notice Title: California Online Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) Notice URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/709/california-online-privacy-protection-act-caloppa-notice Markdown Content: California Online Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) Notice Delivr skip to main content +1.631.750.2785 Contact Support Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting About Delivr About Delivr The Story of Delivr Image 1: Delivr Plans & Pricing Customers Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Register Sign In Image 2: Delivr Our QR codes and short URLs are cookie-free. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Legal>CalOPPA Notice California Online Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) Notice At Delivr, we aim to help our customers meet both the letter and the spirit of the California Online Privacy Protection Act straightforwardly. CalOPPA is not just a regulation; respecting the privacy rights of all customers and their users (regardless of origin) is the right thing to do. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ California Online Privacy Protection Act Notice ----------------------------------------------- A Do Not Track (DNT) standard has not been adopted to this day, and therefore Delivr doesn't use DNT signals. Except as described in our Privacy Notice, Delivr doesn't authorize the collection of Personal Identifiable Information (PII) from our visitors or service subscribers on Delivr for third party use through advertising technologies without separate consent. Learn more about Do Not Track (DNT) and Delivr's DNT practices. --------------------------------------------------------------- On September 27, 2013, California Governor Jerry Brown signed into law A.B. 370, amending the California Online Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) to require website operators like LinkedIn to disclose how LinkedIn responds to DNT Signals; and whether third parties collect personally identifiable information (PII) about users when they visit LinkedIn. Do Not Track (DNT) ------------------ What is DNT? DNT is the concept that has been promoted by regulatory authorities, in particular the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC), for the Internet industry to develop and implement a mechanism for allowing internet users to control the tracking of their online activities across websites. What is a DNT signal? Currently, various browsers (including Internet Explorer, Firefox, and Safari) offer a DNT option that relies on a technology known as a DNT header that sends a signal to websites visited by the browser user about the user's DNT preference. You can usually access your browser's DNT option in your browser's preferences. Is there a DNT technology standard? The World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) has been working with industry groups, Internet browsers, technology companies, and regulators to develop a DNT technology standard. While some progress has been made on this issue, it has been slow, and to date no standard has been adopted. Without an industry standard for DNT, users cannot know how any given company abides by a DNT signal they receive from browser headers. Delivr is committed to remaining apprised of the W3C efforts to develop a DNT standard. How does Delivr respond to the signal? Delivr takes privacy and security very seriously and strives to put our visitors and service subscribers first in all aspects of our business. With regard to DNT, Delivr currently doesn't respond to DNT signals in browsers because no DNT standard has been adopted, as noted above. Does Delivr share members' personally identifiable information with third parties (like advertisers and ad networks)? Third parties can find out about you from info you share on our services - like the Profile landing pages which are public. In the DNT context, however, Delivr doesn't authorize the identification of Delivr visitors or service subscribers by third parties through advertising technologies deployed in ads that may appear on Delivr without separate consent. Please note, that our Privacy Policy uses the definition of "direct marketing" provided by the California Civil Code §1798.83, to include marketing directly to individuals by means of mail, phone, or e-mail for personal purposes. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Can I create more than one QR code with the same destination URL? Delivr Can I create more than one QR code with the same destination URL? Can I create more than one QR code with the same destination URL? Yes. A typical case is when QR codes are published in different media and you want to track the scans from each separately, as well the scans of all in aggregate. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ The following example illustrates how to do this: QR code 1 has a destination URL of https://example.com and is published in a magazine. QR code 2 also has a destination URL of https://example.com and is published in a direct mail sent to your clients. QR code 3 also has a destination URL of https://example.com and is published in a poster in a physical location, such as a store. Individual reports for each QR code would represent reports for scans from magazines, direct mail and posters. If all three QR codes are placed in a Group, the report on the Group level would show aggregate results for all three codes. 26.title: Can I get precise location information?
26.content: Can I get precise location information? URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1517/can-i-get-precise-location-information Title: Can I get precise location information? URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1517/can-i-get-precise-location-information Markdown Content: Can I get precise location information? Delivr skip to main content +1.631.750.2785 Contact Support Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting About Delivr About Delivr The Story of Delivr Image 1: Delivr Plans & Pricing Customers Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Register Sign In Image 2: Delivr Our QR codes and short URLs are cookie-free. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Can I get precise location information? Delivr Can I get precise location information? Can I get precise location information? Yes, if you select to prompt users for their Device GPS Location and users provide permission to allow to send this information to Delivr. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Precision of the location data varies. If the user’s device (smartphone or another device) supports GPS and is able to report this to delivr.com — which also means that the geolocation using GPS is enabled for a given code on the Delivr user’s account and that the user of the device used to scan the code agreed to allow the location information to be sent to delivr.com — the location information can be rather precise, often within the error margin smaller than one meter (three feet). However, the error margin could be higher. This is why delivr.com reports feature a circle around each location that illustrates possible actual location based on the margin of error. The smaller the circle, the more precise the location information is. If the geolocation using GPS is not enabled, the location is less precise as it is based on the known location of the IP address of the device. The IP address of the device is typically associated with the network that the device is connected to, and such associated location may sometimes be miles away from the actual location of the device at the time. Data Policy Home>Documentation>What are the commercial use guidelines for the various plans you offer? Delivr What are the commercial use guidelines for the various plans you offer? What are the commercial use guidelines for the various plans you offer? Usage Guidelines. ----------------- Delivr TRIAL is offered for personal, non-profit or educational use. Delivr TRIAL can not be resold or provided as part of a commercial offering or service. In addition, creating more then one account to avoid upgrading is not permitted. If you are creating a Delivr account as part of a commercial service offered to others e.g., using Delivr to provide campaign management, landing pages, tracking or reports to a client, please select the appropriate paid plan. Delivr PLUS and Delivr PRIME are offered for limited commercial use by individuals, consultants. micro-entities and small companies in social, mobile, and Web-based media campaigns, limited run posters, event marketing and state/province-level direct mail, email and print advertising campaigns. Delivr VIP is offered for commercial use by medium-sized, printing, direct mail, event and marketing companies in social, mobile, and Web-based media campaigns, posters, event marketing, indoor and outdoor signage including billboards, product placement and national-level direct mail, email and print advertising campaigns. Delivr PRO is offered for national-level, heavy commercial and enterprise use by brands, retailers, businesses, media companies and ad agencies in social, mobile, web, direct mail, email, event marketing, posters, signage, product placement, radio, television and print advertising campaigns. Delivr ENTERPRISE is offered for unlimited worldwide, heavy commercial and enterprise use by for brands and businesses that require a Software as a Service (SaaS) Agreement, API, Additional Account Users, Premium Support and Professional Services. Note: Delivr uses the following breakdown regarding company size. Micro-entities are companies with up to 10 employees, Small companies employ up to 50 people, Medium-sized companies have up to 250 employees, Enterprise-sized companies have 250 employees or more. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Can you explain what a GTIN Digital Link is? Delivr Can you explain what a GTIN Digital Link is? Can you explain what a GTIN Digital Link is? GS1 Digital Link refers to the technical schema linking product barcodes to the internet. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- The specific barcodes that link to a product's web page are GTIN Digital Links. Each product has its unique GTIN Digital Link, which serves as both a point-of-sale barcode and a means for consumers to access the product's web page. Companies can utilize online applications and tools, such as GTIN.cloud, to manage the GTIN Digital Links for their products. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Choosing and upgrading to a subscription plan. Delivr Choosing and upgrading to a subscription plan. Choosing and upgrading to a subscription plan. Start with a 90-day free trial to explore Delivr with limited features—no credit card or commitment required. When your trial ends, simply choose a subscription plan that matches your needs—based on usage, features, and campaign goals. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- What plan do I start with? All new users can choose to begin with a 90-day free trial . The trial gives you limited functionality. No credit card is required during the trial period. Steps to upgrade your plan. You can upgrade at any time during or after your free trial: ➀ Sign in to your Delivr Account ---------------------------------- ➁ Access the Upgrade Screen ----------------------------- Click the green UPGRADE button on your Dashboard. ➂ Select Plan --------------- Review available subscription options and select the one that fits your needs. ➃ Enter Your Payment Details ------------------------------ Enter your payment details and confirm the upgrade. Your new plan features will be available immediately after the upgrade. Will I be charged when I upgrade? ------------------------------------- Yes. Once you choose to upgrade, you’ll be billed based on your selected plan. If you upgrade before your trial ends, the new subscription will begin right away and override the trial. Can I switch plans later? ----------------------------- Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade between paid subscription plans at any time from your Subscription settings. Changes will take effect immediately. What if I exceed the limits of my current plan? --------------------------------------------------- If your campaign usage approaches the limits of your current plan (e.g., number of Campaigns) you'll see this status on your Dashboard. Where can I compare the available plans? -------------------------------------------- You can view a full feature comparison on our Pricing Page, including: Monthly limits Available features Support tiers Need help choosing a plan? If you’re unsure which plan is right for your team or campaign, contact our support team. We’re happy to help you assess your needs and find the best fit. Data Policy Home>Applications by Industry>QR Codes for Point-of-Sale Displays QR Codes for Point-of-Sale Displays. QR codes on store displays enrich the consumer shopping experience while boosting sales. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- The value of QR codes on displays. ---------------------------------- Effective use of QR codes on point-of-sale (POS) or point-of-purchase (POP) displays includes providing helpful information to customers at the moment of purchase. As well as benefiting from increased sales, you can also use these codes to encourage shoppers to provide their contact details in exchange for offers and discounts. Suggestions on where QR codes can be used on your displays. ----------------------------------------------------------- 1. QR codes in display windows. The use of codes in your window display totally transforms the concept of “window shopping”. They give customers instant access to product information ranging from reviews and styling advice to finding out about related products. QR codes are "always open" extending the shopping day after your store is closed, consumers can simply scan and buy. 2. QR codes on point of sale displays. Point-of-sale and checkout displays have always been used to promote impulse purchases. When QR codes are added to your point-of-sale displays, they can also serve as a tool for showcasing your store's special offers and new product arrivals. Alongside the QR code, a clear call to action should be displayed, indicating whether scanning the code leads to product information, free samples, discounts, or a sweepstakes entry.. 3. QR codes on floor standups. The placement of floor standups featuring QR codes can highlight your seasonal promotions and special offers. For example, scanning a QR code can give images of a selected item such as a dress that has been styled and accessorized in different ways. Such creative floor standups are a proven method to drive further purchases. 4. QR codes on pop up displays. Pop up displays with QR codes can increase consumer interaction with your brand by linking a product to digital promotional campaigns. Shoppers can see the product, whether it's clothing, homeware or food, being styled or used in creative ways. This instantly alerts them to the product's potential while suggesting related products they might wish to purchase. 5. QR codes on LED displays. Large LED display screens in your store, a shopping mall or public arena are a great way of advertising your product. As the QR code has now become part of a moving image you will need to ensure the LCD or LED screen is of the highest quality possible with an optimal refresh rate and minimal light distortion, both factors that can affect code scanning. 6. QR codes on trade show displays. Using QR codes on trade show displays immediately increases the size, scope, and potential value of your exhibition space by extending it to your visitors' smartphones. Whether they are linking to a sweepstakes entry, offering discounts, or simply providing a way to connect with clients in the future, QR codes help convert interest into sales. Successfully designing QR codes for displays. --------------------------------------------- QR codes on displays need to be clearly visible from a distance, featuring bold and readable fonts that stand out from their surroundings. Provide the necessary information with small chunks of text and position the QR codes where they can be easily accessed by smartphones. Customize colors and fonts to match your brand while providing a clear contrast between foreground and background. When designing QR codes for LCD or LED display stands the design of the border and ensuring enough color contrast between the Code's design and the background become even more important. The right design is a guaranteed way of generating more sales for your product. Once your code is designed, check its functionality across a range of mobile devices before committing to a print run. For more advice, visit our website and read how to get creative with QR code design. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Common uses of QR codes. Delivr Common uses of QR codes. Common uses of QR codes. QR codes have evolved far beyond simple links. They are now widely used across industries to enhance convenience, connectivity, and engagement: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Marketing and Advertising. QR codes give instant access to product details, promotions, or exclusive content, making campaigns more interactive and measurable. Retail and E-commerce. Shoppers can quickly access product information, read reviews, or complete purchases in-store, streamlining the buying process. Payment Solutions. Integrated into mobile payment systems, QR codes allow for secure, quick transactions on smartphones. Healthcare. Used on medical records and prescriptions, QR codes improve the accuracy and accessibility of information for both patients and healthcare professionals. Education . QR codes provide students with additional learning materials, quizzes, and interactive content, making education more engaging. As QR codes continue to evolve, they open new opportunities for convenience, connectivity, and seamless interaction in everyday life. 35.title: We are Delivr.
35.content: We are Delivr. URL: https://delivr.com/page/562/company-overview-hello-we-are-delivr Title: Company Overview. Hello. We are Delivr. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/562/company-overview-hello-we-are-delivr Markdown Content: DELIVR Infrastructure for the Connected World. --------------------------------------- Physical. Digital. Spatial. --------------------------- We’re Delivr — a human-centered software and services company helping brands connect people from the world around them to digital and spatial experiences. Our trigger-agnostic, privacy-first platform makes it simple to engage with media, products, objects, and places. Powered by our Engagement Suite — including the QR Code Generator, Super Simple Serialization℠, GS1 Digital Link, and Intelligent Link Routing℠ — Delivr assembles experiences to spark deeper emotional connections between brands and their audiences. We don’t just follow trends; we set them. Delivr launched in 2008 and was among the first to offer dynamic QR codes. Today, we continue to set the standard for modern, reliable QR infrastructure. Wonderful things start here. ---------------------------- The world is weaving itself into something new — Image 1threads of the physical and digital intertwining until the seams disappear and technology becomes invisible — a quiet current beneath something far more human, making space for wonder. We build the tools behind the curtain to power privacy-first One World experiences — where human connection comes first, and people are seen as stories, not just conversions. Moments, not metrics. Meaning, not noise. NEXT A Founder's Letter ------------------ Read more about the values that guide Delivr. They define how we approach the future, design experiences, and choose what to protect. A statement of intent for the One World we are building. Explore Our Values The Story of Delivr ------------------- How wonderful things started — and keep unfolding. This story begins the way many great ones do — with a kingdom to challenge, dragons to slay, and a quest ahead of its time. Enter the Story THE DELIVR DIFFERENCE 7 reasons to choose Delivr. --------------------------- EXCELLENCE Setting the standard for dynamic QR code generators. Industry-leading dynamic QR code technology with advanced analytics and ISO compliance. Over 15-years ago, we established the most comprehensive and reliable dynamic QR code generator, generating and managing ISO-compliant codes. Today, thousands of businesses rely on Delivr to intelligently route, track, and visualize consumer engagement across print and broadcast media, and packaging. Our industry-leading analytics go beyond scan counts, capturing location, device type, trends, and real-time performance to empower you with actionable insights for smarter campaign decisions. View our Plans & Pricing. PERFORMANCE First impressions matter; performance leads the way. Blazing-fast redirects and landing pages that maximize scans and conversions. Webpages reached through short URLs or dynamic QR codes often make your company's first impression. It's a digital introduction to your brand and what you offer. Understandably, performance is a foundational aspect of delivering a great user experience. Delivr supercharges your marketing and branding efforts with dynamic QR codes, fast redirects, and fast-loading landing pages that will delight visitors, persuade prospects, and win customers. RELIABILITY Unmatched record of reliability. QR infrastructure with 99.9% uptime for uninterrupted campaigns. With a 15-year, 99.9% uptime record, Delivr keeps your dynamic QR codes running when it matters most. Downtime isn't an option. Our platform delivers peace of mind with enterprise-grade performance, scalability, and security. Delivr is built on leading infrastructure from Microsoft Azure®, AWS®, and Cloudflare®. We offer unmatched reliability and robust protection for QR code campaigns of any scale. SECURITY Security first, not an afterthought. Hardened platform protection with continuous testing and best-practice engineering. Security is critical in today’s threat landscape. That’s why we protect your data and systems across the entire security continuum — through engineering best practices, application security, penetration testing, and regular security assessments. We also maintain strict policies for source code use and infrastructure protection, so you can trust Delivr at every level. PRIVACY Privacy is of the utmost importance. Zero-knowledge data practices with anonymized tracking and full regulatory compliance. Our privacy-first, zero-knowledge approach sets a new standard in data protection for the QR Code Generator industry. We collect only anonymized location data — never personally identifying information — and never fingerprint devices, build visitor profiles, or track individual activity. IP addresses are anonymized before storage, and our platform is fully GDPR- and CCPA-compliant, keeping your data secure, under your control, and private by design. SUPPORT We’ll take amazing care of you. 100%human. Need help? Real humans are ready when it matters most. We provide an intuitive suite of products, backed by expert support. From strategy to setup and beyond, our responsive team ensures your dynamic QR code campaigns run flawlessly — so you can focus on results, not troubleshooting. Whether you’re launching a single campaign or managing multiple programs, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.Contact Support or call +1.631.750.2785. EXPERIENCE + SUSTAINABILITY Established 2008; Made in New York; Built to Last. Millions of connections each month, powered securely, sustainably, and with purpose. Since 2008, Delivr has powered hundreds of millions of secure, compliant connections for global brands and enterprises. Our team has built and operated marketing, publishing, and analytics platforms engaging thousands of businesses and millions of people. Delivr holds an A+ carbon rating, outperforming 99% of websites globally, and actively supports initiatives that offset carbon impact as we scale. THE DELIVR DIFFERENCE 7 reasons to choose Delivr. --------------------------- EXCELLENCE Setting the standard for dynamic QR code generators. Over 15-years ago, we established the most comprehensive and reliable dynamic QR code generator, generating and managing ISO-compliant codes. Today, thousands of businesses rely on Delivr to intelligently route, track, and visualize consumer engagement across print and broadcast media, and packaging. Our industry-leading analytics go beyond scan counts, capturing location, device type, trends, and real-time performance to empower you with actionable insights for smarter campaign decisions. View our Plans & Pricing. PERFORMANCE First impressions matter; performance leads the way. Webpages reached through short URLs or dynamic QR codes often make your company's first impression. It's a digital introduction to your brand and what you offer. Understandably, performance is a foundational aspect of delivering a great user experience. Delivr supercharges your marketing and branding efforts with dynamic QR codes, fast redirects, and fast-loading landing pages that will delight visitors, persuade prospects, and win customers. RELIABILITY Unmatched record of reliability. With a 15-year, 99.9% uptime record, Delivr keeps your dynamic QR codes running when it matters most. Downtime isn't an option. Our platform delivers peace of mind with enterprise-grade performance, scalability, and security. Delivr is built on leading infrastructure from Microsoft Azure®, AWS®, and Cloudflare®. We offer unmatched reliability and robust protection for QR code campaigns of any scale. SECURITY Security first, not an afterthought. Security is critical in today’s threat landscape. That’s why we protect your data and systems across the entire security continuum — through engineering best practices, application security, penetration testing, and regular security assessments. We also maintain strict policies for source code use and infrastructure protection, so you can trust Delivr at every level. PRIVACY Privacy is of the utmost importance. Our privacy-first, zero-knowledge approach sets a new standard in data protection for the QR Code Generator industry. We collect only anonymized location data — never personally identifying information — and never fingerprint devices, build visitor profiles, or track individual activity. IP addresses are anonymized before storage, and our platform is fully GDPR- and CCPA-compliant, keeping your data secure, under your control, and private by design. SUPPORT We’ll take amazing care of you. 100%human. We provide an intuitive suite of products, backed by expert support. From strategy to setup and beyond, our responsive team ensures your dynamic QR code campaigns run flawlessly — so you can focus on results, not troubleshooting. Whether you’re launching a single campaign or managing multiple programs, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.Contact Support or call +1.631.750.2785. Our team has built and operated marketing, publishing, and analytics platforms engaging thousands of businesses and millions of people. 36.content: Once upon a connection. URL: https://delivr.com/page/834/connecting-worlds-safely-and-securely Title: Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/834/connecting-worlds-safely-and-securely Markdown Content: Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely. Delivr skip to main content +1.631.750.2785 Contact Support Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting About Delivr About Delivr The Story of Delivr Image 2: Delivr Plans & Pricing Customers Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Register Sign In Image 3: Delivr Our QR codes and short URLs are cookie-free. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy OUR VALUES Once upon a connection. From Magic Beans to Measurable Engagement Once upon a connection. From Magic Beans to Measurable Engagement ----------------------------------------- Home>Our Values>Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely. Image 4 SCAN TO CONTINUE ON YOUR PHONE. In a world where physical and digital experiences are increasingly intertwined, brands need infrastructure that goes beyond simple links and QR codes to create safe, seamless interactions. Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely explores how Delivr's modern engagement platform can bridge touchpoints with privacy-first, resilient technology that turns every interaction into a trusted experience. It reframes connection not as magic, but as intentional design — resilient, secure, and built for real-world opportunity. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- A Magical Bridge ---------------- In the classic fairy tale, Jack and the Beanstalk, a curious boy trades his family’s cow for a handful of magic beans. By morning, those beans have grown into a towering beanstalk, stretching from his small cottage into the clouds. The beanstalk is more than a plant. It was a bridge between ordinary and extraordinary — proof that the right pathway can change everything. The Giant Above --------------- But opportunity is rarely simple. High in the clouds lived a giant — powerful, unpredictable, and impossible to ignore. The climb promised reward, but it demanded awareness. One misstep could put everything at risk. Access alone isn’t enough. Access must be intentional. Because the greater the opportunity, the greater the need for precision, visibility, and control. Connection Under Control ------------------------ When danger came, Jack made a decisive choice. He cut the beanstalk to protect himself. In that moment lies the lesson: even the most valuable connections must be governed with care. True strength isn’t just in building bridges — it’s in knowing how to secure them, manage them, or gracefully close them to preserve safety and stability. Connection without control is fragile. Connection with control is infrastructure. Resilient, Secure Network ------------------------- Today, we reimagine the beanstalk. Not as a single fragile link, but as resilient, monitored infrastructure — designed with redundancy, controlled access, and secure endpoints at its core. Connections can be activated, adjusted, paused, or ended without disruption. Every interaction is visible. Every pathway is intentional. Continuity without chaos. Opportunity without exposure. Bridging worlds and turning customer journeys into safe, trusted experiences. From Fairy Tale to Reality -------------------------- Magic makes for a compelling story. Infrastructure builds the connected world. Delivr’s all-in-one Engagement Suite connects physical touchpoints to digital and spatial experiences — enabling brands to build, manage, and measure interactions across media, products, campaigns, channels, and real-world moments. Privacy-first. Enterprise-ready. Built for scale. Because in a truly connected world, success isn’t defined by how high you climb. It’s defined by how confidently you connect. Last Updated 23 Feb 2026 Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Customers Customers Plans & Pricing Plans & Pricing Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Support Support Contact Contact Image 5: Wonderful things start here. Infrastructure for the Connected World.℠Physical. Digital. Spatial. We’re Delivr — a human-centered software and services company helping brands connect people from the world around them to digital and spatial experiences. Our trigger-agnostic, privacy-first platform makes it simple to engage with media, products, objects, and places. Powered by our Engagement Suite — including the QR Code Generator, Super Simple Serialization℠, GS1 Digital Link, and Intelligent Link Routing℠ — Delivr assembles experiences to spark deeper emotional connections between brands and their audiences. 37.title: Cookie Notice
37.content: Cookie Notice URL: https://delivr.com/page/706/cookie-notice Title: Cookie Notice URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/706/cookie-notice Markdown Content: We want to be upfront about how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website, which are essential to delivering and optimizing our services. The result? This Cookie Notice.At Delivr, we aim to help our customers meet both the letter and the spirit of GDPR straightforwardly. GDPR is not just a regulation; respecting the privacy rights of all customers and their users (regardless of origin) is the right thing to do. Delivr has updated its platform to meet GDPR standards worldwide, and we will continue to invest in industry-leading data privacy initiatives. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ This website uses cookies. -------------------------- We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website and account areas. We do not share information about your use of our site with an analytics service. The information below is designed to help you to understand how we use cookies at Delivr and why. It also gives you information on how you can manage and disable cookies. Who are we? ----------- This website is operated by Delivr, a Delaware corporation registered in the United States. Delivr's registered office is at Delivr Corporation, 34 E. Main Street, Suite 392, Smithtown, NY 11787 What are cookies? ----------------- A cookie is a small file of letters and numbers that we put on your device when you browse our website and services (unless you have adjusted your browser settings so that it will refuse our cookies). Why do we use them? ------------------- Cookies are widely used to make websites work or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the site's owners. Below we explain the cookies we use and why. Exemptions to the consent requirement ------------------------------------- Some cookies are exempt from the consent requirement and therefore are not subject to preventive blocking. The exemptions are as follows: Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure website areas. The website cannot function properly without these cookies. Statistical cookies managed directly by you (not third parties), providing that the data is not used for profiling Anonymized statistical third-party cookies (e.g. Google Analytics). Statistic cookies help website owners to understand how visitors interact with websites by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This exemption may not apply to all regions and is subject to specific local regulations. The cookies we use and how we use them. --------------------------------------- Delivr primarily uses “first-party cookies”. These cookies are set and controlled by Delivr, not any external organization. However, to view some of our pages, you will have to accept cookies from external organizations. Website ------- First-party strictly necessary technical cookies in use in this website: Type Provider Name --- --- --- Strictly Necessary These technical cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of the website. We must include these cookies for certain web pages and services to function. For this reason, they do not require your consent. These include preference cookies, session cookies, cookies to identify trusted web traffic, cookies to distinguish between humans and bots, load balancing, etc. We use a cookie, NOTIFICATION , that remembers you have seen our cookie notice. Session cookies fall under the categorization of strictly necessary cookies under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), applicable in the European Union and the UK. Strictly necessary cookies like session cookies are exempt from the consent requirements underlined in the GDPR. Therefore, session cookies are GDPR compliant. Delivr sets a session cookie, JSESSIONID to maintain an anonymous user session by the server. We do not use Google Analytics and its related cookies within the Subscription Service . We cannot tell who you are within GA or link any GA data backwards or forwards to a specific cookie, username or other ID. For forms, we use Turnstile. Turnstile by Cloudflare is a user-friendly, privacy-preserving alternative to CAPTCHA. Turnstile always preserves the privacy of web visitors and does not use cookies . Unlike other CAPTCHA options, Turnstile never harvests data for ad retargeting. Delivr NOTIFICATION JSESSIONID Account Areas ------------- Additional first-party strictly necessary technical cookies in use by users who have signed up for and access secured account areas (the Subscription Service/Account Dashboard) as a customer of Delivr: Type Provider Name --- --- --- Strictly Necessary These technical cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of the Subscription Service . We have to include these cookies in order for certain web pages and services to function. For this reason, they do not require your consent. These include preference cookies, session cookies, load balancing, etc. We do not use Google Analytics and its related cookies within the Subscription Service . We cannot tell who you are within GA or link any GA data backwards or forwards to a specific cookie, username or other ID. Delivr NOTIFICATION DELIVR SESSION ID LOGGEDIN USERNAME USER ID USER UID Third-party cookies. -------------------- Type Provider Name --- --- --- Necessary These technical cookies are strictly necessary for the provision and operation of the website in the case of the Subscription Service . We must include these cookies for certain web pages and services to function. For this reason, they do not require your consent. Specifically, stripe.com uses stripe mid, stripe sid and m.stripe.com (called guid/ m cookie) to process payments for our subscriptions. When you initially provide or update your payment information, we transmit it via an encrypted connection to our Payment Processor, Stripe. Stripe uses and processes your payment information in accordance with Stripe's Privacy Policy. Stripe stripe mid stripe sid m.stripe.com (called guid/ m cookie) Other third-party cookies. -------------------------- Some of our pages display content from external providers. These third-party services are outside of the control of Delivr. Providers may, at any time, change their terms of service, purpose and use of cookies, etc. To view this third-party content, you must first accept their specific terms and conditions. This includes their cookie policies, which we have no control over. But, if you do not view this content, no third-party cookies are installed on your device. Third-party providers on the Delivr website include: Apple Maps audioBoom DaCast, formerly Vzaar Facebook Google Google Maps Instagram LinkedIn SoundCloud X Vimeo Wistia YouTube Managing and disabling cookies. ------------------------------- You can choose not to accept the setting of cookies. Your browser may allow you to set how it handles cookies. You can manage cookies by activating the setting on your browser that allows you to decline all cookies or prompts you on whether to accept each cookie and/or open the browser help menu and access settings to block or erase cookie activity. If you use your browser setting to block all or some cookies (including strictly or technically necessary cookies), all or some parts of the Site may not work as intended or may not work at all without cookies. To opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics across all websites visit https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout. If you'd like to delete cookies or instruct your web browser to delete or refuse cookies, please visit the help pages of your web browser. Please note, however, that if you delete cookies or refuse to accept them, you might not be able to use all of the features of the Website, you may not be able to store your preferences, and some of the pages on the Website might not display properly. For the Chrome web browser, please visit this page from Google; For the Microsoft Edge web browser, please visit this page from Microsoft; For the Firefox web browser,please visit this page from Mozilla; For the Safari web browser, please visit this page from Apple; and For any other web browser, please visit your web browser's official web pages. Users may opt out of non-essential third-party cookies. You can learn more by visiting the following third-party websites: https://optout.networkadvertising.org; and https://www.aboutads.info In addition, there are third-party plug-ins and apps that help manage cookies. Where can you find more information about cookies? -------------------------------------------------- You can learn more about cookies by visiting the following third-party websites: AllAboutCookies: https://www.allaboutcookies.org/; and Network Advertising Initiative: https://www.networkadvertising.org/ Direct Marketing & Do Not Track Signals --------------------------------------- Delivr does not track its visitors over time or across third-party websites to provide targeted advertising and therefore does not respond to Do Not Track (DNT) signals. We do not share personal data with third parties for their direct marketing purposes without your permission. Learn more about this and about our response to “do not track” signals in our, California Online Privacy Protection Act Notice. Email Policy ------------ Delivr does not collect, sell, rent, or otherwise distribute email addresses or any other personal information. We also do not solicit or collect emails unless you request support or other general inquiries. All discussions by email or phone are completely confidential unless we obtain your written consent. Please note that your access to and use of the Delivr Service may be subject to certain third-party terms and conditions and privacy policies. In particular, the Delivr e-mail service is being provided by a third party, currently Twilio SendGrid, and you understand that your use of their e-mail services in connection with the Delivr Services (including, for example, any e-mail correspondence or notices) are subject to the Twilio SendGrid Terms of Use. For more information about Twilio SendGrid’s services, please go to https://www.twilio.com/legal/tos. You can also access Twilio SendGrid’s privacy policy at https://www.twilio.com/legal/privacy.

39.title: The foundation of connected campaigns.
39.content: The foundation of connected campaigns. URL: https://delivr.com/page/798/core-dynamic-qr-code-generator Title: Core. The dynamic QR code generator built for what’s next. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/798/core-dynamic-qr-code-generator Markdown Content: Printed materials last. Campaigns don’t. Static QR codes can’t be updated, leading to costly reprints and outdated experiences. Delivr’s dynamic QR code platform lets brands update destinations, measure real-world engagement, and evolve experiences—without reprinting or starting over. For over 15 years, Delivr has set the standard for dynamic QR codes and link management. With enterprise-grade security, 99.9% uptime, and full compliance, Delivr ensures every scan works, connects, and builds brand trust. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- The Limitations of Basic QR Tools. ---------------------------------- Free QR tools are temporary. ---------------------------- Static QR codes lock you in. Updates require reprints—even for small changes. No real visibility. Basic tools lack analytics, so you can’t see what’s working. Privacy and data risk. Free tools often fall short on security and compliance. Unreliable service. Low-cost providers can vanish, breaking printed codes overnight. No item-level control. Without serialization, you can’t track or manage individual products or locations. No brand protection. Basic QR codes are easy to copy, misuse, or divert. Brands need something built to last. ------------------------------------ Built to Evolve. The Advantages of Delivr's Advanced QR Code Platform. ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Delivr outperforms generic QR tools and basic dynamic QR Code Generators. Delivr makes QR codes strategic assets, overcoming the limitations of basic tools with dynamic updates, rich analytics, and enterprise-grade reliability — plus Imprint ℠ Super Simple Serialzation for item-level intelligence and TrueMark® Brand Protection to help secure authenticity and trust at every scan. Dynamic Destinations -------------------- Update Anytime. No Reprints Required. Adapt content across product lifecycles, regions, and campaigns. Perfect for packaging, retail, outdoor media, and long-term use. Understand Real-World Engagement -------------------------------- Understand when, where, and how people engage. Measure engagement to inform marketing, packaging, and content decisions. Built for Long-Term, High-Volume Use ------------------------------------ Built for long-term use with high availability and performance. Brand-ready Customization ------------------------- QR codes designed to look intentional, not generic. Create and Optimize Dynamic QR Codes. ------------------------------------- Image 1 Create & Customize ------------------ Delivr is more than a QR code generator. It’s a platform for creating, managing, and measuring brand experiences across physical and digital touchpoints. Edit live destinations instantly. Customize colors, patterns, logos, and backgrounds to match your brand. Export QR codes as vector or raster files for sharp, high-quality prints. Support for VisualQR and custom integrations combines design with functionality. Dynamic QR codes serve as engaging brand touchpoints. Track, Analyze & Optimize ------------------------- Access analytics in real time by scan time, location, device, or source for every QR code. Export data in CSV format and integrate with analytics tools such as Google Analytics. Intelligent routing by operating system, region, and language is available with premium plans. Performance reports and optimization insights keep you in control of every campaign. Reliable Today. Resilient Tomorrow. ----------------------------------- When QR codes appear on packaging, signage, or products, reliability isn’t optional — it’s brand protection. Always-on performance. 99.9% uptime for every code, every scan. Privacy by design. GDPR- & CCPA-compliant, zero-knowledge architecture, anonymized IPs, no profiling, no hidden tracking, no data resale. Customers engage with confidence — your brand stays compliant automatically. Enterprise-grade security. Continuous monitoring, penetration testing, and robust access controls protect your data and your reputation. Scale With Confidence --------------------- From one QR code to thousands across markets worldwide: Effortless growth. Handle campaigns of any size, from local launches to global deployments. Organized teamwork. Set roles, groups, and labels for clear, secure collaboration. Smart audience targeting. Dynamic link routing adapts automatically to who scans. Built for Brands That Operate in the Real World ----------------------------------------------- Delivr dynamic QR codes are used across: Product packaging and labels Retail and in-store signage Marketing campaigns and launches Events, activations, and experiences Long-lived printed materials Common Questions, Answered -------------------------- Can we change where our QR code points after launch? ---------------------------------------------------- Yes. Update destinations anytime without reprinting or disrupting customers. Are these QR codes safe for packaging and long-term use? -------------------------------------------------------- Yes. Delivr is designed for durability, reliability, and scale. Will customers’ data be protected? ---------------------------------- Absolutely. Delivr is privacy-first and compliant with global data regulations. Do I need technical skills? --------------------------- No. Create, manage, and update QR codes in minutes.

40.title: The human spark behind every story, connecting people and brands.
40.content: The human spark behind every story, connecting people and brands. URL: https://delivr.com/page/833/curiosity-where-every-connection-begins Title: Curiosity, Where Connection Begins URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/833/curiosity-where-every-connection-begins Markdown Content: Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Delivr skip to main content +1.631.750.2785 Contact Support Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting About Delivr About Delivr The Story of Delivr Image 1: Delivr Plans & Pricing Customers Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Register Sign In Image 2: Delivr Our QR codes and short URLs are cookie-free. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy OUR VALUES The human spark behind every story, connecting people and brands. The human spark behind every story, connecting people and brands. Home>Our Values>Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Curiosity is the spark that connects people with the brands, ideas, and experiences they love. It invites them to explore, to learn, and to engage on their own terms, turning fleeting moments into meaningful discoveries. When nurtured with care and respect, curiosity becomes more than a question — it becomes a bridge to connection, insight, and shared experiences that linger long after the first encounter. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- The Spark That Opens Worlds --------------------------- Curiosity isn’t just a spark — it’s the force that opens worlds. It is the quiet heartbeat of discovery, the gentle nudge that asks why, what if, and what lies just beyond the next turn. Innate and uncoercible, it turns ordinary moments into journeys, questions into understanding, and wonder into connection. When technology serves curiosity instead of exploiting it, doors open, paths appear, and extraordinary things unfold. Beyond the Looking Glass ------------------------ Like Alice stepping through the looking glass, curiosity leads us into worlds both strange and luminous. It is the same impulse that drives someone to scan a QR code, explore a new idea, or seek connection in unexpected places — a voluntary leap into the unknown. Honored with tools built on respect, transparency, and consent, that impulse becomes transformative. Curiosity doesn’t just unlock information; it creates space for insight, dialogue, and discovery that feels both personal and profoundly human. The Leap of Trust ----------------- Curiosity cannot be forced, profiled, or predicted. It emerges when someone chooses to lean forward, engage, and participate. Every scan, click, or gesture carries intent — and behind intent lies trust: fragile, precious, and worth protecting. Safeguarding it means collecting only what’s necessary, offering clarity in privacy, and designing experiences that invite exploration without intrusion. When technology honors this balance, it becomes a bridge rather than a barrier — a quiet enabler of knowledge, not a collector of behavior. Crafting for Wonder ------------------- To design for curiosity is to design with restraint. It is to illuminate without overwhelming, to guide without constraining. Discovery thrives when exploration feels safe, when each step forward is voluntary, visible, and respected. Techniques like progressive disclosure reveal information gradually, keeping focus alive without strain. Clear opt-ins and transparent consent empower users to shape their own journey. In this environment, curiosity blooms — a shared adventure between audience and brand, product and person, question and answer. Where Discovery Becomes Connection ---------------------------------- Wonderful things begin there — at the intersection of wonder and trust. Protecting curiosity is protecting something essential about being human. In doing so, we create a digital world where exploration sparks understanding, understanding fosters connection, and connection becomes something enduring. In every scan, every interaction, every choice to wonder, curiosity finds its home. Your website should work as hard as you do — not hold you back. The solution ------------ Delivr licenses a hosted content management application, Forge℠, that performs beautifully — on every device, in every moment, and across every audience. We combine design, speed, and strategy to create landing that: Load fast and stay fast Guide visitors clearly toward action Build trust through clean UX and reliable performance Support long-term growth through scalability and maintenance What you get ------------ A content management application designed to deliver results Build landing pages at scale that don’t just look good — they convert.
