42.title: Connecting people everywhere to the brands they love.
42.content: Connecting people everywhere to the brands they love. URL: https://delivr.com/page/802/customers Title: Delivr connects people from the world around them to the brands they love. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/802/customers Markdown Content: THE DELIVR DIFFERENCE Customer Stories ---------------- Image 1 LOUIS VUITTON X TAKASHI MURAKAMI COLLABORATION This QR code was created in 2009 by Takashi Murakami in collaboration with Louis Vuitton and developed with the Tokyo-based agency SET. Originally part of a promotional campaign, it is now recognized as an artwork, demonstrating how utility and art can coexist in luxury marketing. The custom domain used in the QR code is maintained by Delivr to safeguard against misuse, misrepresentation, or unauthorized use. © Louis Vuitton Global enterprises and brands choose the Delivr Engagement Suite to reimagine how people, products, and places come together — turning everyday moments into trusted, meaningful experiences. Explore how brands are using the Delivr Engagement Suite to bring every interaction to life. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ CPG / BEVERAGE One of the World’s Largest Beverage Companies Builds a Connected Parts & Equipment Ecosystem Every piece of equipment,part, and component becomes a real-time digital touchpoint. The beverage company is deploying labels with specialized QR codes on equipment, parts, and components across North America. These specialized codes power hundreds of logistic use cases, expanding available data, reducing workflow friction, and giving teams, suppliers, warehouses, bottlers, service providers, and customers the information they need at every stage of the product lifecycle. The result is improved efficiency, reduced downtime, and increased reliability. GAMING & INTERACTIVE ENTERTAINMENT Global Video Game Publisher Elevates Player Experiences and Strengthens Loyalty Packaging, in-game, and promotional QR codes turn players into engaged communities. The AAA gaming company deployed dynamic QR codes in-game, on packaging, and across promotional materials. Players receive support, exclusive content, and rewards. This solution significantly increased player interaction, strengthened loyalty, and generated actionable insights that shaped future campaigns. CPG / CONFECTIONERY Global Confectionery Leader Transforms Everyday Packaging into Digital Connections Candy packaging becomes a gateway to recipes, offers, and interactive experiences. The confectionary company integrated dynamic QR codes into candy packaging. Consumers unlock recipes, offers, and fundraising concepts, seamlessly linking the physical product to digital experiences. The result is exclusive access, interactive fun, and a lasting brand connection at the moment of purchase. QSR & BEVERAGE PARTNERSHIP Third-Largest U.S. QSR & Beverage Partnership Creates Mass-Scale Customer Engagement Soda cups become interactive gateways to rewards and campaigns. The hamburger chain partnered with a global beverage company to implement dynamic QR codes on hundreds of millions of soda cups. Each cup became a real-time entry point to branded experiences. Updates and measurable insights were achieved at scale, leading to a successful sweepstakes and increased engagement. CPG / ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES World’s Fourth-Largest Brewer Turns Every Bottle into a Brand Touchpoint Every scan delivers real-time promotions Image 2and localized experiences. The brewer placed dynamic QR codes on hundreds of millions of beer bottles power global promotions and contests. Each scan provides campaign updates, localized experiences, and captures measurable engagement insights, strengthening customer relationships and loyalty. TRANSPORTATION Global Airlines Elevate Passenger Experiences Through Connected Journeys QR codes streamline info, loyalty, and destination access. Several airlines independently implemented dynamic QR codes on in-flight materials, airport signage, and loyalty programs. Scanning delivers program details, benefits, and guides. Content updates instantly, enabling agile communication and insights into passenger behavior. RETAIL Global Home Furnishing Brand Reimagines Retail Through Smart Product Engagement Image 3Catalogs, packaging, and displays connect customers to guides, tips, and offers. The retailer used dynamic QR codes to link customers to assembly guides, product care tips, design inspiration, and promotions. Real-time updates and analytics reveal which content shoppers access most, transforming static packaging into personalized interactive experiences. AUTOMOTIVE Multinational Automotive Company Delivers Culturally Relevant Brand Experiences Marketing materials provide localized messaging and campaign offers nationwide.Image 4 The automotive company placed dynamic QR codes in printed materials to allow localized content updates across regions. Each scan delivered culturally tailored promotions and brand stories, enhancing engagement and campaign impact. ADVERTISING Global Marketing Agency Powers Creative Collaboration with QR Knowledge Access Image 5Dynamic QR codes unlock client content, insights, and campaign improvements. The global agency rolled out dynamic QR codes across advertising campaigns. Delivr’s tools ensured scanability, brand consistency, and accessibility. QR insights informed engagement strategies and improved operational efficiency RETAIL Leading Global Cosmetics Company Enhances Beauty Journeys Through Connected Experiences Packaging and POS displays provide tutorials, product info, and offers. Image 6The cosmetics company introduced dynamic QR codes to allow updates without reprinting, keeping campaigns current. Analytics-informed strategies strengthened loyalty and empowered customers to make informed purchasing decisions. CPG / FMCG Global Consumer Products Company Delivers Immersive Experiences Worldwide Hundreds of millions of packages bring sweepstakes, info, and support directly to consumers. The company rolled out dynamic QR codes to enable digital experiences on product packages across 200+ countries. This resulted in everyday products becoming moments of discovery, delight, and strengthened emotional connection. QUICK-SERVICE RESTAURANTS (QSR) World’s Largest Mexican-Inspired QSR Chain Unifies Guest Journeys Across Touchpoints Image 7Packaging, signage, and media create a cohesive, engaging customer experience. Serving 40 million customers weekly, the chain uses dynamic QR codes across packaging, signage, digital media, and receipts. Each scan connects guests to interactive content, delivering a unified, engaging experience. CPG / FOOD & PET CARE Multinational Food & Pet Care Manufacturer Strengthens Trust with Always-On Packaging Support Every product becomes a direct line to help, guidance, and brand connection. The food and pet care manufacturer uses dynamic QR codes across product packaging to enhance customer experience at the point of sale and in moments of need. Each scan provides instant access to product information, feeding guidance, support programs, and customer assistance, while Delivr’s Engagement Suite enables dynamic content updates without reprinting packaging. This scalable, always-on communication layer ensures consistency across markets, increases customer satisfaction, deepens loyalty, and reinforces long-term brand trust. RETAIL Global Athletic Footwear Brand Unlocks Store Intelligence Through Connected Signage Image 8Serialized QR codes transform every store into a measurable digital environment. The world’s third-largest athletic footwear brand deploys serialized dynamic QR codes across in-store signage to deliver localized content and enable store-level performance tracking. Each scan connects customers to tailored digital experiences while generating real-time, location-specific insights that help management optimize merchandising, operations, and campaign performance. What was once static signage is now a connected retail intelligence layer that improves engagement and drives measurable results across the store network. FINANCIAL & PROFESSIONAL SERVICES Enterprise Financial & Advisory Firm Secures Mission-Critical Communication at Scale Encrypted, dynamic QR links protect sensitive workflows across every channel. The enterprise advisory, broking, and financial services firm uses dynamic QR codes to securely distribute confidential updates and protected resources to authorized employees and client stakeholders across print, digital assets, facilities, emails, and controlled workflows. With encryption in transit and at rest, regular penetration testing, and dynamic link management, the platform delivers enterprise-grade security while allowing instant content updates without reprinting or redistribution, streamlining operations and ensuring critical information reaches the right people quickly and securely. DURABLE CONSUMER GOODS / HOME APPLIANCES Global Home Appliance Leader Redefines Ownership Through Connected Product Insight Image 9Packaging becomes a gateway to seamless support and smarter product experiences. One of Sweden’s largest companies operating in more than 80 countries adopted dynamic QR codes across packaging and printed materials to elevate the ownership experience. Each scan provides instant access to manuals, troubleshooting guidance, product registration, and support resources, while dynamic content management ensures information stays accurate and up to date without reprinting materials. The result is a more seamless, connected ownership journey that reduces friction, improves satisfaction, and strengthens long-term customer relationships. CPG / BEAUTY & PERSONAL CARE Global Beauty & Cosmetics Leader Inspires Confident Shopping Through Interactive Discovery Image 10Smart packaging connects customers to tutorials, ingredients, and personalized insight. The cosmetics and beauty company uses dynamic QR codes across packaging and point-of-sale materials to provide instant access to product details, ingredient transparency, tutorials, and expert recommendations. Customers scan to explore personalized guidance and tailored suggestions, while dynamic content updates keep campaigns relevant without reprinting materials. By transforming packaging into an interactive discovery layer, the brand increases engagement, drives repeat purchases, and strengthens long-term loyalty. MEDIA & PUBLISHING National Newspaper Transforms Print into Interactive Digital Storytelling Image 11Readers move from page to experience with one scan. The U.S. newspaper integrated dynamic QR codes into print editions. Scans allow readers to access multimedia content, additional reporting, and subscriber benefits. Campaigns could be updated instantly without reprinting, delivering richer storytelling and measurable engagement. CPG Cordless Tech Manufacturer Elevates Customer Experience with Connected Packaging Image 12Smart codes guide usage, support, and tracking. The manufacturer placed dynamic QR codes on packaging and manuals provide step-by-step instructions, warranty verification, and usage tips. The manufacturer can update content in real time and gather data on which guidance is most accessed, improving product satisfaction and reducing support calls. BANKING & FINANCIAL SERVICES Major Financial Institution Modernizes Customer Engagement Real-time QR intelligence streamlines secure communication. The bank implemented Delivr QR codes for statements, marketing, and secure access links. Clients can scan to verify information, access services, and receive updates. The dynamic nature of the codes allows real-time updates and robust analytics for internal teams. DIGITAL MEDIA & ADVERTISING Global Advertising Leader Creates Interactive Learning at Scale Image 13QR-enhanced guide turn static training into engaging experiences. The guide distills the craft and expertise of a generation of creators into clear, actionable best practices, organized across seven focused sections. Enriched with more than 40 Delivr QR codes, it provides instant access to real video examples, turning static guidance into an interactive learning experience that equips teams with the insight and tools needed to create effectively for today’s attention economy. View the Guide. FOOD & AGRICULTURE Multinational Dairy Cooperative Elevates Traceability and Consumer Trust Image 14QR codes make product origin, safety, and sustainability transparent. The dairy cooperative uniting more than 2,500 family-led farms across South Eastern Australia, upholds some of the highest standards in animal welfare and environmental stewardship. To advance transparency and strengthen product traceability across global markets, the cooperative introduced dynamic QR codes on dairy packaging providing consumers instant access to production details, farm sources, and sustainability practices. Scans increase transparency, enhance trust, and generate insights into consumer interest across regions. EDUCATION & LEARNING Globally Respected Children’s Publisher Unlocks Curiosity Through Interactive Content Image 15Educational QR experiences spark playful discovery. The publisher with more than four decades of experience supports science literacy and discovery for millions of young readers in over 100 languages. In its latest science encyclopedia, 180 Delivr-powered dynamic QR codes unlock videos and guided learning activities, driving engagement and enhancing the learning journey. Watch the Video. RETAIL Large Department Store Retailer Elevates In-Store Discovery QR experiences guide shoppers to products and promotions they love. Image 16The retailer reimagined In-store engagement by placing personalized style inspiration directly into shoppers’ hands. Dynamic QR codes — shaped into the retailer’s iconic symbol and positioned throughout stores — unlocked exclusive designer tips, behind-the-scenes videos, and trend showcases, blending physical browsing with dynamic digital storytelling. Each scan transformed static displays into interactive style moments, increasing engagement, extending dwell time, and delivering valuable insight into which content and collections resonated most. SPORTS & ENTERTAINMENT MARKETING Global Sports Betting Brand Turns a Live Match into a Scannable Cultural Spectacle Image 17A world-first QR activation transforms real-world theater into measurable engagement. The sports betting and entertainment company reimagined what a QR code could be by transforming it into a live, fully scannable cultural moment during an international football match. Using 2,000 footballs, a specialized build team, a plane, and two skydivers, the brand created a massive QR code in the sky — culminating in a live bet placed mid-freefall. Powered by Delivr’s dynamic QR technology, the activation was not only visually unforgettable but fully functional and measurable, turning large-scale spectacle into real-time interaction and proving that even a single scan can become a global brand story. DURABLE CONSUMER GOODS Global Industrial Power Tool Manufacturer Turns Packaging into Connected Product Support Smart QR codes deliver guidance, safety, and insight at the moment of purchase. The manufacturer of professional-grade power tools, hand tools, and accessories uses dynamic QR codes to transform product packaging into a connected digital experience. Each scan provides instant access to product guides, safety information, registration, and how-to content, reducing friction and improving onboarding. Serialized QR codes also generate real-world engagement insights across major retail partners, revealing what content drives interest, conversion, and loyalty — turning static packaging into a smarter, data-informed product experience. ADVERTISING Global Commerce-Focused Marketing Agency Scales Connected Packaging Across CPG Brands Dynamic QR experiences unify campaigns into a measurable commerce ecosystem. The agency adopted the Delivr Engagement Suite as its connected packaging and engagement platform across packaging, in-store activations, shopper media, and promotional campaigns. By standardizing on dynamic QR codes, the agency delivers scalable, always-on consumer experiences that provide instant access to offers, rewards, product information, and brand storytelling. This approach transforms fragmented touchpoints into a measurable connected-commerce ecosystem, enabling faster campaign optimization, deeper shopper intelligence, and more meaningful engagement across retailers and regions. PUBLISHING Independent Children’s Publisher Brings Print to Life Through Interactive Learning Dynamic QR codes spark curiosity while preserving the magic of books. The fast-growing UK children's publisher integrates dynamic QR codes into select titles to create immersive, clickable learning experiences. Young readers scan to access videos, narrated clips, and supplemental educational content that deepens engagement while preserving the craft and charm of print. At the same time, real-world engagement insights inform future releases and international expansion, helping the award-winning publisher deliver innovative reading experiences that inspire curiosity and discovery worldwide. GOVERNMENT National Transportation Agency Delivers Real-Time Public Information Image 18QR codes streamline updates, schedules, and passenger guidance. The agency placed dynamic QR codes on stations, signage, and printed schedules provide commuters with instant access to real-time updates, delays, and service information. Passengers receive accurate info while the agency gathers actionable insights on usage and information flow. HERITAGE National Museum Enriches Visitor Experiences Through Multimedia QR Codes Scans unlock immersive stories behind every exhibit. At the museum, visitors access augmented reality, video content, and curated storytelling through dynamic QR codes on signage and displays. Content updates instantly, enhancing cultural engagement and providing data on visitor preferences. HEALTHCARE Healthcare System Transforms Access and Care Through Connected Experiences Instant, secure access to guidance, updates, and resources. The hospital group placed dynamic QR codes on forms, brochures, and patient materials link to resources, appointment details, and guidance. Real-time updates allow healthcare providers to communicate efficiently while tracking engagement for service improvement. RETAIL Premium Apparel Brand Blends Craftsmanship and Digital Storytelling Labels connect shoppers to brand stories and product insights. The lifestyle and apparel brand with deep roots in American craftsmanship integrated dynamic QR codes on labels and packaging allow customers to explore product history, care instructions, and style guides. Each scan builds brand connection, encourages responsible usage, and drives sales through personalized engagement. RETAIL Industrial Power Tool Manufacturer Turns Packaging into Purposeful Support QR links guide usage, safety, and maintenance in real time. The manufacturer placed dynamic QR codes on packaging provide step-by-step tutorials, safety instructions, and warranty registration. Teams monitor scans to understand which content is accessed most, optimizing support resources and reducing customer friction.

Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Customizing the design of a dynamic QR code. Delivr Customizing the design of a dynamic QR code. Customizing the design of a dynamic QR code. Delivr’s design tools let you combine a dynamic QR Code with your brand’s visuals to create an eye-catching call to action. Engage people instantly—whether in print, online, or in physical spaces. Customizing your QR Code won’t create a new campaign. Your default code and any previous custom designs will still work, and all scans will be tracked in the same report. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to access the customization tools. 1. On your Dashboard, find the campaign whose QR code you want to customize. 2. Click the Download & Customize QR Code icon, then 3. Choose one of the following: Standard Design . Modify the default settings of your standard design dynamic QR code. Custom Design (QR Code Designer) . Unlock full customization options, including colors, design elements, logos, and frames. Standard Design Customization Refine every aspect of your QR Code to align with your brand and optimize performance. Select lowercase or uppercase for your URL, adjust margins for a tidy scan area, and resize the code to fit any design. Improve reliability with advanced error correction, even on difficult surfaces. Match your exact brand colors using HEX codes or the color picker, while the built-in contrast checker guarantees each design remains easily scannable. Casing .Choose lowercase or uppercase for your QR Code URL to match your brand style. Error Correction . Boost scan reliability, even on damaged or low-contrast surfaces (default: 25%). Margin. Add or reduce white space to ensure clear, distraction-free scanning. Scale. Set the perfect code size for your design and medium. Code & Background Color . Match your brand palette using HEX values or the built-in color picker. Contrast Checker . Instantly verify your colors keep your code scannable in any setting. Download Formats: --------------------- Ideal for high-resolution, scalable printing (SVG, EPS, PDF). Keeps edges crisp at any size—ideal for print ads, labels, packaging, signage, and large-format displays. Optimized for digital use or quick sharing (PNG, JPG). Great for websites, social media, email, and small-scale prints. Custom Design with QR Code Designer Customize every part of your QR Code to make it uniquely yours. Select custom colors for the code, background, and markers, and choose from distinctive patterns while adjusting marker borders and centers for added flair. Increase brand recognition by adding your logo in the center, and boost engagement with a compelling call-to-action frame. Fine-tune advanced settings, such as error correction, to ensure your code stays reliable and scannable in any situation. Set Colors . Choose custom colors for your code, background, and marker elements to reflect your brand perfectly. Customize Design Elements . Select unique patterns, fine-tune marker borders and centers, and apply distinct marker colors for a truly one-of-a-kind QR Code. Add a Logo . Place your brand logo at the center of the code for immediate recognition and trust. Add a Frame . Include a compelling call-to-action frame that invites more scans and engagement. Set Advanced Options . Enhance scan reliability and resilience by adjusting the error correction level for data redundancy. Advanced Design Options VisualQR & BroadcastQR . Creates a specially formatted QR Code using our MagicDot™ Scanning Technology . The SVG-format code can be layered over any print or digital asset—logos, graphics, photos, animations, video, broadcast, or streaming media. ShapeQR. Generates QR Codes in custom shapes. The square code within each design is the functional, scannable part. Pro Tip Always test your customized design on multiple devices before publishing. 44.title: Data Policy
44.content: Data Policy URL: https://delivr.com/page/707/data-policy Title: Data Policy URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/707/data-policy Markdown Content: Delivr sets the standard for a privacy-first approach to data. This data policy describes how we treat the data we collect in performance of our services. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Delivr provides cookie-free short URLs & QR codes Delivr is GDPR and CCPA compliant Delivr securely transports data to our MS Azure server(s) located in the US, data is encrypted in motion and at rest Delivr does not collect or store sensitive data, personal data, or Personally Identifiable Information (PII) of your audience Delivr anonymizes traffic data / IP Address prior to database storage Delivr does not collect user IDs or other pseudonymous identifiers Delivr does not fingerprint devices Delivr does not build profiles of visitors Delivr does not attempt to identify visitors Delivr does not accumulate patterns of an individuals activity and geospatial information Delivr does not make use of your data for automated decision-making Delivr does not make use of generative AI, including Large Language Models(LLMs) Delivr does not make use of machine learning software platforms and algorithms that train on and/or learn from your data Delivr does not make use of third-party vendors to process your data Delivr does not run third-party tracking services or third-party cookies on on its website or on your campaigns Delivr does not track cross-domain Delivr does not facilitate supercookies Delivr does not facilitate third-party advertising cookies for re-targeting Delivr does not use your data in advertising, social, or press releases Delivr does not sell your data Delivr does not share your data with any third parties with two exceptions: 1. We securely send anonymized location data to Google APIs to generate the maps used in your reports. 2. We reserve the right to share anonymized, aggregate insights e.g., 52.7% of all QR code scans across the Delivr platform originate from iOS devices. Delivr as a data processor. --------------------------- In order for Delivr to produce reports, we analyze a variety of sources of data, including data from the users who access your campaign links, none of them considered personal data under GDPR - save for IP address. In this scenario, Delivr is considered the data processor on behalf of our customers, who are individual data controllers. In order to report on location, Delivr tracks and stores the IP address of visitors to your campaigns. While an IP address can be considered personal data, we never store full IP addresses. We anonymize IP address as soon as technically feasible by replacing the last octet of your visitor’s IP address with a ‘0’. By stripping the octet from IPs, we eliminate the collection of your campaign visitors' personal data. This occurs before any data storage; the full IP address is never written to the disk. Notice to EU Users: As no personal data whatsoever is stored in the case of using the default method to determine location, we believe Delivr reports are not subject to GDPR laws. If the optional method of Device GPS Location is activated by you, your reports/data may be subject to GDPR laws. GDPR acknowledges location data’s unique position as identifiable information by making it part of its definition of “personal data” in Article 4 (1). Under GDPR, subjects of personal data are granted extended rights, including a right to access and a right to erasure. What information is collected? ------------------------------ Delivr captures and securely transports data the following information related to your campaigns for storage and reporting to Delivr’s MS Azure servers located in the US. Visit Date & Time Stamp Location IP Address. The default method of determining location uses IP Address. IP Address is anonymized before storage or reporting. Device GPS. An optional method of determining location requires the permission of the user. With the users explicit OPT-IN, location is determined by device GPS (if activated). In this case, Latitude & Longitude is made available with a level of accuracy. If permission is not granted, IP address is used. Device User Agent String, Type of device/OS/browser Language that the device is set to Location-based services. ------------------------ To provide location-based services, Delivr collects, uses, and shares anonymized location data, including the approximate geographic location of devices when campaigns are accessed. As example, with the scan of a QR code or click of a Short URL, IP-based location data is collected to determine a devices’ approximate location. Further, when activated by the campaign account owner, accepted by the device owner, and available to the device, more precise location-based services may use GPS, Bluetooth, and your IP Address, along with crowd-sourced Wi-Fi hotspot and cell tower locations, and other technologies to determine a devices’ approximate location. This location data is collected anonymously in a form that does not personally identify. The location data is used by Delivr to provide and improve location-based content and services. The default method used by Delivr to determine location is IP Address. IP Address is anonymized prior to database storage. IP Addresses are typically accurate to the city or state/province level. IP Addresses that can only be identified at the country level do not appear on the map. IP Addresses for which we have no geolocation data do not appear on the map. What happens if the "Device GPS Location" method is activated? Campaigns can be configured at the campaign account owners discretion to display a prompt that requests permission to determine location through GPS. If permission is granted, location and location accuracy is determined by device GPS. Latitudes and Longitudes are approximate and based on a mix of commercially-licensed and open-source IP Lookup data. If permission is not granted, location is determined by the default location method. True visits. Delivr attempts to report only those visits that originate from “real” people engaging your campaign. Visits generated by computer programs and bots are in many cases identified and removed from your report. In some cases, applications send additional server-based visits that cannot be removed. In other cases, where visits flow though the server of an intermediate service or application, activity will appear clustered around the location of that server. How is this information used? ----------------------------- This information allows Delivr to: 1. Provide intelligent redirection services e.g., redirect by device OS, by country, and by device language, 2. Generate reports with date & time stamp, geolocation, device OS and language, and 3. Identify and remove non-human, bot and spam traffic from reports. It is against our Terms of Service for customers to create or use URLs that contain any type of personal information. In the case that customers wish to pass personal data through the URL in any way (such as by including it in the domain name, the URL slug or in forwarding parameters) it's the customer's responsibility to notify us as well as their own customers. Reports are private & secure by default, accessible only to the account owners running the campaign and Delivr under secure login. Account owners / users can, however, 1. Choose to share their annonomized reports with others. 2. Send select data to third party analytics platform by way of URL-based campaign parameters e.g.; Google Analytics UTM Parameters. 3. Determine how long data remains in the Delivr system. Account owners / users can choose to delete their reports & underlying data at anytime.

46.title: Privacy isn’t a feature — it’s the foundation.
46.content: Privacy isn’t a feature — it’s the foundation. URL: https://delivr.com/page/814/delivrs-approach-to-data-privacy Title: Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy is Unmatched in the QR Code Generator Industry. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/814/delivrs-approach-to-data-privacy Markdown Content: Delivr sets a higher standard for data privacy in the QR Code Generator Iindustry — and in the marketing technology industry as a whole. While some may call our approach revolutionary, we see it as the right thing to do.Privacy-by-design. At Delivr, we believe in transparency. This commitment to transparency ensures that brands and their audiences are fully informed about our data practices. Delivr’s “Privacy-by-Design” and “Zero-Knowledge” approaches emphasize privacy, security, and transparency in every aspect of our service. We practice data minimization, employ strong encryption, and provide clear control over the data we collect to offer our services. We treat your audience data with the utmost care, respect, and value, understanding its importance to you and our responsibility in handling it. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Privacy, security, and transparency by design. ---------------------------------------------- Delivr enforces privacy-first principles to ensure GDPR and CCPA compliance while maintaining complete user anonymity. Privacy Protection ------------------ Cookie-Free. Delivr does not use cookies or persistent identifiers, ensuring each interaction remains independent with no cross-session tracking or profiling. No Personal Data. Delivr does not store any sensitive, personal, or personally identifiable information (PII). No User Tracking. Delivr does not collect user IDs, pseudonymous identifiers, or device fingerprints, nor does it track behavior across platforms. Anonymized IP Logging. IP addresses are anonymized before storage, protecting user privacy. No Profiling. Delivr does not build visitor profiles or analyze individual activity or geospatial patterns. Security & Data Minimization ---------------------------- Encryption at Rest and in Transit. All sensitive data is encrypted using industry-standard algorithms (AES-256 for storage, TLS 1.2/1.3 for transmission). Data Minimization. Delivr only collects the essential data required to provide our core services, ensuring full legal compliance and limiting exposure. Self-Destructing Analytics. Collected data is deleted after a strict retention period, ensuring no long-term storage. No AI Training, Machine Learning, or Automated Decision-Making. Delivr does not use your data for AI training, automated decision-making, or machine learning. We do not employ generative artificial intelligence (GenAI), Large Language Models (LLMs), or algorithms that learn from or train on your data. Transparency, Compliance, and Data Use -------------------------------------- Open-Source Transparency. Delivr is fully transparent about our tracking methods and privacy measures, enabling third-party audits and verifications. No Third-Party Tracking. Delivr does not run third-party tracking services or cross-domain tracking or facilitate re-targeting through supercookies or third-party advertising cookies. No Advertising or Marketing Use. Your data is never used in Delivr ads, social media, or press releases. No Selling of Data. Delivr does not sell your data, ensuring your audience’s information remains secure and private. Limited & Transparent Data Usage. Delivr only shares your data in two specific cases: 1. Aggregated, anonymized insights — For example, “52.7% of QR scans originate from iOS devices. 2. Anonymized location data for reports — Securely sent to Google APIs to generate maps and charts in reports. Data collection is minimal & anonymous. --------------------------------------- Timestamp to analyze when engagements occur. Each engagement (e.g., scan, click) is logged independently without linking it to an individual. Campaign ID tracks which managed Short URL was clicked, or QR code was scanned. Approximate Location to track where the QR code was scanned. The default method of determining Location uses an IP Address, which is anonymized before storage or reporting. An optional GPS-based method for determining location can be enabled at the discretion of the account owner or organization. This method requires the individuals’s explicit opt-in. If granted, the device’s GPS (if activated) provides latitude and longitude with meter-level accuracy. If permission is not granted, the default IP-based method is used to determine location. Device Type & Browser for technical insights. The device’s User Agent String determines the device type, operating system (e.g., Apple/Android), and browser type. Language that the device is set to. Note. Once an individual engages (e.g., scan, click, tap) with a Delivr-managed QR code or short URL, they are redirected to the destination URL, and Delivr’s tracking system no longer tracks them. How is this data used? The data we collect allows Delivr to provide the following core services: ------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. Provide intelligent link routing, e.g., redirect by device OS, country, and language. 2. Generate reports with date & time stamp, geolocation, device OS, and language. 3. Identify and remove non-human, bot, and spam traffic from reports. Reports are private by default and accessible only to the organization running the campaign and Delivr under strict access controls. However, --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. Organizations can share their anonymized reports with others, ensuring that the data is shared securely and under their control. 2. Organizations can send select data to a third-party analytics platform using URL-based campaign parameters, such as Google Analytics UTM Parameters. 3. Organizations have complete control over the lifespan of their data within the Delivr system. They can have their reports and underlying data deleted at anytime, giving them full autonomy over their data management. At Delivr, privacy isn’t just a policy — it’s our promise to safeguard what matters. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ We believe privacy should be transparent, straightforward, and effortless. Provide your audience with the security they deserve — no unnecessary data collection, no legal complications, no compromises, just trusted privacy throughout the experience. Don’t settle for standard or outdated data practices — Delivr is shaping the future of responsible technology by fostering trust, creating deeper emotional connections, and setting a new standard for data privacy. Last Updated 22 Feb 2026

Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy OUR VALUES Let’s Build a Greener Future Let’s Build a Greener Future Home>Our Values>Let’s Build a Greener Future Delivr’s Commitment to a Greener and More Sustainable Future At Delivr, we’re not just a secure and privacy-first platform for generating QR codes. We contribute to the sustainability movement by building a platform that helps make the world greener with every QR code, scan, and page at a time. Today, we are pleased to share our achievements. Delivr’s web pages, landing pages, and profiles achieve a carbon rating of A+, surpassing 98% of all pages worldwide. This contribution sets us apart in our industry and underscores our mission to promote sustainability, innovation, and responsibility. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- We have created an eco-friendly and efficient platform through sustainable energy, thoughtful optimization, performance techniques, and privacy-first practices of zero use of social media trackers, cross-site tracking cookies, and content trackers. When you visit any Delivr-hosted landing or profile page, you become part of something wonderful. Our pages produce a mere 0.02–0.03 grams of CO2 per visit. Over a year at our current usage, that’s the CO2 equivalent of boiling water for 267,264 cups of tea. Delivr has committed to investing in tree planting projects to offset this CO2. In comparison, a typical page delivered within the industry generates significantly more carbon emissions than you might expect, 0.8 grams CO2 equivalent per page or close to 27x greater than a Delivr-hosted page. We hope this positive impact on the environment inspires and motivates brands to join us in our mission. Why This Matters for Brands. ---------------------------- When a brand chooses Delivr, it’s not just about adopting QR codes — it’s about embracing a sustainable approach to customer engagement. QR codes are already a great tool for minimizing physical waste, but by partnering with Delivr, brands take that commitment a step further. Our platform ensures that every interaction with your QR codes contributes to a greener planet. We achieve this by optimizing our platform for energy efficiency and investing in tree planting projects to offset the CO2 emissions. These efforts enhance our client’s image and appeal to eco-conscious consumers. For instance, think about the materials you use for marketing, such as posters, packaging, or business cards. When you integrate Delivr QR codes into these materials, the narrative shifts from mere convenience to a broader story about sustainability. For example, a poster with a Delivr QR code can lead to a digital brochure, reducing the need for printed materials. Every scan and visit to a Delivr-powered page demonstrates your commitment to reducing carbon footprints. It’s not about what QR codes can do — it’s about how Delivr makes every interaction more meaningful and environmentally friendly. How We Do It. ------------- Our success in reducing CO2 emissions comes from relentless innovation: Sustainable Energy . All our web pages run on servers powered by carbon-neutral, renewable energy sources, minimizing our reliance on fossil fuels. Optimized Performance . We’ve engineered our platform to be lightweight and efficient, ensuring that every redirect and every page load is fast and eco-friendly. Data-Driven Insights S. We constantly analyze and refine our systems to meet the highest sustainability standards. A Shared Responsibility. ------------------------ Creating a sustainable future is a shared responsibility. By choosing Delivr, you enhance your digital presence and contribute to the global movement to reduce environmental impact. It’s a simple choice with significant implications, and we’re here to guide you every step of the way. Together, we can lead the way in reshaping how businesses and individuals interact with technology. Let’s Build a Greener Future. ----------------------------- The journey toward sustainability doesn’t have to be complicated. With Delivr, you’re making a statement that innovation and environmental responsibility go hand in hand. It’s a straightforward yet impactful step that we continuously work to support. Let us continue to set the standard for sustainable digital experiences. Together, we can ensure that every scan, click, and interaction leaves a lighter footprint on our planet. 48.title: Upgrade your advertising with dynamic QR codes.
48.content: Upgrade your advertising with dynamic QR codes. URL: https://delivr.com/page/780/digital-out-of-home-dooh Title: Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/780/digital-out-of-home-dooh Markdown Content: Dynamic QR codes can be a highly effective addition to your Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) advertising strategy. QR codes drive consumers from the real world to digital experiences and generate traffic to real-world locations. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DOOH offers a variety of screen options, and QR codes enhance each one. Digital billboards but please steer clear of highway billboards Digital screens at bus shelters, train stations, and airports Digital street furniture screens Digital screens in shopping malls, restaurants, resorts, and hotels Gas pump and electric vehicle charging advertising screens Mobile DOOH, trucks, taxi and Uber vehicle car toppers Retail media networks and point-of-sale in retail stores Unlock the full potential of DOOH media with QR codes. QR code use is becoming increasingly popular in digital out-of-home advertising and is expected to become a mainstay of the advertising industry. Boost brand engagement ---------------------- Boost brand engagement and sales by adding interactive elements to your digital out-of-home ads. For example, if you're a sneaker brand, you can display your latest models on the screen and allow passersby to purchase them directly by scanning a QR code. Depending on the number of QR code scans, you can further update the advertisement to show the most popular models. Extend advertising content by leading consumers to a website, landing page or social media ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Effortlessly and immediately extend the reach and impact of your digital or print advertisements. Seamlessly bridge your audience from digital ads to a website, landing page, store, or social media by placing QR codes in your out-of-home advertisements. Sell goods direct from digital ads ---------------------------------- QR codes simplify shopping by allowing instant purchases from digital out-of-home ads. Share special sales and promotions ---------------------------------- Create a sense of urgency and excitement within a digital out-of-home ad. Advertisers can offer limited-time discounts, last-minute flight deals, multi-buy deals, or buy one, get one free offer through a simple QR code scan. Offer feedback channels and surveys for employees, customers, and guests ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Use your digital screens to enhance communication channels and gather valuable feedback from customers, guests, and employees. QR codes effectively allow customers to quickly offer feedback for their visit or experience at a venue. Drive foot traffic to brick-and-mortar locations ------------------------------------------------ Leverage QR codes in digital out-of-home ads to provide location-specific, time-sensitive promotions like "Today" or "This week only" to encourage in-store visits. Provide express check-in ------------------------ Prioritise user convenience with QR codes for express check-in processes. Streamline event registrations, hotel check-ins, or any service that demands efficient and contactless entry. Build loyalty programs ---------------------- Boost your customer loyalty with tailored and innovative loyalty programs that perfectly align with your brand's vision. Engage your customers by prompting them to scan the QR code on the screen, earning a one-time point boost in their reward account. Meanwhile, new users are directed to a separate landing page or app to register, ensuring maximum participation and engagement. Gamify content -------------- Add an element of fun to your digital out-of-home marketing strategy. Gamify your content by creating interactive experiences and engaging audiences with QR codes on DOOH screens. A brand could sponsor a cricket or football match and scan the QR code to poll which team will win, with the results displayed on the advert in real-time. Launch interactive AR experiences --------------------------------- Provide shoppers with immersive and interactive experiences that transport them into a new dimension of engagement and brand interaction. For example, a clothing or cosmetics brand's QR codes in a digital out-of-home ad can launch an AR experience for customers to see or try products virtually, increasing purchase likelihood. Generate quick and easy app downloads ------------------------------------- Simplify the download process for viewers by including a single QR code in your digital out-of-home ads. This QR code will automatically redirect them to either the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, eliminating the need for manual searching and ensuring a seamless onboarding experience. Capture donations ----------------- Empower your audience to make a positive impact while on the go or waiting at transport hubs or shopping malls. Charities can use QR codes in digital out-of-home ads to allow people to contribute to charitable causes safely and conveniently. Benefits of dynamic QR codes in DOOH media. Visually integrated and simple deployment make dynamic QR codes versatile for DOOH campaigns. Dynamic QR codes offer a simplified workflow, ensuring seamless implementation across various digital media. Dynamic QR codes add flexibility, allowing you to change the URL destination in real time. This feature serves as a cost-saving line of defense, especially in the event of an incorrect link or changing calls to action (CTA) in the ad. For agencies & brands. Ideal for brands who want to reach their audiences wherever they are. Implement QR Codes in your out-of-home campaigns, enhancing analytics and reporting for future planning. Delivr's product suite adds another analytics layer, providing comprehensive insights to complement current out-of-home reports. For media owners. Offer QR codes as overlays to existing assets, understand hotspots, and refine pricing strategies based on location and audience engagement. Delivr's analytics help determine essential engagement hotspots and DOOH dayparts enabling more informed media planning. For digital signage software providers. Integrate QR codes into your content management system (CMS) to simplify workflows, increase revenue, and boost engagement. Enjoy the benefits of reduced administration for end users and post-campaign analytics to understand user interactions better. Top 5 best practices for using QR codes in DOOH creative. Are you looking to make the most of your DOOH ad campaign? Don't just slap a code on your creative asset and call it a day. To make sure your QR codes have the desired impact, here are some tips to keep in mind: ➀ Get creative. ------------- QR codes are most effective when used as an extension of the artwork in your DOOH creative rather than an arbitrary addition to its contents. Instead of just placing the code on an otherwise ordinary creative asset, try to find compelling ways to connect it to the imagery in your ad. This tight integration provides conversion opportunities while enhancing the visual impact of your DOOH ad. ➁ Choose the right size. ---------------------- QR codes that are too big or too small can be a problem. To optimize the size of your QR code, consider the screen size and distance from which a person will scan it. A good rule of thumb is to use a 10:1 scanning ratio. ➂ Add a clear call to action. --------------------------- QR codes are all about driving specific actions from your audience. So, include a clear call to action that tells viewers what they can expect when they scan your code. Whether "Shop Now" or "Download the App," a well-crafted call to action can make a big difference. ➃ Placement should not be overlooked. ----------------------------------- Try to position the QR code in such a way that it is clearly visible from various points of the path that your customers are following. Positioning your QR code at eye level or in front of the camera can help your QR code get scanned quickly and easily. ➄ Consider dwell time. -------------------- DOOH ads are often part of a rotating series, meaning your ads may only appear for 15 seconds or less. Choosing locations with a longer dwell time, such as a bus shelter, train station, restaurant, or mall, will help ensure that viewers have repeated exposure to your ad and enough time to interact with your QR code. Additional DOOH resources. 10 best practices to consider when designing QR codes for digital out-of-home creative. Guidelines for designing digital out-of-home creative. Everything you need to create, manage, and track QR codes for DOOH media. THE ALL-IN-ONE PRODUCT SUITE INCLUDES: -------------------------------------- Dynamic QR Code Generator ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Create dynamic QR codes with our QR Code Generator and get the most advanced design, management, and tracking. Personalize your QR code with custom colors, patterns, background images, and brand logos. Managed URL Shortener with Intelligent Link Routing -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Edit the destination of your QR codes anytime, as often as you wish. Use Intelligent Link Routing to deliver content based on the mobile operating system, geolocation, or language. Use Super Simple Serialization to give screens a unique identity. Insights with Real-Time Analytics -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Real-time and post-campaign Reports display everything agencies, brands, and advertisers need to know about audience engagement. Moreover, reports are designed for people, not specialists, allowing anyone to turn insights into action. Mobile-friendly Landing Pages ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Ensure a smooth and responsive user experience. Campaign Management ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Streamline the process of planning, executing, and monitoring campaigns. Real-time and post-campaign reporting with DOOH dayparts. Learn more about our reporting. Image 1: DOOH Daypart Report

49.title: Discover the Power of Serialized QR Codes in Transforming Your Email and Direct Mail Campaigns.
49.content: Discover the Power of Serialized QR Codes in Transforming Your Email and Direct Mail Campaigns. URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1617/discover-the-power-of-serialized-qr-codes-in-transforming-your-email-and-direct-mail-campaigns Title: Discover the Power of Serialized QR Codes in Transforming Your Email and Direct Mail Campaigns. URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1617/discover-the-power-of-serialized-qr-codes-in-transforming-your-email-and-direct-mail-campaigns Markdown Content: Capturing attention and driving engagement in marketing campaigns can be challenging, but it is now more achievable. QR codes provide a versatile solution that creates instant, seamless connections with your audience. Taking that one step further by integrating serialized QR codes into your email and direct mail strategies can enhance your campaigns even further, achieve better results, and foster meaningful interactions. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Why Serialized QR Codes Make Marketing Effortless. -------------------------------------------------- Integrating serialized QR codes into your campaigns enhances the user experience, making it effortless for recipients to take action. Here are several reasons why serialized QR codes are a game-changer: Personalized Experiences. ------------------------- Instead of manually creating and managing thousands or even millions of managed short links or QR codes in your email or direct mail campaigns, consider using Super Simple Serialization by Delivr. This service automates the process, enabling you to generate a serialized link that transmits an anonymized identity to your website or service, directing users to customized landing pages or personalized URLs (PURLs). This level of personalization enhances connections and improves conversion rates without time-consuming manual work, APIs, or the cost of a great number of QR codes. Instant Call-to-Actions. ------------------------ With a simple scan, users can access a webpage, watch a video, or open an app — eliminating the need to type lengthy URLs or navigate multiple steps. This convenience not only saves time and reduces frustration but also enhances the user experience, fostering a sense of empathy towards your audience and often leading to higher engagement. Measurable Insights. -------------------- QR codes offer more than just a quick link; they provide valuable data. As a marketer, you can track scans, monitor the devices used, and see where your audience interacts with your content. This insight enables you to optimize future efforts and gain better control over your campaigns. Direct Marketing and the Power of Personalization. -------------------------------------------------- Direct marketing focuses on creating impactful interactions with the audience. Serialized QR codes enhance this approach, especially when combined with Super Simple Serialization. Personalized Messaging. ----------------------- Marketers can generate unique QR codes or personalized URLs (PURLs) that direct recipients to content specifically tailored for them. For instance, a PURL could link customers to a customized video message or an exclusive discount page. Trackable Engagement. --------------------- Serialization empowers marketers to track which recipients engaged with the campaign, allowing for more targeted follow-up efforts. This control over tracking engagement gives you more control over your campaigns, instilling confidence in your marketing strategies. Seamless Integration. --------------------- Serialized QR codes on direct mail postcards or flyers seamlessly connect the print and digital realms, ensuring a cohesive marketing experience. This seamless integration enhances your campaign’s appeal and makes you feel that your campaigns are meticulously planned and executed. Creative Ways to Use Serialized QR Codes. ----------------------------------------- Serialized QR codes offer endless possibilities for enhancing your marketing strategy. Here are some creative ways to utilize them: Effortless Product Registration. -------------------------------- Serialized QR code eliminates the need to enter or search for a serial number manually. By scanning a serialized QR code, a serial number can be filled in automatically on a registration page. Exclusive Event Access. ----------------------- Include serialized QR codes in email invitations or direct mail pieces that link to RSVP forms or virtual event platforms. This eliminates barriers and encourages more participants to join. Unlock Discounts. ----------------- Place serialized QR codes on postcards, flyers, or emails that direct users to a hidden discount page or a limited-time offer. Using QR codes to add an immediate connection amplifies the sense of urgency. Personalized Product Demos. --------------------------- Allow customers to experience your products through personalized video tutorials or augmented reality (AR) experiences. With just one scan, they can become immersed in your brand story. Loyalty Program Perks. ---------------------- Make loyalty sign-ups or point redemptions seamless by linking QR codes to personalized member portals. This enhances the experience for your customers. Step-by-Step Guide. How to Integrate Serialized QR Codes. --------------------------------------------------------- To effectively incorporate QR codes into your email and direct marketing campaigns, follow these steps: 1. Define Your Campaign Goals . Begin by identifying the purpose of your serialized QR codes. Do you want to drive traffic to your website, collect RSVPs, or offer a special discount? Clear objectives will guide the design and placement of your QR codes. 2. Choose a generator that allows for dynamic, serialized QR codes, which can be updated even after printing. Unlike static QR codes containing fixed data, dynamic QR codes can be modified to redirect to different URLs or display different content, even after they have been printed or distributed. Delivr’s Dynamic QR codes, Intelligent Link Routing, and Super Simple Serialization offer highly customizable options that help assemble a unique experience for each recipient. 3. Design with Care . Ensure that your QR code’s design aligns with your brand identity. Incorporate colors, logos, or custom frames to make it visually appealing while maintaining functionality. 4. Optimize the Destination . The landing page your QR code directs to should be mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and relevant to the campaign. A slow or complicated destination page can deter users from engaging further. 5. Test Across Devices . Before launching your campaign, test your QR codes on multiple devices and operating systems to ensure a seamless user experience. 6. Monitor and Analyze Results . Use analytics to track the performance of your QR codes. Understand how many people are scanning, when, and where. These insights will help you fine-tune your campaigns for better results. Real-Life Examples of QR Code Success. -------------------------------------- Take a look at some brands that have enhanced their marketing campaigns through the use of QR codes: Simplifying Conference RSVPs . A global tech conference experienced a 30% increase in registrations by incorporating serialized QR codes in their email invitations. Using a serialized QR code to respond allowed attendees to RSVP in seconds, making the process easier for busy professionals. Boosting Retail Sales . A fashion retailer sent out postcards with serialized QR codes that provided access to exclusive online sales. As a result, the retailer saw a significant increase in online and in-store purchases. Driving Engagement with Video Content . A financial organization’s email campaigns linked to personalized video modules using serialized QR codes. As a result, click-through rates were boosted, and video completion rates improved. The Hidden Power of QR Codes. Engagement and Conversion. -------------------------------------------------------- QR codes appeal to a broad audience and significantly enhance engagement. Simplicity . Users only need a smartphone — no extra downloads or tools required, making the process incredibly simple and efficient. Speed . Scanning a QR code takes a brief moment, minimizing the delay between your message and the intended action and ensuring a swift and efficient user experience. Surprise and Delight . Creative uses, such as hidden discounts or exclusive behind-the-scenes content, create memorable interactions. How Super Simple Serialization Elevates Direct Marketing. --------------------------------------------------------- Super Simple Serialization ensures that each QR code is unique and trackable, providing several benefits: Enhanced Personalization . Individualized QR codes make recipients feel valued, which leads to higher engagement. Improved Tracking . Marketers can monitor which QR codes are scanned, offering valuable insights into campaign performance. Dynamic Updates . The content linked to the QR code can be modified anytime, even after the codes are printed or digitally distributed. For example, a direct mail campaign with serialized QR codes can direct each recipient to a personalized URL (PURL) with their name and relevant content. This creates a sense of exclusivity and helps build stronger connections with the audience. Sustainability and QR Codes. One often overlooked benefit of QR codes is their positive environmental impact. By digitizing content, you reduce the need for excessive paper and printing. For instance, a restaurant that switched from paper menus to QR code-based digital menus saved costs and improved customer safety during the pandemic. This sustainable approach conserves resources and positions your brand as responsible and forward-thinking, making it more appealing to eco-conscious consumers. Where QR Codes Are Headed Next. ------------------------------- The future of QR codes looks promising. With technological advancements like augmented reality, QR codes will integrate more seamlessly into our daily lives. This innovation and potential for excitement is something to anticipate. Conclusion. ----------- R codes are more than just tools; they are a versatile way to enhance your email and direct mail marketing campaigns. Serialized QR codes enable brands to connect with their audiences like never before by simplifying user journeys, allowing for personalization, and providing actionable insights. Whether through serialized QR codes that lead to tailored experiences, or engaging calls to action, QR codes open the door to a world of possibilities. Are you ready to start experimenting with serialized QR codes? Take the first step today and discover how they can transform your marketing strategy.

Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Legal>DMCA Copyright Policy DMCA Copyright Policy Delivr ("Delivr") has adopted the following general policy toward copyright infringement in accordance with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (https://www.copyright.gov/legislation/dmca.pdf). The address of Delivr's Designated Agent to Receive Notification of Claimed Infringement ("Designated Agent") is listed at the end of this policy. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- With regard to content hosted on Delivr's servers, it is Delivr's policy to (1) block access to or remove material that it believes in good faith to be copyrighted material that has been illegally copied and distributed by any of our advertisers, affiliates, content providers, members or users; and (2) remove and discontinue service to repeat offenders. A. Procedure for Reporting Copyright Infringement: If you believe that material or content residing on or accessible through the Delivr website or services infringes a copyright, please send a notice of copyright infringement containing the following information to the Designated Agent listed below: 1. A physical or electronic signature of a person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright that has been allegedly infringed; 2. Identification of works or materials being infringed; 3. Identification of the material that is claimed to be infringing including information regarding the location of the infringing materials that the copyright owner seeks to have removed, with sufficient detail so that Delivr is capable of finding and verifying its existence; 4. Contact information about the notifier including address, telephone number and, if available, e-mail address; 5. A statement that the notifier has a good faith belief that the material is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; and 6. A statement made under penalty of perjury that the information provided is accurate and the notifying party is authorized to make the complaint on behalf of the copyright owner. B. Once Proper Bona Fide Infringement Notification is Received by the Designated Agent: It is Delivr's policy: 1. to remove or disable access to the infringing material; 2. to notify the content provider, member or user that it has removed or disabled access to the material; and 3. that repeat offenders will have the infringing material removed from the system and that Delivr will terminate such content provider's, member's or user's access to the service. Please contact Delivr's Designated Agent to Receive Notification of Claimed Infringement at support@delivr.com. 56.title: Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability?
56.content: Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1454/does-the-color-of-the-qr-code-affect-its-reliability Title: Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1454/does-the-color-of-the-qr-code-affect-its-reliability Markdown Content: Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? Delivr Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? Does the color of the QR code affect it's reliability? Yes. In a QR code the dark bits are always interpreted as data so the dots always need to be a darker color than the background. The reliability of the QR code is also determined by the contrast difference between the dots and the background, so pale grey dots on a white background will be difficult for some scanning devices to read and the code may not function properly. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Short version: Choose whatever colors you want but always make sure the dots are a significantly darker colour than the background - we suggest at least 70% darker to ensure reliable scanning. ...and always test your QR code to make sure it works using the colors you've chosen.
