81.title: How to build and use campaign parameters (UTMs).
81.content: How to build and use campaign parameters (UTMs). URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1577/how-to-build-and-use-campaign-parameters-utms Title: How to build and use campaign parameters (UTMs). URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1577/how-to-build-and-use-campaign-parameters-utms Markdown Content: Campaign parameters — also called URL or UTM parameters — are tags added to URLs that help track where visitors come from, how they engage, and which actions they take. When paired with analytics tools like Google Analytics — and used alongside QR codes — they make it possible to measure both online and offline campaign performance, understand audience behavior, optimize marketing strategies, and attribute conversions with accuracy. Delivr’s UTM Builder simplifies the process by helping you add essential parameters, while best practices such as testing links, using consistent naming conventions, and shortening URLs ensure clean, reliable tracking and meaningful insights.(Note: application URLs are not supported.) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Purpose of Campaign Parameters Campaign parameters show which channels, campaigns, and specific pieces of content drive the most traffic, engagement, and conversions. Why Combine QR Codes and UTM Parameters? Track effectiveness. See which physical materials or locations drive traffic. Understand behavior. Follow the user journey from the scan to conversions. Optimize campaigns. Compare QR codes in different ads or locations to see which performs best. Avoid guesswork. Instead of assuming which channel brought traffic, you get precise data. Campaign Parameters The following parameters can be added to your Destination URL. It is recommended to always include Campaign Source , Campaign Medium , and Campaign Name when setting up parameters. Best practices: ------------------- Use lowercase letters. Separate words with underscores ( ) or hyphens (-); avoid spaces. Do not include any personally identifiable information (PII) in UTMs, as Google Analytics prohibits it. Campaign Source (Required) ----------------------------- Identify the source that is sending traffic, e.g., flyer , label, packaging, pos , email\ newsletter , instagram . Campaign Medium (Recommended) -------------------------------- Identify the marketing channel type, e.g., qrcode Campaign Name (Recommended) ------------------------------ Identify the name of the campaign, product, promo code, or slogan. Campaign Term (Optional) --------------------------- Identify paid search keywords. Enter {trace} to automatically insert your serialized Trace ID. Campaign Content (Optional) ------------------------------ Differentiate ads, similar content, or SKUs. Need the country of the visitor sent as a dynamic parameter? Enter anywhere in the string and we'll remove it and append at the end of your Campaign Content. For example, If you enter , the value of for a visitor from the United States will be If you enter , the value of for a visitor from the United States will be Campaign ID (Optional) ------------------------- Identify a specific campaign or promotion. Campaign Platform (Optional) ------------------------------- Differentiate your media buying platform or ad network. and are not included in standard Google Analytics 4 reports. To track them, you must create custom dimensions in GA4 that capture their values. Campaign Creative Format (Optional) -------------------------------------- Identify the type of creative. ut m creative format is not currently reported in Google Analytics 4 properties. Campaign Marketing Tactic (Optional) --------------------------------------- Identify the targeting criteria applied to a campaign. utm\ marketing\ tactic is not currently reported in Google Analytics 4 properties. Implementation ------------------ Delivr adds the parameters to the end of your Destination URL as query strings on redirection: Steps to Add Campaign Parameters (Delivr’s UTM Builder) Use this feature to add Campaign (UTM) Parameters to your links. 1. Locate Your Campaign From your Dashboard, find the campaign you want to add parameters to. 2. Open the Campaign Parameters for the Campaign In the campaign’s row, click Configure Campaign Parameters . Alternatively, click the Edit Campaign icon (pencil), then select the Campaign Parameters tab. 3. Enable Parameters For the question “Append Campaign Parameters to Destination URL?” , select Yes . 4. Enter Your Parameters Add the desired campaign parameters in the provided fields. 5. Save Your Changes When finished, click Save or Save & Close at the bottom of the page. Benefits of Using UTM Parameters Track scans to conversions, measure performance, and attribute results accurately. Track the full customer journey. Follow visitors from the moment they scan your QR code to the actions they take on your website. Measure performance. Identify which campaigns, channels, and links drive the most traffic and conversions. Understand audiences. Discover where your visitors come from, what content they engage with, and which offers appeal most. Optimize campaigns. Double down on the strategies that perform best and adjust or retire underperforming ones. Ensure accurate attribution. Confidently assign conversions and sales to the right source, medium, and campaign. UTM Best Practices & Optimization Tips UTM parameters are powerful tools for tracking your campaigns, but following best practices ensures your data is accurate, actionable, and easy to analyze. Use these tips to get the most out of your tracking: 1. Test Your Links and QR Codes After adding UTM parameters, test every link and QR code before publishing. Verify that the URL redirects correctly and that analytics platforms (like Google Analytics) register all parameters. Test across multiple devices and browsers to ensure compatibility. For dynamic parameters (e.g., {trace} or {country}), confirm placeholders populate correctly in live URLs. 2. Maintain Naming Consistency Use lowercase letters for all UTM values to avoid duplicate entries (e.g., email newsletter vs. Email Newsletter). Pick either hyphens (-) or underscores ( ) to separate words, and stick with it across campaigns. Develop standardized conventions for campaign names, sources, mediums, and content, e.g.: Consistency makes reporting cleaner, filtering easier, and comparisons more accurate. 3. Use Dynamic Parameters Where Possible Leverage placeholders like {country}, {trace}, or {campaign id} to automatically capture data relevant to each user or campaign. This reduces manual errors and provides richer analytics insights. 4. Shorten or Mask URLs Long URLs with multiple UTM parameters can appear messy and may reduce QR code readability. Delivr automatically hides these parameters behind your managed short URL, creating a cleaner link and more scannable QR code. 5. Segment and Tag Campaigns Strategically Use or to differentiate between multiple creatives, placements, or offers within a single campaign. This allows you to identify which specific variations perform best. 6. Monitor Parameter Usage Over Time Regularly audit your UTM parameters to ensure naming consistency and relevance. Remove or update obsolete parameters to prevent clutter and maintain clean analytics data. 7. Connect Offline Campaigns Apply UTMs to printed materials, packaging, in-store promotions, or events. Tracking offline engagement this way helps you connect it to online analytics and measure full campaign ROI. 8. Document Everything Maintain a shared document of all active UTMs, naming conventions, and their purpose. Makes onboarding new team members easier and ensures everyone on your team follows the same structure. Third-Party Analytics & Marketing Platforms Any analytics tool that reads URL parameters can use UTMs. The main benefit is consistent attribution across multiple platforms, not just Google Analytics. UTMs are a universal language for tracking campaigns. Most modern analytics platforms can read UTM parameters if they are passed in the URL: Adobe Analytics. Can capture URL parameters, including UTMs, for campaign tracking, though custom setup in report suites may be required. HubSpot. Automatically recognizes UTMs and maps them to campaigns without additional configuration. Marketo. Tracks UTMs for lead and campaign attribution automatically once configured. Salesforce Marketing Cloud. Reads UTM parameters from links to attribute campaigns effectively. Mixpanel. Supports tracking of UTMs via custom URL parameters, which typically need to be defined as custom properties or events. Amplitude. Can track UTMs for campaign and traffic source attribution, usually requiring setup as custom properties or events. Segment. Ingests UTM parameters from URLs and forwards them to downstream analytics tools, often needing definition as custom properties or events. Social Media and Advertising Tools These platforms don’t generate UTMs automatically, but if you append UTMs to your URLs, their analytics can track traffic via Google Analytics or other tools: Facebook Ads Manager. Does not natively create UTMs but recognizes them when added to links, making it useful for GA tracking. LinkedIn Ads, Twitter Ads, TikTok Ads. Similarly, UTMs can be appended to links for campaign tracking. Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, SendGrid, Klaviyo (Email Marketing Tools). Often includes built-in options to add UTM parameters to links automatically. Summary Campaign parameters—also known as UTM tags—are added to URLs to track where visitors come from and how they interact with your content. When paired with analytics tools like Google Analytics, they provide clear insight into campaign performance, audience behavior, optimization opportunities, and conversion attribution. When combined with QR codes, UTMs also make it possible to measure offline activity and engagement in physical environments. Delivr’s UTM Builder simplifies this process by helping you add core parameters (source, medium, campaign name) along with optional fields such as content, term, and campaign ID. Best practices include testing your links, using consistent naming conventions, leveraging dynamic parameters, shortening URLs, and maintaining a documented UTM structure. These steps ensure accurate tracking, cleaner reporting, and smarter marketing decisions across every channel.

Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to change your password while Signed In. Delivr How to change your password while Signed In. How to change your password while Signed In. Your password is the first line of defense against threats to your campaigns, data, and account access. Whether you're updating it for security or organizational compliance, Delivr makes it simple to manage your credentials directly from your dashboard. You’ll be required to update your password at least once every 365 days . If your organization enforces stricter password policies—such as a 90-day reset window—reach out to Support so we can help apply the right settings to your account. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to change your password while Signed In. 1. Go to Your Account Settings ---------------------------------- While signed in, navigate to your Account or Profile Settings page. 2. Open the Password Section -------------------------------- Locate and click the Password or Security option to access your password controls. 3. Enter Your Current Password ---------------------------------- For security purposes, enter your current password when prompted. 4. Create a New Password ---------------------------- Type your new password, then re-enter it to confirm. 5. Save Your Changes ------------------------ Click Save or Update Password to apply your new password settings.. Creating a Stronger Password -------------------------------- Not all passwords are created equal. While attackers often use preloaded lists of common credentials, a well-designed password dramatically reduces risk. Minimum Requirements ------------------------ ✓ Must be at least 15 characters Best Practice Recommendations --------------------------------- ✓ Include at least one lowercase letter ✓ Include at least one uppercase letter ✓ Include at least one number ✓ Include at least one special character (like !, @, or #) For added peace of mind, consult your organization's security guidelines when choosing a new password. What if I forget my password? If you're locked out of your account or can't remember your password: On the Sign In, screen, click " Forgot Password? " Enter your Account Username and follow the on-screen instructions to reset your password via email. Two emails will be sent: The first to confirm the request to reset your password. The second will contain a temporary password. What if I longer have access to the account email? Reach out to our Support team. We’ll work with you to securely verify your identity and restore your access. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to close an account. Delivr How to close an account. How to close an account. If you’re ready to close your Delivr account, we’ve made the process straightforward. Before doing so, we strongly recommend downloading any data you wish to retain, as you’ll lose access to your dashboard, campaigns, and analytics once the account is closed. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to closing an account. Important ------------- Closing your account and cancelling your subscription are the same action. When you close your account, your subscription is automatically cancelled — and vice versa. Download Your Data Before Cancelling. ----------------------------------------- Before finalizing, export any data you want to: Download a list of all your dynamic QR codes: Go to your Dashboard and click the green Export button in the bottom right corner. The exported file includes fields such as Campaign ID, Destination URL, managed Short URL, Campaign Name, Notes, Total Views, and more. For individual campaign data: 1. Open a campaign. 2. Set the date range to All Time . 3. Manually Export relevant report modules. F or detailed scan data: Go to the Audience Heatmap section. Click Export All Connections From This Time Frame to download the data for all views/connections.This includes Date, Time, Type, Action, Method, Accuracy, and Location (which is approximate.) Once your account is closed, your data cannot be recovered . Be sure to export everything you need beforehand. Steps to close your Account (& Cancel your Subscription) ----------------------------------------------------------- 1. Click the Subscription link at the top of your dashboard. 2. Select the Close Account tab. 3. Read the reminder that once your subscription is canceled: Your Dynamic QR Codes will stop working . You will no longer have access to manage or update your codes and analytics. 4. Click the Close My Account button. 5. A confirmation window will appear: 1. Check the box acknowledging: “I understand that by closing my account, I will no longer have access to my account , my campaigns will be deactivated, and my subscription will be canceled.” 2. Enter your reason for leaving . 3. Type your full name to confirm. 4. Click the red Yes, Close My Account button. What Happens Next? ---------------------- After you submit the request: 1. The Delivr team will review your account and reach out with any questions. 2. Your subscription will be canceled. 3. Any remaining active campaigns will be deactivated. 4. Your account will be closed. 84.title: How to create a form.

Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create a form. Delivr How to create a form. How to create a form. Delivr allows you to easily create and manage forms using its Modules system. Attach forms to landing pages or profiles to gather user information, generate leads, enable signups, and more—all with minimal effort. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to create a form. To get started. ------------------- Click the Modules link in the top navigation bar Then click Create Form Forms are reusable modules; you can attach them to multiple pages and profiles. Form Basics --------------- Begin by entering general information: Internal Title. Used for your reference only (not visible to users) Public Title. (Optional) . Displayed above the form Language. Choose the language for field labels and system text Instructions . (Optional) . Add instructions that appear above the form Add Fields -------------- Check the boxes to enable the fields you want to collect. You can include: Contact Fields: Full Name First Name / Last Name Email Phone Company Address (Street, City, State/Prov, ZIP, Country) Optional Fields: Promo Code Date of Birth Age Range (Custom text per range) Gender Message field Add up to 3 consent or agreement checkboxes with custom text Enable bot protection Submit Button & Terms ------------------------- Submit Button Label: Customize the button text (e.g., “Sign Up” or “Get Started”) Button Color: Set the button background color using a HEX code Terms Heading & Content: Display disclaimers or agreements below the button Form Behavior After Submission ---------------------------------- You have four options for what happens after a user submits the form: Option 1 . Display a Success Message --------------------------------------- Add a Title, Subtitle, and Message Optionally add a Button with text and a URL (e.g., “Return to Website”) Option 2 . Display a Scratch Off ----------------------------------- Choose from existing scratch-off modules (or create one) Op tion 3. Display an Offer ------------------------------ Choose from existing offer modules (or create one) Option 4 . Redirect to a URL ------------------------------- Automatically send users to a thank-you page, download link, or another website Note: If a Redirect URL is set, it will override all other success options. Response Settings & Notifications ------------------------------------- Allow Users to Fill In Form Again: Choose how frequently the same user can submit (default is "Never"; note that users can resubmit if they clear browser cookies) Notification Email: Enter one or more email addresses (comma-separated) to receive submissions Delivr does not store form responses on the platform. They are only sent via email. Save Form ------------- Once your form is complete, click the SAVE & CLOSE button. Best Practices Keep forms short to encourage completions Use checkboxes for privacy or marketing consent Set a redirect URL for downloads or next steps Test your form before publishing it on a live page Last Updated 15 Jan 2026 Documentation DOCS By Category Account Management Analytics Campaign Management Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Getting Started Glossary GS1 Digital Link Guides & Best Practices How To Intelligent Link Routing & Management Pages, Profiles & Link-in-Bio Passwords & Security QR Codes & QR Code Generator Subscription Plans & Pricing Super Simple Serialization Team Management & Collaboration Troubleshooting Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Customers Customers Plans & Pricing Plans & Pricing Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Support Support Contact Contact Image 3: Wonderful things start here. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create a page of links with a profile. Delivr How to create a page of links with a profile. How to create a page of links with a profile. Want to create a mobile-friendly, easy-to-scan landing page with links to various destinations—such as your website, social media profiles, product pages, or contact form? Use Delivr’s Profile feature to build a Link-in-Bio–style page with customizable link buttons, contact information, media, and more. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to get started. ➀ To begin: ------------- Click the Options link in the top navigation bar OR Click the subtle three-dot icon (…) just beneath the Start Here URL bar to reveal more campaign types Select Create Profile with vCard This launches the Profile Builder , where you can begin creating your profile. ➁ Create and Save Your Profile -------------------------------- In the Profile Builder, fill out your basic profile details: Profile Type . Person or Company Contact Info . Name, Title, Email, Phone, Website, Address, etc. Branding . Upload cover photo, profile photo Social Links . Add LinkedIn, Instagram, WhatsApp, etc. Optional Modules . Forms, Properties, Galleries, and more Once your profile is complete, click “Save & Close.” ➂ Add Link Buttons to Your Profile ------------------------------------ Once saved, your Profile appears on your Dashboard. To add links: 1. Click the Edit (pencil) icon next to your profile. 2. A new section labeled "Links" will now appear in the editor. 3. Use this section to add button-style links that appear on your live profile page. How Link Buttons Work ------------------------- Each button includes: Button Label . What the visitor sees Button Link . The URL the button leads to Style . Choose between Solid (filled color) or Ghost (outline style) Color . Set HEX code for button color (e.g., #2A3238) Saving Changes to Links --------------------------- Each link row must be saved individually by clicking the blue check circle If you begin editing another row without saving the current one, your changes will be lost After saving all links, click Save & Close to finalize your updates What Can You Link To? ------------------------- Use link buttons to send visitors to: Your online store A digital product or download Appointment booking pages Additional profiles or campaign pages Custom documents or forms Social platforms or messaging tools Why Use Link Buttons on Profiles? Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create a static QR code. Delivr How to create a static QR code. How to create a static QR code. Want a straightforward, easy-to-scan QR Code that links directly to a URL or other fixed data? Static QR Codes are ideal for situations where tracking or editing isn’t needed ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ How to navigate to static QR code options. ---------------------------------------------- To get started: Click the "Options" link in the top navigation bar, OR Click the subtle three-dot icon (…) just below the “Start Here” URL bar to reveal additional campaign types. From there, you’ll see two options: Static QR Standard Design Static QR Custom Design Static QR: Standard Design ------------------------------ This is the fastest and most reliable way to create an ISO-compliant QR Code. An ISO-compliant QR code ensures global interoperability, better readability, and compliance with regulations. By following ISO/IEC 18004 standards, it guarantees consistent performance across platforms, allowing seamless data sharing and dependable scanning on a wide variety of devices and systems. It’s advised for regulated industries, long-term labeling, or any situation where universal scanability is crucial. Key Features: Data Types Supported. URL, Text, Email, Phone, SMS, Wi-Fi, Event, Bitcoin Error Correction Levels. L (Low), M (Medium), Q (25% – default), H (High) Margin . Default is 4 blocks (customizable) Scale . Default is 3× (customizable) Color Options. Custom code and background colors using HEX values Contrast Checker.: Ensures your color choices meet the minimum 4:1 contrast ratio for scan reliability Download Formats: EPS, SVG, PDF, PNG, JPG, TIFF Note: Static QR Codes are not editable or trackable once created. The encoded data is permanent. Static QR: Custom Design ---------------------------- Want a QR Code that visually reflects your brand? Our Custom Design tool offers extensive creative control—but keep in mind that these QR Codes are not ISO-compliant. Customizations like unique eye shapes, pixel effects, and embedded logos prioritize aesthetics over strict technical standards, making them ideal for marketing and brand-driven use cases. Customization Options Include: Data Types Supported . URL, Text, Email, Phone, SMS, Wi-Fi, Event, Bitcoin, WhatsApp, PayPal, Skype, Zoom Color Palette . Custom background and code colors Design Style . Modify pixel style, eye/corner shapes Logo Upload . Add a logo or icon at the center Frames .Include a call-to-action frame such as “Scan Me” Set Options . Adjust margins, scale, error correction, and contrast Static vs. Dynamic QR codes ------------------------------- Feature Static QR Code Dynamic QR Code Editable After Creation ❌ No✅ Yes Trackable Scans ❌ No✅ Yes URL Shortening ❌ No✅ Yes (via Delivr) Compliance ✅ Yes (Standard Only)✅ Yes Best For Print, packaging, offline materials Campaigns, analytics, flexible routing Why Choose Static QR Codes? ------------------------------- The data is directly embedded at the time of creation, no hosting or subscriptions required. Doesn’t depend on any cloud platform to work—just scan and go. Unlike other platforms that only support dynamic QR codes, Delivr gives you the freedom to create both static and dynamic codes , so you can choose the best tool for each use case. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create a URL-based Campaign with dynamic QR Code. Delivr How to create a URL-based Campaign with dynamic QR Code. How to create a URL-based Campaign with dynamic QR Code. Create dynamic QR codes in just a few steps. With Delivr, it's fast and simple to build a dynamic QR code that you can update anytime. Change your destination URL, track scans in real time, and manage campaigns—all without ever reprinting a thing. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to create a Campaign with dynamic QR Code. ------------------------------------------------ ➀ Start at Your Dashboard ----------------------- ➁ Enter Your URL -------------- At START HERE field on your Dashboard, paste the destination URL you'd like your Campaign and QR code to point to. ➂ Click Generate -------------- Delivr will create a campaign with a managed Short URL and dynamic, customizable QR code. ➃ Label Your Campaign ------------------- Add a campaign name, notes, and relevant tags or groups to keep your campaign organized and easy to manage. You can download or customize your QR code at any time. ➄ Click Save & Close ------------------ This finalizes your Campaign. You’ll be redirected back to the Dashboard, where your new campaign appears. Where can I find my QR code? ---------------------------- Once your Campaign is saved, it will appear on your Dashboard. In the Campaign row, click the Download & Customize QR Code icon to access design options and download your QR code in various formats. Can I edit or update my Campaign later? --------------------------------------- Yes! Delivr’s QR codes are dynamic, meaning you can update them at any time. Steps to Edit or Update a Campaign ---------------------------------- 1. Locate your Campaign ----------------------- From your Dashboard , locate the campaign you want to update. 2. Click Edit ------------- In the row for the campaign, click the Edit icon and make your changes. Update the Destination URL Edit the Campaign Name, Notes, Tags, and Groups Enable or adjust other advanced features 3. Save your Changes -------------------- When you have completed making all the changes, click the green SAVE or SAVE & CLOSE buttons located at the bottom of the page. Do I need to reprint my QR code after editing? ---------------------------------------------- No. Because Delivr QR codes are dynamic, any changes you make are applied on the backend. Your existing printed or shared QR code will continue to function and now reflect the updated content. How can we help you? -------------------- If you need assistance creating or editing your campaign and QR code, please contact our support team, and we’ll be happy to assist. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create and edit a page. Delivr How to create and edit a page. How to create and edit a page. Want to create a high-impact mobile landing experience? Delivr Pages are built for just that. These mobile-first, brandable landing pages can be instantly launched via Short URL or QR Code—no app required. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to create a page. ----------------------- ➀ Access the Page Builder ----------------------- 1. Click the Options link in the top navigation bar. 2. Or click the subtle three-dot icon (…) just beneath the Start Here URL bar to reveal additional campaign types. ➁ Create Page ----------- Select Create Page to launch the Page Builder. To begin creating a Page, use either navigation method: ➂ Customize Page -------------- 1. Select Create Page to launch the Page Builder. 2. Enter content. Once your page is complete, click the SAVE & CLOSE button. What You Can Customize in a Page -------------------------------- Your page is divided into several powerful tabs , giving you total control over its content, visuals, interactivity, and metadata: Basics ------ Add a title, subtitle, logo, main content, CTA button, and social media links. Customize text and link colors, add footer copy, and control the page’s visual styling. Banner ------ Create a striking banner section with: Banner Headline and Subhead with alignment controls Banner Button Banner Background Color & Gradients. Banner Image with optional effects like grayscale or blur Accepted file types: gif, jpg, png. Maximum file size: 10MB. Recommended width: 750px x 1000px Download template Banner Clipping Shape Banner Video Accepted file type: mp4. Maximum file size: 1MB. Recommended size: 750px x 1000px, 375px x 500px Please note that when a banner video is set, the banner image, when also set, will be used as the poster image. The poster image is shown while the banner video is downloading. All banner features such as colors, gradients, grayscale, blur, etc. will not be used for the banner video or poster image. Modules ------- Enhance your page with additional interactive blocks: Shopify/PayPal buttons Forms, Offers , Scratch Offs , and Galleries These elements increase engagement and are placed automatically in strategic positions on the page. Places ------ Use this tab to map the physical location of your campaign’s media. Add one or more markers or groups for precise geolocation insights, supporting hyperlocal performance analysis. Metadata -------- Add key campaign details to support performance tracking and analytics, including: Source & medium Campaign period and timezone PDF uploads for campaign creative Estimated audience size Product Info ------------ Designed for product-specific campaigns, this section lets you define identifiers (like GTINs, SKU, UPC, etc.), dates (like sell-by, expiration), origin/destination, and pricing info. Services -------- Interested in anti-counterfeit and product authentication services? Delivr’s TrueMrk® can be enabled to enhance consumer trust and brand security. Editing a Page -------------- To make changes to an existing Page: 1. Find the Page campaign on your Dashboard. 2. Click the Edit (pencil) icon. 3. Update any content or settings. 4. Click Save & Close to apply updates. Tips ---- Delivr Pages work beautifully for product showcases, limited-time promos, virtual event hubs, and more. Each Page is responsive, trackable, and QR-code ready. 89.title: How to create and edit a profile.
89.content: How to create and edit a profile. URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1608/how-to-create-and-edit-a-profile Title: How to create and edit a profile. URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1608/how-to-create-and-edit-a-profile Markdown Content: Create a sleek, dual-purpose digital business card optimized for mobile use. With Delivr’s Profile feature, you can craft a profile that functions as a personalized bio page. This digital solution emphasizes your brand and links — perfect for networking, sales, or personal branding. It features a clean, tap-friendly design displaying your photo, contact information, and a curated list of links to your website, social profiles, calendar, and more. Instantly shareable via QR code or link, it offers a smart, professional way to connect and stay connected—no app needed. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to get started with a profile. To begin creating a Profile, use either navigation method: 1. Click the "Options" link in the top navigation bar. 2. Or click the subtle three-dot icon (…) just beneath the Start Here URL bar to reveal additional campaign types. 3. Select “Create Profile with vCard” to launch the Page Builder. Basics Profile Type ---------------- Choose Person if you're representing yourself as an individual. This profile type is designed for individuals and typically includes a profile photo (often a headshot), a brief bio or summary, and contact information. It's commonly used for networking, building a personal brand, or engaging in social and professional interactions. Ideal for platforms such as LinkedIn, Facebook, or Instagram. Choose Company if you're setting up a business or organizational presence. This profile is meant for organizations, businesses, or institutions . It represents a brand or legal entity and is typically managed by one or more individuals on behalf of the company. Ideal for business listings, company pages on platforms like LinkedIn and Facebook, B2B networks, job posting accounts, and for use in marketing, advertising, or sales-related activities. Profile Display ------------------- Web Page with vCard Choosing this option provides a hosted landing page featuring your bio, contact details, vCard download, and any additional content you’d like to share. vCard Direct Download Only Skip the landing page, this option instantly delivers your vCard for quick and easy contact saving. Add Contact Information --------------------------- Add data that will appear on your public profile and in the downloadable vCard: Name & Business Title Company Name Address (Street, City, ZIP, Country) Work & Mobile Phone Fax Email (choose between a secure form or mailto link) Website URL, Skype Time Zone Contact Icons Color: Anthracite or Custom Contact details can be enabled or disabled. Enabling Contact Options displays action buttons like “Call Mobile”, “Send Email”, and “Download vCard”. Disabled, your contact details will be hidden. Media & Branding -------------------- Upload Cover Photo (max 5MB, 1080px wide recommended) Upload Profile Photo (square, 1080×1080px) Media Block URL : Embed content from YouTube, Vimeo, Instagram, SoundCloud, and others Social & Communication Links -------------------------------- Support for major platforms, including: LinkedIn Facebook, Instagram, 𝕏 WhatsApp, Discord, Line YouTube, TikTok, Twitch Calendar Integrations Icon Colors. Brand Colors or Custom Colors Links Section ----------------- Once your profile is saved, the Links section becomes available for editing. This feature is designed to consolidate multiple links into a single, easy-to-access landing page, ideal for social media bios that typically allow only one link. It’s especially valuable for creators, professionals, brands, and teams who want to organize and share multiple destinations, such as websites, booking pages, Shopify storefronts, product pages, downloads, portfolios, and more—all in one convenient, shareable place. These links appear as tappable buttons beneath your media and contact details, providing your audience with clear, direct pathways to explore your online presence or offerings . What a Link Button Includes. -------------------------------- Each button is made up of the following elements: Button Label. The label that appears on the button. Button Link . The link the button will take users to when clicked. Color . Choose a custom color to match your brand or visual style. Style . Select between two presentation styles: A filled button with bold presence. An outlined button for a lighter, minimal look. How to Save Link Changes ---------------------------- Links are managed individually by row. When editing or adding a link: Each row must be saved individually by clicking the green check icon. After editing a row, save it before making changes to the next. If you switch to another row without saving, your changes will be lost. You can use as many links as needed to create a complete, functional link hub. Modules Tab Form -------- Attach a form to appear below your profile content. Choose from existing forms or [create a new one]. Enables lead capture or direct contact. Property ------------ Display a featured Property above your profile content. Ideal for real estate or showcasing locations. Select from existing properties or [create a new property]. Places Tab Campaign Location . Map your campaign to a real-world location to track geographic engagement. Marker Groups. Use Marker Groups to organize campaigns by physical locations. Metadata Tab Campaign Details -------------------- Use this section to define campaign metadata and reporting options: Campaign Medium . Type of advertising (e.g., print, display) Campaign Source. Website, channel, or publication Job #, Ad #, Web ID Merchandise Description Campaign Audience & Timing ------------------------------ Estimated Audience Size . For calculating response rates. Campaign Period . Set start and/or end dates. Campaign Time Zone. Use global or custom setting. Campaign Creative --------------------- Upload a PDF (max 10MB) of your creative asset for documentation. How to edit a profile. To make changes to an existing profile: 1. Find the Profile campaign on your Dashboard. 2. Click the Edit (pencil) icon 3. Update fields, design, or metadata as needed. 4. Click Save & Close to apply updates. Pro Tip Use Delivr Profiles to create consistent, branded contact pages across your team or business. Attach forms, link media, and map engagement with powerful campaign tools—all in one profile.

Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create and manage a GS1 Digital Link QR code. Delivr How to create and manage a GS1 Digital Link QR code. How to create and manage a GS1 Digital Link QR code. GS1 Digital Link allows a single GS1-compliant QR code to connect packaging to product information, traceability data, and consumer experiences. With Delivr, you can create and manage GS1 Digital Links directly from your dashboard—keeping compliance, analytics, and routing in one place. Delivr allows you to convert an existing campaign into a GS1-compliant Digital Link directly from your dashboard. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to create an account. --------------------------- ➀ Access the GS1 Digital Link Option ---------------------------------- After logging in: 1. Go to your Dashboard and create a new campaign 2. Or alternatively, locate the existing campaign you want to use 3. Under Actions , click the GS1 blue button This opens the GS1 Digital Link management view for that campaign. ➁ Set Up Your GS1-compliant Digital Link & Code --------------------------------------------- Once inside the GS1 view, you can generate a GS1-compliant Digital Link using one of two options: Simple or Extended . Simple (GTIN only) ------------------ Use this option when you only need a basic GS1 Digital Link. Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) Identifier: /01/ Example: 44444444444442 Required for all GS1 Digital Links This creates a compliant Digital Link and QR code using the GTIN alone. Extended (GTIN + qualifiers + attributes) ----------------------------------------- Use this option when you need product-level specificity or additional data. Key Qualifiers (optional): -------------------------- Consumer Product Variant /22/ Up to 20 characters Batch or Lot Number /10/ Up to 20 characters Serial Number /21/ Up to 20 characters Standard & Custom Attributes (optional): ---------------------------------------- Added as query parameters Enter as a query string Reserved characters must be percent-encoded Example: Up to 255 characters Extended mode allows you to build a richer GS1 Digital Link while maintaining compliance. ➂ Generate and Download your Digital Link QR Code ----------------------------------------------- Once saved, Delivr generates your GS1 Digital Link URL and QR code , for example: You can download the QR code in multiple formats: Vector formats (for packaging and print) Raster formats (for digital and general use) Important usage notes. ---------------------- The consumer-facing Destination URL can be updated dynamically Any changes to the GTIN, key qualifiers, or attributes require generating and using a new QR code The GTIN and key qualifiers are passed to: Delivr Analytics The Destination URL Standard and custom attributes are not passed to analytics or the destination URL Navigation options. ------------------- At the top-right of the GS1 Digital Link page, you’ll find: GS1 — view and manage all GS1 Digital Links Dashboard — return to your campaign list Alternatively, you can access all your GS1 Digital Link campaigns on the dashboard under the Digital Links tab. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create multiple dynamic campaigns. Delivr How to create multiple dynamic campaigns. How to create multiple dynamic campaigns. Need to set up multiple dynamic campaigns simultaneously? Delivr’s bulk creation tool makes it easy by allowing you to upload all your campaign details through a spreadsheet. It’s the ideal solution for managing large-scale marketing campaigns, events, or multi-location operations rollouts—saving you time and effort. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to create create campaigns with dynamic QR codes in bulk. 1. From your Dashboard , look at the right-hand side of the screen. 2. Click the BULK CREATE button. 3. Download the spreadsheet template (.xlsx) provided on the Bulk Create page. 4. In the first column, enter one Destination URL per row — up to a maximum of 100 URLs (or higher depending on your plan). 5. (Optional) Fill in the remaining columns with a Campaign Name , Campaign Notes , and Campaign Parameters . 6. Save your completed template. 7. Upload the template on the Bulk Create page. 8. Review the imported URLs for accuracy. If any corrections are needed, update your spreadsheet and reupload. 9. Assign the campaigns to a Campaign Group if desired. 10. Click Import to finalize the creation of your campaigns. Things to Keep in Mind -------------------------- Only Dynamic Campaigns can be created in bulk using this method. Each URL entered will generate its own unique Dynamic QR Code. Make sure your spreadsheet matches the provided template format to avoid upload errors. Pro Tip ----------- Use descriptive campaign names and notes when creating campaigns in bulk. This will make managing and reporting on them much easier later. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to create multiple static QR codes. Delivr How to create multiple static QR codes. How to create multiple static QR codes. Need to generate dozens of Static QR Codes quickly? The Bulk Static QR Code Generator makes it easy to convert multiple URLs or text strings into QR Codes—all at once. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to access the bulk static QR code generator. ---------------------------------------------------- To get started: Click the Options link in the top navigation bar OR Click the subtle three-dot icon (…) just beneath the Start Here URL bar to reveal additional campaign types Then select ,Bulk Static QR. How It Works ---------------- This tool allows you to import a list of URLs or text entries and download a ZIP file that includes: Individual Static QR Code images for each entry A corresponding CSV file with original data for easy reference All image files named to match their row in the CSV Reminder: Static QR Codes are not editable, trackable, or manageable after creation. For editable, dynamic QR Codes with analytics, return to the Dashboard. Steps to generate multiple static QR codes. ----------------------------------------------- 1. Download the Spreadsheet Template (.xlsx) Use the provided file format to ensure compatibility. 2. Enter Your Data Add one URL or text string per row in the first column (up to 100 rows) Optionally, include notes in the second column Save your file 3. Upload Your File Choose your saved spreadsheet file and upload it.Once uploaded, you'll be guided to Steps 4–6. 4. Review Entries If anything looks incorrect, go back to your spreadsheet, fix the issues, and reupload. 5. Customize QR Code Appearance Image Format:. SVG, PDF, EPS, PNG, JPEG, TIFF Error Correction. L (Low), M (Medium), Q (25% – default), H (High) Margin . 4 blocks (default) Scale . 3× (default) Code Color / Background Color. Set custom HEX values Contrast Checker. Ensures the code remains scannable (target ratio: 4:1 or higher) A sample preview QR Code will appear to demonstrate your selected design settings. This is not one of your final codes and should not be used or distributed. 6. Export the Codes Click the Export button. A compressed ZIP file will download containing: One QR Code image per row A CSV summary of your input data Why use static QR codes? ---------------------------- The data is directly embedded at the time of creation; no hosting or subscriptions are required. Doesn’t depend on any cloud platform to work—scan and go. Unlike other platforms that only support dynamic QR codes, Delivr gives you the freedom to create both static and dynamic codes , so you can choose the best tool for each use case. Once your campaign is set up in Delivr, downloading your QR code is fast and convenient. You can export it in various formats to fit both print and digital uses. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to download a QR code. ➀ Locate your Campaign ------------------------ In your Dashboard, locate the campaign you'd like to download the QR code for. ➁ Click the "Download & Customize Dynamic QR Code" Icon ----------------------------------------------------------- In the campaign row, click the blue square icon labeled "Download & Customize Dynamic QR Code." ➂ Choose Your Format ---------------------- You’ll be able to download the QR code in various file formats based on your needs. Vector Formats Perfect for high-resolution printing and scalable graphics. Vector files are recommended for professional printing because they can be resized infinitely without losing quality. EPS SVG PDF Raster Formats Ideal for digital and standard printing. Unlike vector files, raster graphics depend on resolution and may become blurry when scaled up. PNG JPG TIFF Need Help? If you have any questions about file types or usage, contact Delivr Support and we’ll help you get the right format for your needs. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to edit a dynamic QR code. Delivr How to edit a dynamic QR code. How to edit a dynamic QR code. Update Your QR Code Anytime—No Reprints Needed. Need to make changes after your QR code is already in use? With Delivr, you can easily update key campaign settings—like the destination URL—without generating or reprinting a new code. Changes take effect instantly and apply seamlessly to your existing QR code. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to edit a dynamic QR code. ➀ Locate your QR Code ----------------------- From your Dashboard, locate the campaign that contains the QR code you want to update. ➁ Click Edit -------------- In the row for the campaign, click the Edit icon and make your changes. Update the Destination URL Edit the Campaign Name, Notes, Tags, and Groups Enable or adjust other advanced features ➂ Save your Changes --------------------- When you have completed making all the changes, click the green Save or Save & Close buttons located at the bottom of the page. Do I need to reprint my QR code after editing? No. Because Delivr QR codes are dynamic, any changes you make are applied on the backend. Your existing printed or shared QR code will continue to function and now reflect the updated content. Can I undo a change? Delivr does not support version history or undo. If you need to revert a change, simply re-enter the previous information and save again. For best practices, keep a record of original settings before making major updates. Need help making changes? Our support team is happy to walk you through edits or offer best practices for campaign updates. Contact support anytime. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to manage and organize campaigns. Delivr How to manage and organize campaigns. How to manage and organize campaigns. Using Labels, Groups, Tags, Stars, Workspaces, and UTMs in Delivr. Delivr helps you keep campaigns and QR codes effortlessly organized—making them easier to locate, manage, and analyze. Labels, Groups, Tags, Stars, Workspaces, and UTM Parameters all work together to give you clarity and control. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Labels Campaign Titles & Notes -------------------------------- Think of labels as your campaign’s internal name tag —a quick visual cue for identifying what a campaign is about without opening it. Identify and classify campaigns for internal reference. Add descriptive campaign titles and notes so you and your team can see the purpose at a glance. Labels don’t affect QR code functionality, but they improve filtering and reporting. Groups Folder-Style Organization ---------------------------------- Groups are like folders for your campaigns, making it easy to manage related items together. Keep multiple campaigns organized under a single heading. Group campaigns by shared purpose or placement (e.g., posters, product SKUs, publications). Tags Flexible Classification ------------------------------ Tags are keywords or phrases you assign to campaigns for extra filtering and searching power. Classify and locate campaigns with keywords. Add tags when creating a campaign or later under the Campaign Labels section. Use them alongside—or instead of—Groups for flexible organization. Stars & Workspaces Prioritize at a Glance ------------------------------------------- Stars ----- Stars are color-coded markers (e.g., red urgent, yellow review, green live, purple needs update) are used to highlight priority Campaigns and Groups. Applied independently—starring a Group doesn’t star its Campaigns and vice versa. Starred items are automatically added to the corresponding Workspace based on their star color. Highlight campaigns by importance, status, or task. Stars are color-coded. Starred items appear in a Workspace, a collection of starred campaigns and groups for quick access and collaboration. Independent Starring ------------------------ Starring is flexible and non-hierarchical: Tagging a Campaign with a star does not change the star on its Group. A Group can have Campaigns with mixed star colors. Assigning a star to a Group does not override the stars on the Campaigns inside. Example: If you tag five Campaigns with a green star and place them in a Group with a purple star, the Campaigns keep their green stars. Workspaces ---------- Centralized dashboards that automatically organize Campaigns and Campaign Groups by star color, making priority items easy to access and manage. Ideal for organizing by team, goal, task, or custom purpose. Unstaring instantly removes items without affecting the originals. Add notes for goals, roles, or status, and keep them private to Owners/Admins and Contributors. Campaign Parameters (UTMs) Track the Full Journey --------------------------------------------------- UTM parameters are tags you add to a campaign’s destination URL to track where visitors come from and how they interact with your content. Measure campaign performance in tools like Google Analytics, attribute conversions accurately, and connect QR code scans to real-world campaign results. Append UTMs to URLs to capture traffic data by source , medium , campaign name , or custom tracking values. Pro Tip ------- Combine these tools for maximum clarity and insight. Example. Put all product launch campaigns into a Group, tag them green for marketing initiatives, set the top priorities for your Workspace, and add UTM parameters to track performance in your analytics platform. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to open an account. Delivr How to open an account. How to open an account. Creating a Delivr account is fast and simple. In just moments, you’ll have access to everything you need to create, manage, and track your QR codes and short URLs—all from one intuitive platform. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Steps to create an account. --------------------------- ➀ Go to the Delivr Registration Page ---------------------------------- Navigate to delivr.com and click the REGISTER button in the top navigation. The direct link is https://delivr.com/plans ➁ Choose Your Plan ---------------- Select the plan that best suits your needs. We offer 6 plans for all size businesses. On the page a detailed Plan Comparison Chart and Plan FAQ is available. ➂ Fill Out Your Account Details ----------------------------- Complete the registration form by entering the following required fields: Username Password Your Name Email Address Time Zone Verification (e.g., CLOUDFLARE CAPTCHA) ➃ Click Create Account -------------------- Once all fields are filled out correctly, click the CREATE ACCOUNT button to submit your information. By creating a Delivr account, you’re agreeing to our Terms of Serviceand Privacy Notice. ➄ Verify Your Email ----------------- Check your inbox for a verification email from Delivr. Click the verification link to confirm your email and activate your account.You must verify your email address to avoid account suspension. What happens after email verification? -------------------------------------- Once your email is verified, your account will be fully active and ready to use. You can now: Create and manage QR code campaigns Access analytics and reporting tools Set up features like geotargeting, Places, and more How can we help you? -------------------- If you encounter any issues during registration or email verification, please contact our support team, and we’ll be happy to assist. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to restore an archived campaign. Delivr How to restore an archived campaign. How to restore an archived campaign. Restore Archived Campaigns Anytime. Need to bring back a previously archived campaign? With Delivr, you can restore archived campaigns at any time—instantly returning them to full functionality while preserving all historical data and performance reports. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Steps to restore an archived a campaign. ➀ Go to the Archive Section ----------------------------- At the top of your Dashboard, click the Archive link located with the main navigation links. ➁ Locate the Campaign to Restore ---------------------------------- Browse or search the list of archived campaigns and locate the one you’d like to reactivate. ➂ 3. Click “Restore Campaign” ------------------------------- Click the Restore Campaign icon. The campaign will instantly return to your Dashboard and regain full functionality. ➃ Confirm the deletion. ------------------------- This action is permanent and cannot be undone. What Happens When You Restore a Campaign? The campaign is moved from the Archive back to your Dashboard . Redirects and tracking automatically resume. All settings, data, and historical reports remain intact. You can edit, manage, and share the campaign just like before. Pro Tip Restoring a campaign counts toward your active campaign limit. ------------------------------------------------------------------ Before restoring, ensure you haven’t reached your active campaign quota. If your quota is full, you’ll need to archive or delete another campaign first — or upgrade your plan to increase your limit. Data Policy Home>Documentation>How to search for a campaign. Delivr How to search for a campaign. How to search for a campaign. When you have multiple campaigns running, finding the one you need quickly is essential. Delivr’s search and filter tools make it easy to find campaigns by key details, whether they’re active or archived. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ How to locate a campaign with Search. You can search by a variety of criteria, including: Campaign ID Destination URL Campaign Name Campaign Notes Campaign Tags Page Title Campaign Parameters Steps to search for an active Campaign. 1. Scroll down to the Search Active Campaigns section. 2. Enter your keyword, identifier, or any full or partial text from your campaign name, notes, or Destination URL into the search field. 3. Then, click the Search button to find matching campaigns. Alternative Search Option ----------------------------- You can also search using the Search tab located towards the top of your Dashboard . This allows you to quickly find campaigns without scrolling. Steps to search for an archived Campaign. Can’t find a campaign in your active list? 1. Go to your Campaign Archive. 2. Enter your search criteria in the Search Archived Campaigns field at the top of the archive page. 3. Click Search and browse the results. Filtering by Campaign Type ------------------------------ You can narrow your search results by selecting a specific campaign type: Direct links to websites or online destinations. Delivr-created landing or interstitial pages. Branded profile pages created in your account. Tip: Using specific keywords such as a unique tag, an exact campaign ID, or part of the destination URL will help you locate campaigns more quickly. The 3 Steps of our QR Code Tracking Process Explained. ------------------------------------------------------ ➀ Provision & Distribute ---------------------- Create a campaign in Delivr. Download the QR code generated for that campaign. Place the QR code on your chosen media—such as ads, stickers, product packaging, posters, publications, billboards, or anywhere you would normally include a URL. ➁ Track & Deliver --------------- A consumer sees the QR code and scans it using any smartphone with a built-in or third-party QR code reader. Scan data is securely sent to Delivr’s tracking servers. The consumer’s mobile web browser instantly opens your campaign landing page or experience. ➂ Process & Report ---------------- Delivr processes each scan in real time. Campaign results are stored and reported through the Delivr dashboard, giving you immediate insight into performance and engagement. 102.title: In a world obsessed with data, we chose privacy.
102.content: In a world obsessed with data, we chose privacy. URL: https://delivr.com/page/790/hush-privacy-first-zero-knowledge Title: Hush. Privacy-first analytics for QR codes & connected experiences. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/790/hush-privacy-first-zero-knowledge Markdown Content: At Delivr, privacy goes beyond compliance — it’s the foundation of our platform, shaping how we build, operate, and innovate with a zero-knowledge-by-design approach. Hush℠ ensures every scan is anonymous, secure, and compliant — delivering true zero-knowledge protection, transparent processes, and enterprise-grade reliability for brands that lead with integrity. This is privacy-first analytics in action. Hush℠ sets a new standard for QR codes and connected experiences — no cookies, no tracking IDs, no shadow analytics. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Drive engagement. Gain insights. Protect privacy at every step. --------------------------------------------------------------- Most marketing and analytics platforms collect, track, and profile users — creating risk for brands and eroding consumer trust. Delivr takes a different approach, setting a new standard in privacy. Our privacy-first, zero-knowledge architecture gives brands vital insights from QR codes, links, and connected experiences — without compromising personal data, identities, or consumer trust. Zero-Knowledge by Design — No Personal Tracking ----------------------------------------------- Designed to minimize data collection, Delivr assures brands that they deliver experiences that comply with strict privacy standards from day one. Every scan, click, and visit remains anonymous: No personally identifiable information (PII) is collected or stored. No cookies, fingerprinting, or cross-campaign tracking. IP addresses are anonymized prior to storage. No behavioral profiles, retargeting, or look-alike modeling. GDPR-compliant, CCPA-compliant, and global privacy-aligned architecture. Provide your audience with transparency and value — while respecting their privacy. This commitment to privacy forms the basis for truly actionable insights. How Hush℠ Works --------------- Every interaction follows a closed-loop model. Anonymous in, anonymous out, while still giving you the analytics you need to improve. Image 1 Actionable Insights — Without Compromise ---------------------------------------- Data that drives decisions — not risk.Brands need analytics that respect privacy. Delivr proves brands can access vital insights without invasive practices, maintaining performance and upholding ethical standards.Delivr delivers privacy-safe insights, enabling brands to optimize performance with ethical, compliant data — no surveillance or overreach. Gain visibility into: Timestamp . Understand time-based engagement trends. Campaign ID . Attribute scans and clicks to a specific managed QR or short link for insights into campaign and channel performance. Approximate Location . Understand engagement location and delivr localized experiences. Anonymized by default, GPS optional via opt-in. Type of Device, OS & Browser . Technical insight into device patterns. Device Language . Deliver language-specific experiences. No individual tracking. No identity stitching. No shadow profiles. Receive accurate, ethical, decision-ready data for your organization. This strong security foundation is central to protecting user trust. Security That Strengthens Privacy --------------------------------- Because Delivr does not store sensitive user identifiers, you benefit from less data to secure and nothing exploitable. Our infrastructure includes: Encryption Everywhere . Encryption in transit and at rest. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2/1.3 in transit. Data Minimization . Only essential metrics are collected, nothing more. Self-Destructing Analytics . Strict retention periods automatically erase old data. Zero AI Usage . We never use AI or machine learning on your analytics data. Enterprise-Grade Security . Continuous monitoring with enterprise-grade availability and reliability. Control without compromise . Your reports are private by default, you share only what you choose when you choose, and you can delete your data anytime — instantly and permanently. Combining security and zero-knowledge principles, Delivr mitigates risk, helping your brand meet marketing and compliance obligations with confidence. This positions Delivr as an ideal choice for brands that value trust. Built for Brands That Value Trust --------------------------------- Delivr empowers organizations to protect users, strengthen brand reputation, and meet ethical data expectations in today's market. Ideal for brands that prioritize: Regulatory alignment and governance Consumer trust and transparency Ethical analytics and data minimization Privacy-centric digital experiences When privacy is prioritized, engagement rises, and trust grows. This is the value of privacy-first analytics in real business environments.

Delivr I changed my campaigns Destination URL but when scanned it still brings me to the old destination. Why? I changed my campaigns Destination URL but when scanned it still brings me to the old destination. Why? There are two reasons this can occur: ------------------------------------- 1. The old Destination URL is stuck in your phone's web browser or QR Code Reader app cache. Clear that cache/history and then try again or try using a different reader or different phone. 2. The code you are scanning might not be the code that you changed the Destination URL for. You can check this by using a QR Code Reader app that allows viewing of the Campaign Short URL embedded in the QR Code. If you can see the short URL, you can compare the Delivr Campaign ID contained in the short URL with the Delivr ID for the code under your account that you changed the Destination URL for. If your Delivr Account is disabled, locked, or not active. Learn what to do if you can’t sign in to your Delivr Account or Delivr services because your account is disabled,locked, or not active. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- If your account has been disabled for security reasons. ------------------------------------------------------- If you see the following message, your account is locked automatically to protect your security and you can’t sign in and use any services. Sign-in for this account is temporarily disabled. Reset your password or contact Delivr Support to regain access. Sign-in for this account is temporarily disabled. Reset your password or contact Delivr Support to regain access. This can occur when your password or other account information is entered incorrectly multiple times, whether in a single sign-in attempt or across several sessions. To regain access, please reset your password. If your account is locked or not active. ---------------------------------------- If you see the following message, your account is disabled or deactivated. To reactivate this account, contact Delivr Support. To reactivate this account, contact Delivr Support. This might happen if you account was deactivated, closed, 90-day free trial expired, or your subscription has ended. If your account is locked, you can request access by contacting support. Data Policy Home>Documentation>I’m near my plan’s campaign limit; what can I do? Delivr I’m near my plan’s campaign limit; what can I do? I’m near my plan’s campaign limit; what can I do? The best thing to do is to upgrade the account to the next level. To upgrade, please sign into your account and click on the "Upgrade" link on your Account Dashboard, located towards the upper right of the page. Alternatively, you can upgrade by clicking on the ‘Subscription’ link at the top of the page and selecting the ‘Change Plan’ tab. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Alternatively, you can opt to archive the campaigns that you don’t need to track anymore. Archived campaigns are considered inactive and do not count towards the number of campaigns limit on your account. Note, however, that once you reach or go over the limit, you will not only not be able to create new campaigns, but you will also not be able to restore any of the archived campaigns. Data Policy IMPRINT℠ SUPER SIMPLE SERIALIZATION Uniquely identify everything that matters. Serialized. Connected. Ready for anything. Uniquely identify everything that matters. Serialized. Connected. Ready for anything. ------------------------------------------ Home>Engagement Suite>Super Simple Serialization Imprint. Serialization used to be complex. Now it’s simple. Serialization is essential. Modern brands need unique digital identities for every product, print piece, and touchpoint — without the cost or complexity of traditional systems. Imprint℠ Super Simple Serialization transforms ordinary links and QR codes into powerful, privacy‑first digital identifiers. Every item gets its own story. No integrations. No APIs. No infrastructure. Just an instant, scalable identity that works seamlessly across the Delivr platform. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Effortless identity at scale. ----------------------------- Unlike other solutions, you can create hundreds, thousands, or millions of unique, traceable links or QR codes in minutes with Imprint℠. Instantly access real‑world insights into item engagement, unmatched by legacy systems. No infrastructure or code — just results. From product to person. ----------------------- Each code proves engagement, authenticity, and impact. With Imprint℠, every interaction delivers measurable value. Use Super Simple Serialization to: ---------------------------------- Simplify product registration and authentication. Enable item‑level tracking across packaging, inventory, and retail. Power hyper‑personalized and localized experiences Attribute influencers, channels, and campaigns with precision Transform static print into interactive, measurable media. Strengthen brand protection with unique, serialized codes that help deter counterfeiting and enable authenticity checks. Serialization, simplified. -------------------------- Forget complex systems, APIs, and integrations—or managing countless QR codes. With Imprint℠, all you need is a spreadsheet. Add unique IDs to your Experience URL, send to print or NFC partners, and start variable printing or encoding in minutes. That’s it. Super Simple Serialization. Turn a single Experience URL like https://delivr.com/ABC123 into unlimited serialized links or QR codes: https://delivr.com/ABC123/001 https://delivr.com/ABC123/002 https://delivr.com/ABC123/003 Each is tracked independently and in aggregate within Worldview℠ Advanced Analytics. Privacy‑first by design. ------------------------ Imprint℠ ensures serialization occurs solely within Delivr’s privacy‑first platform, so customer data never leaves your environment — providing immediate compliance with GDPR and enterprise policies and setting it apart from other systems. No limits. No bottlenecks. -------------------------- Self‑provision serialization instantly, no matter your scale. Unlike API-based systems, Imprint℠ reduces setup time by more than 90%, with no APIs to configure or dependencies to manage — so it moves at your business's speed. Every serialized connection is compliant, measurable, and secure by default. Why Imprint℠ Super Simple Serialization? ---------------------------------------- Instant Traceability . Follow every item’s journey in real time Brand Protection . Detect diversion, counterfeits, and unauthorized resellers Smart Personalization . Deliver dynamic content per individual scan Total Simplicity . No extra tools or technical setup required Serialization that connects everything. --------------------------------------- Imprint℠ stands apart by bridging identity, engagement, and intelligence — giving brands unique clarity, control, and connections at scale that traditional serialization cannot match. Intelligence built in. ---------------------- Imprint℠ works seamlessly across the Delivr Experience Suite: ------------------------------------------------------------- Nest℠ Branded Experiences for dynamic, on‑brand destinations. Worldview℠ Advanced Analytics for item‑level insight and attribution. Hush℠ Privacy‑First, Zero‑Knowledge for secure, compliant data handling. Learning Center --------------- A curated collection of solutions, resources, and FAQs to help you evaluate with confidence. Super Simple Serialization Solution Understanding & Implementing Super Simple Serialization. Last Updated 19 Feb 2026 Let's talk. Contact us to learn more about The Delivr Engagement Suite . Name Email Company Phone How can we help? Turnstile smart CAPTCHA alternative We use this information in strict accordance with our Privacy Notice. We can think of many remarkable uses for serialization; here are three. ----------------------------------------------------------------------- ➀ Physical products. ------------------ Make product registration easier. Super Simple Serialization eliminates the need to enter or search for a serial number manually. By scanning a QR code, a serial number can be filled in automatically on a registration page. ➁ Digital communications. ----------------------- Increase the effectiveness of your sales efforts by making your digital (or print) communications even more personal. Super Simple Serialization bridges the divide between mass marketing and personalized engagement. ➂ Smart objects. -------------- Instead of generating and managing thousands or millions of managed Short links or QR codes, use Super Simple Serialization to power a serialized link that passes the object's identity to your service or webpage. Serialize product packaging, direct mail, posters, POS materials, equipment, and parts with a unique identifier. Other uses for serialization. ----------------------------- Improve inventory visibility by serializing your inventory, giving each piece of merchandise a unique digital identity - its digital twin. Assign individual serial numbers to printed items to facilitate personalized URLs. With our DIY product serialization feature, you can easily track the sales of your products across different regions and identify any areas where they may be appearing despite not being distributed there. Our reporting system provides you with valuable insights into the performance of your products in various markets. Serialize the links to your campaigns so the social influencer can be attributed. Print a serialized QR code on a car rental receipt, making it easier for customers to reach their personalized rental landing page. Manage single-use coupons and promotions.
