111.title: Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes?
111.content: Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? URL: https://delivr.com/faq/1556/is-the-gs1-digital-link-qr-code-replacing-upc-barcodes Title: Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? URL Source: http://delivr.com/faq/1556/is-the-gs1-digital-link-qr-code-replacing-upc-barcodes Markdown Content: Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? Data Policy Home>Documentation>Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? Delivr Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? Is the GS1 Digital Link QR code replacing UPC barcodes? To encourage manufacturers to integrate a 2D barcode alongside the existing UPC, GS1 has set a Sunset Date of 2027. However, for this to be successful, stores need to educate their staff on barcode orientation, and the industry needs to communicate and educate on usability issues. Additionally, coordinated efforts must be made to help packages marked with an additional QR code transition to the GS1 Digital Link. The printing industry must also evolve to a more digital process to encode supplemental GTIN information. Considering all these factors, it will take a while before the UPC is retired. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ The short answer is not in the near or immediate future. Before the UPC barcode becomes obsolete, there are various technological and behavioral obstacles that need to be overcome. The widely used UPC barcode is unlikely to become obsolete in the short term. This is primarily due to various technological and behavioral obstacles that must be overcome before significant changes occur. As a result, leading brands will continue to rely on traditional UPC and 2D codes for their products. One key factor contributing to the persistence of UPC barcodes is that some retailers have yet to upgrade their point-of-sale (POS) checkouts to read newer codes. Companies looking to adopt new barcode technology may need more support from specific retailers, which could limit their ability to reach certain markets or customers. Of course, this does not mean companies should avoid exploring new barcode options altogether. Using the new GS1 Digital Link QR codes has many potential benefits, such as improved inventory tracking and more efficient supply chain management. However, companies need to approach this transition with carefulness. In particular, companies should be careful when assigning their Global Trade Item Numbers (GTINs) and managing their product information. Doing so can ensure that their products are correctly identified and tracked throughout the supply chain. This approach will ultimately help them fully reap the benefits of any new barcode technology they adopt. Data Policy Home>Documentation>Is there a specific type of barcode required for use with GS1 Digital Link? Delivr Is there a specific type of barcode required for use with GS1 Digital Link? Is there a specific type of barcode required for use with GS1 Digital Link? GS1 Digital Link data can be encoded within 2D barcodes like the GS1 QR Code and GS1 DataMatrix, but it's important to note that a barcode is simply a "data carrier." ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Other identification carriers, like NFC and RFID tags, can also be used in retail environments. Currently, many retailers utilize these non-barcoded data carriers, and either NFC or RFID tags can encode GS1 Digital Link data. 115.title: One source of truth for connected experiences.
115.content: One source of truth for connected experiences. URL: https://delivr.com/page/795/kit-brand-system Title: Kit. Every asset. Every QR code. Every landing page. Always on-brand. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/795/kit-brand-system Markdown Content: Your brand lives across hundreds of touchpoints — from QR codes on packaging to brochures, to landing pages and profiles. Kit℠ Brand System brings order, consistency, and control to it all. Built for modern, multi-team marketing, Kit℠ gives you one intelligent workspace — a single source of truth for color, content, and creative consistency across every campaign, QR code, and experience. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Centralized Brand Asset Management ---------------------------------- Logos & Design Elements ----------------------- Upload, organize, and manage all your logos and visual assets. Ensure every campaign, landing page, and QR code uses the right version — every time. Brand Colors & Styles --------------------- Define your color palette and design system once. Every campaign automatically applies your standards, keeping every experience cohesive and unmistakably on-brand. Content Management Across Pages & Profiles ------------------------------------------ Update key text, CTAs, or assets once — and your changes appear everywhere, from landing pages to link-in-bios. QR Code Templates & Designer Assets ----------------------------------- Create and manage branded QR code templates with embedded logos and colors. Empower teams to deploy codes confidently, with built-in brand alignment. Template Access & Editing ------------------------- Control design elements and update shared templates without manual rework. Keep your brand modern, consistent, and easy to scale. Design once. Deploy everywhere. ------------------------------- Kit℠ eliminates guesswork — ensuring every deliverable is aligned, compliant, and unmistakably yours. How Kit℠ Works -------------- 1. Upload your logos, colors, and brand assets. 2. Define your brand QR templates and content. 3. Manage pages, profiles, and QR codes from one unified system. 4. Deploy confidently. Every campaign automatically reflects your brand. 5. Update once; deploy everywhere. Changes propagate instantly across all assets. Made for Teams. Collaboration Without Compromise. ----------------------------------------------------- Empower your creative and marketing teams to move fast — without ever going off-brand. With Kit℠, every designer, marketer, and content creator works from a single, living brand system that keeps every touchpoint consistent, compliant, and unmistakably you. Stay Unified. ------------- Define and enforce your color palette and logo system in one shared style guide. Stay Flexible. -------------- Use pre-approved templates that lock core elements but leave room for creativity. Stay in Control. ---------------- Let local and regional teams adapt campaigns safely within your guidelines. Stay Aligned. ------------- Collaborate with agencies and partners in a shared workspace that updates in real time. Built for Scale. ---------------- Control and coordinate brands across regions — with precision and ease. From local activations to global launches, Kit℠ keeps your brand connected, consistent, and performing everywhere it appears. Future-Proof Your Brand System ---------------------------------- Built with GS1 and Digital Product Passport (DPP) alignment in mind, Kit℠ helps brands stay ready for emerging digital identity and traceability standards — connecting packaging design, marketing content, and product data seamlessly. Your brand standards today become your digital product DNA tomorrow. Where Kit℠ Shines ----------------- Consumer Brands & Retail. Keep packaging, QR codes, and campaigns aligned across global markets. Agencies & Creative Teams. Build faster with approved, on-brand assets. Enterprises & Manufacturers. Maintain GS1-ready consistency from product to promotion. Corporate & B2B. Protect brand integrity across presentations, collateral, and reports. Part of the Delivr Experience Suite ----------------------------------- Kit℠ is one component of the Delivr Experience Suite — a connected ecosystem where creativity, compliance, and consistency work together to drive measurable performance. Kit℠ integrates seamlessly with: Nest ℠. Build branded landing pages, profiles, and link-in-bio pages that deliver instant, on-brand engagement. QR Studio ℠. Design and deploy custom, brand-ready QR codes with precision and impact. Imprint ℠.Serialize and track every product experience from scan to sale. Ring ℠. Enable GS1-compliant product identity and digital link integration at scale. Together, they unify design, data, and digital identity — connecting every scan, page, and product into one intelligent brand experience. Learning Center --------------- A curated collection of solutions, resources, and FAQs to help you evaluate with confidence. Understanding the Brand Kit. Best Practices for Maximum Brand Impact --------------------------------------- Keep Assets Fresh. Update logos, templates, and colors as your brand evolves. Audit Before Launch. Catch inconsistencies early and ensure every campaign is on-brand. Leverage Templates. Prebuilt QR templates guarantee flawless, on-brand output. Collaborate Securely. Assign roles so only authorized users can edit assets. Track & Optimize. Monitor asset usage, identify top performers, and streamline workflows.

117.title: Logo Usage Notice
117.content: Logo Usage Notice URL: https://delivr.com/page/516/logo-usage-notice Title: Logo Usage Notice URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/516/logo-usage-notice Markdown Content: The following set of guidelines has been established by Delivr to assist partners in the proper use of the Delivr logo. It has been developed to ensure that the company logo reflects the quality of Delivr products and services. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Delivr reserves the right to change the logo and/or these guidelines at any time at its discretion. For questions regarding the logo. --------------------------------- Maintaining the integrity of the Delivr logo depends upon consistent and correct usage. The following guidelines are examples of how the Delivr logo should and should not be used. If you have any questions concerning the use of these logos, please contact us at 631-750-2785. Color standards. ---------------- The preferred application of the Delivr logo is in black on a white background. The Delivr logo is: Image 1: Small Delivr Logo Black 2024 A monochromatic / black version of the Delivr logo is acceptable for use in single color printing applications such as newspaper advertising. There will be situations when the logo needs to be printed in 4-color process, grayscale, or reversed out of a darker background (white version of the logo.) To maintain consistency and build brand awareness, no other color combinations are to be utilized. The white version of the logo may be printed on a colored background if there is sufficient contrast. Clear space and minimum size. ----------------------------- Clear space must be maintained on all sides of the Delivr logo in order to maintain the integrity of each logo and ensure its maximum impact in environments where it appears among other elements. The minimum clear space necessary is relative to the size of the logo. Moreover, as logo size is significantly reduced, there is a point at which the logo becomes ineffective. By establishing a minimum size for the logos we ensure the logos are always prominent and readable. The Delivr logo should never be reproduced smaller than 1 inch across. Photographic background options. -------------------------------- When a Delivr logo needs to appear over a photograph, it must be positioned in such a way that there is even color behind the logo as well as proper clear space. The logos may appear in full color if the background is light enough to provide appropriate contrast; however, the logo must reverse out of dark photographs. Logo elements. -------------- The Delivr logo should never be taken apart and recombined in any way to create new artwork. No part of a logo may be changed or re-sized in any way relative to the rest of the logo. The logo must only appear in a horizontal position. Assigning ownership of Delivr logos. ------------------------------------ The following should be included in all printed materials using the Delivr logo: Delivr® is a registered trademark of Delivr Corporporation. Examples of Improper vs. Proper logo usage. ------------------------------------------- Maintaining the integrity of the Delivr logo depends upon consistent and correct usage. The following guidelines are examples of how the logos should not and should be used. Do not use the Delivr logo in the body of text. Improper: TheImage 2: Small Delivr Logo Black 2024 platform Proper: The Delivr® platform Enclosure in shapes. -------------------- Do not enclose the logos in a shape so that the shape appears to be a part of the logo. Colored logos on tinted background. ----------------------------------- When placing the colored Delivr on a tinted background, do not place it on a color that is too close in value or too busy that it may affect the readability of the logos. Guidelines for using the Made with Delivr® logo. ------------------------------------------------ The Made with Delivr® logo was specifically developed for Delivr partners who deliver solutions utilizing, based on, or integrated with Delivr technology. When placing the Made with Delivr® logo on packaging, brochures or demand-generation materials, the logo must appear in a prominent location, but it cannot be larger or more prominent than your own company's product or service name, logo, or trade or company name. The Made with Delivr® logo may not be included in your trade or business name, domain name, product or service name, logo, design, slogan, or other trademarks. You may not combine Made with Delivr® with any other object, including, but not limited to, other logos, icons, words, graphics, photos, slogans, numbers, design features, symbols, or Web site audio files. The Made with Delivr® logo may not be used as a design feature on any of your materials. The Made with Delivr® logo shall include the registered trademark symbol (®) as shown in these guidelines Compliance with guidelines. --------------------------- Delivr reserves the right to spot-check all materials bearing the Made with Delivr® logo and may periodically send out requests for samples. You must correct any deficiencies in your use of these logos. Refusal to correct such deficiencies or to cease publication or distribution could result in revocation of your right to use the logo. Obtaining electronic versions of logos. --------------------------------------- Electronic versions of the Delivr® and Made with Delivr® logos are available. Please contact us at 631-750-2785 and specify the format you need and the application for the logo (printed materials, website, etc.)

118.title: Modern Slavery Statement
118.content: Modern Slavery Statement URL: https://delivr.com/page/775/modern-slavery-statement Title: Modern Slavery Statement URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/775/modern-slavery-statement Markdown Content: At Delivr, we are committed to conducting our business operations ethically and responsibly. We recognize the importance of human rights and strongly oppose any form of modern slavery or human trafficking. This Modern Slavery Statement outlines our approach to addressing current slavery risks within our organization and supply chain. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Our Business ------------ Delivr is a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) based company in the United States. We provide a managed URL Shortener & dynamic QR Code Generator with Intelligent Link Management and Real-time Reporting. Our operations primarily involve developing, deploying, and maintaining software solutions for our customers. We may engage with suppliers and contractors globally. Our Commitment -------------- Delivr is fully committed to eradicating modern slavery and human trafficking from all aspects of our operations and supply chain. We prioritize safeguarding human rights and ensuring equitable treatment for all workers. Policies and Procedures ----------------------- We have implemented robust policies and procedures to address the risk of modern slavery. Code of Conduct. This sets out the principles and standards all employees, contractors, and suppliers must adhere to. It emphasizes our commitment to human rights and explicitly prohibits modern slavery and human trafficking. Supplier Code of Conduct. This outlines our expectations from our suppliers and contractors regarding ethical business practices, including the prohibition of modern slavery and human trafficking. We require our suppliers to acknowledge and adhere to this code. Due Diligence. We conduct due diligence on our suppliers and contractors to assess compliance with our standards and identify any potential risks related to modern slavery. This process may involve reviewing supplier questionnaires, conducting audits, and engaging in regular communication to ensure ongoing compliance. Employee Awareness and Training. We provide regular training and awareness programs, focusing on recognizing and reporting any signs of modern slavery. We encourage our employees to raise concerns or suspicions through established reporting channels without fear of retaliation. Whistleblowing Policy. We maintain a whistleblowing policy that enables employees, suppliers, and other stakeholders to report any concerns about modern slavery. We treat all reports with confidentiality and investigate them promptly. Internal Accountability. We have implemented internal controls and accountability mechanisms to ensure compliance with our policies and procedures, such as periodic reviews of our practices and reporting lines to ensure effectiveness and appropriate action in response to identified risks. Supplier Engagement ------------------- We strive to work with suppliers and contractors who share our commitment to ethical and responsible business practices. Our supplier engagement activities include the following: Supplier Evaluation. We assess potential suppliers and contractors based on compliance with our Supplier Code of Conduct and relevant ethical standards. We prioritize suppliers who demonstrate a commitment to human rights and responsible sourcing. Contracts and Agreements. We include provisions in our contracts and agreements with suppliers to explicitly prohibit modern slavery and require adherence to relevant labour and human rights standards. Supplier Audits. We may conduct audits of our suppliers to verify compliance with our standards and identify any potential risks. These audits may include visits to supplier facilities, document reviews, and worker interviews. Remediation. In the event that a supplier is discovered to be in breach of our policies or involved in modern slavery practices, we will take immediate action to work with them in resolving the situation. In cases where a supplier fails to take appropriate remedial action, we may terminate the business relationship. Monitoring and Review --------------------- We are committed to continuously improving our approach to combating modern slavery. We regularly review and monitor our policies, procedures, and supplier engagements to ensure they remain effective and aligned with evolving best practices. We encourage feedback from our stakeholders and work collaboratively with industry peers and relevant organizations to advance our efforts. At Delivr, our commitment to addressing modern slavery risks is reflected in our annual review and update of our Modern Slavery Statement to show ongoing progress. Approval -------- This Modern Slavery Statement has been approved by David W. Harper at Delivr Corporation. Image 1: Approved by Signature David W. Harper Founder & CEO 9 March 2024 Last Updated 9 Mar 2024

Some web sites redirect mobile visits differently then desktop visitors. Enter the Destination URL directly in your smartphone's web browser and see where you are directed to. If you are redirected to a page other then the page you are expecting then the mobile site more then likely employs logic that is redirecting mobile visitors in this way. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- This is not an issue with Delivr and can only be resolved with changes to the code/logic at the mobile site. 120.title: Build mobile-first experiences for your connected brand.
120.content: Build mobile-first experiences for your connected brand. URL: https://delivr.com/page/793/nest-mobile-experiences Title: Nest. Mobile experiences designed to be fast and effortless. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/793/nest-mobile-experiences Markdown Content: With Nest℠ Mobile Experiences, every scan takes your audience to a fast-loading, branded mobile page designed to engage, convert, and reinforce your brand. From Pages to Profiles and Link-in-Bio, every interaction happens instantly — no drop-offs, no friction, no lost opportunities. Fast. Branded. Built to Convert. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- First impressions perfected. Every second counts. ------------------------------------------------- Brands using NEST℠ see tangible results: faster page load times under 2 seconds keep audiences engaged and drive conversions above industry benchmarks, directly impacting business growth. Why Fast-Loading, Experiences Matter ------------------------------------ Fast-loading, mobile pages increase conversions by offering people content tailored to their needs from the first interaction. As a result, customers are more likely to take specific actions, such as downloading a product guide, signing up for a newsletter, or completing a purchase, enhancing the overall customer engagement and driving measurable results. Intuitive, mobile-first layouts make it easy for users on any device to access content, ensuring brands keep users engaged and more likely to complete important actions from the start. Clear, single-step calls to action enable users to act quickly, helping brands convert interest into results faster and more effectively than slower, multi-step processes. Pages load in under two seconds, so users experience minimal wait and more immediate access. This speed keeps visitors engaged and reduces the likelihood of abandonment, thereby increasing conversion rates. Consistently aligned brand elements—typography, colors, domains, and messaging—strengthen customer trust, ensuring every interaction increases brand credibility and loyalty. Enterprise Reliability. Scalable, secure, and global by design. Go Beyond Mobile-Friendly with Nest℠ Mobile Experiences by Delivr. ------------------------------------------------------------------ Imagine a scenario where launching a product takes not months, but mere days, thanks to a >30% reduction in time-to-market. Picture the significant budget relief from cutting content update expenses by >20%. These are the stories of transformation that define the power of customization. In the following section, we delve into the customizable solutions that unlock these opportunities and demonstrate their applicability across diverse business contexts. Image 1 The Page Experience ------------------- Image 2: Scan to view a Landing Page Experience. SCAN TO VIEW A PAGE. Custom landing pages empower brands to update offers or product details instantly, ensuring visitors always see the most timely and relevant information. This drives engagement and boosts campaign results by making each interaction more valuable. Product Lifecycle Management . Provide QR-linked instructions for installation, training, troubleshooting, or decommissioning. Dynamic Compliance Updates . Update content globally in real time, eliminating the need for reprints or relabeling. Global Campaigns at Local Scale . Use a single QR code worldwide, automatically adjusting language, promotions, and legal notices to deliver a consistent brand experience. Imagine a customer in Tokyo seeing outdated promotions meant for another region—it can be frustrating and disjointing. With our feature, they receive up-to-date, local information, reinforcing global brand equity while providing multinational stakeholders with a reliable and personalized brand image. Customize Pages with Modules ---------------------------- Image 3: Scan to view a Scratch-off Experience. SCAN TO VIEW A SCRATCH-OFF. Build custom pages from a suite of modular experiences designed to delight. Add interactive moments like Scratch Off reveals to surprise audiences, encourage exploration, and make every interaction feel personal. Other modules include Forms and Gallery. The Profile Experience ---------------------- Image 4: Scan to view a Profile Experience. SCAN TO VIEW A PROFILE. Profiles function as mobile-first microsites that centralize key resources for employees, partners, or customers. This makes essential information easy to access, reduces confusion, and improves the overall user experience for enterprise teams and clients. Boardroom-Ready Sales Profiles . Combine case studies, demos, pricing, and ROI tools into a single scannable hub. Workforce Engagement . Provide instant access to training, benefits, and internal programs without requiring portals or logins. Smart Facilities & Operations . Tenants and staff can scan to access maintenance requests, announcements, and emergency information. The Link-in-Bio Experience -------------------------- Image 5: Scan to view a Link-in-Bio Experience. SCAN TO VIEW A LINK-IN-BIO. Link-in-bio pages consolidate vital links in one mobile location, streamlining navigation for users, boosting digital engagement, and providing companies with actionable insights to optimize marketing efforts. Investor Relations Hub . Access reports, press releases, and webcast replays in one place. Corporate Sustainability & ESG . Distribute updates, metrics, and public efforts. Crisis & Incident Communication . Offer an authoritative, real-time single source of truth. What Makes Nest℠ Mobile Experiences Different --------------------------------------------- Nest℠ stands out by offering rapid load times, flexible campaign customization, and enterprise-grade reliability. This means measurable, immediate impact—faster conversions, easier pivots, and a seamless experience that elevates every brand interaction. 1–2 second load times keep users converting and engaged. Optimized for iOS, Android, and tablets for effortless performance. Real-time analytics track actions and conversions every scan. Inclusive design provides a user-friendly, accessible experience for everyone. GDPR/CCPA-ready architecture ensures privacy and security. Always-on reliability ensures uptime for critical moments. Every scan, every time, without friction or missed opportunities. OFFER Nobody likes a slow landing page; let's have a look at yours. ------------------------------------------------------------- From negative brand perception to thousands of dollars in lost sales, the consequences of slow web pages are clear. If you want to know more about the performance of your current landing pages, apply for a free audit. If you qualify, we'll analyze your existing landing pages using various tools and identify issues that impact performance, accessibility, user experience, security, and SEO. We'll then explain the results, allowing you to turn insights into action. Submit your URL and schedule an audit with useful guidance on: Page performance & load speed Accessibility & mobile user experience Security & compliance readiness SEO structure & discoverability Opportunities to simplify conversion flow REQUEST AUDIT Last Updated 19 Feb 2026

122.title: Coordinate campaigns. Unite your teams.
122.content: Coordinate campaigns. Unite your teams. URL: https://delivr.com/page/796/orchestra-campaign-team-management Title: Orchestra. Campaigns and teams in perfect harmony. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/796/orchestra-campaign-team-management Markdown Content: When campaigns live everywhere, control becomes everything. Orchestra℠ brings every campaign element together into one powerful dashboard — so you can launch faster, stay consistent, and know exactly what’s working. Orchestra℠ unifies links, QR codes, landing pages, NFC tags, and team coordination in one central dashboard. Launch campaigns faster, stay consistent, and instantly understand what's working—all from a single source. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ The Pain Few Marketers Admit ---------------------------- You spend weeks planning campaigns. Then they launch — and chaos begins. Links expire. QR codes misfire. Teams lose track of changes. Reports don’t add up.Every click and scan provides valuable data that often goes unnoticed.Orchestra℠was built to fix that. Meet Orchestra℠ — Because Great Campaigns Deserve a Conductor ------------------------------------------------------------- Delivr unifies all campaign elements into a single intelligent platform. Instead of juggling tools and spreadsheets, you gain shared visibility, structured collaboration, and real control. You don’t just manage campaigns — you orchestrate them. Clarity . See every campaign in one organized, searchable view. Consistency . Keep branding and messaging intact as campaigns evolve. Confidence . Understand performance with real‑time, human‑readable analytics. Collaboration . Empower teams with role‑based access, without losing control. One platform. Every channel. No more confusion. No more chaos. Why Centralized Campaign & Team Management Matters -------------------------------------------------- When campaigns live across teams, tools, agencies, and regions, things fall apart. Logos go missing. Messages drift. Links break. Reports contradict each other.A unified platform like Delivr uniquely preserves brand integrity, saving time while ensuring every campaign element remains under control . With Delivr, teams can: Keep campaigns aligned across print, digital, in‑store, and packaging. Update links and QR destinations instantly — no reprints or rework. Share campaigns safely with internal teams, partners, or agencies. Control who can view, edit, or publish — down to the asset level. View performance across every market, region, and product line. Turn scattered data into clear insights that drive smarter decisions. You can’t manage what you can’t see. Delivr makes every campaign visible — and valuable. Built‑In Collaboration (Without the Headaches) ---------------------------------------------- Orchestra℠ was designed for real teams, not solo operators. Role‑Based Permissions . Give the right access to the right people. Shared Workspaces . Organize campaigns by brand, region, product, or client. Clear Ownership . Know who created, edited, or approved every asset. Safe Collaboration . Work together without overwriting, duplicating, or breaking live campaigns. Whether you’re coordinating across departments or continents, everyone stays in sync — and accountable. Campaign Management Built for Results — Not More Tools or Overhead ------------------------------------------------------------------ “ If it doesn’t sell, it isn’t creative. ” — Ogilvy. Delivr agrees. Orchestra℠ is built for impact: Dynamic Controls . Edit, pause, or expire live links instantly Branded Everything . QR codes, short URLs, dashboards, and domains. Instant Intelligence . Analytics that show what matters, not noise. Privacy‑First by Design . 100% GDPR/CCPA compliant, zero‑knowledge analytics. Always On . 99.99% uptime, ISO‑certified infrastructure, enterprise support. Tools fade. Platforms change. Delivr ensures campaign longevity. Image 1: Delivr Account Dashboard The Power Behind the Simplicity ------------------------------- Orchestrating Campaigns in Perfect Harmony ------------------------------------------ Delivr doesn’t just manage campaigns — it aligns every element. Bring Order to the Chaos ------------------------ Labels, Groups, and Tags organize hundreds of campaigns like instruments in a symphony — every asset in its place, ready to perform. Spotlight What Matters Most --------------------------- Color‑coded Stars and customizable Workspaces keep your most important initiatives front and center. Measure What Moves the Needle ----------------------------- Sync UTMs with Google Analytics®, Adobe®, or Mixpanel® to see which campaigns truly perform. Adapt Instantly --------------- Pause, edit, or reroute live campaigns in real time — no reprints, no downtime. Engage Everywhere ----------------- From print and in‑store to social, email, and apps, every scan, click, or tap contributes to the full performance picture. Privacy Isn’t a Feature, It’s the Foundation -------------------------------------------- Enterprise-grade security, zero-knowledge analytics, and full GDPR/CCPA compliance form the foundation of every great performance. Orchestra℠ is the first QR campaign management platform built on zero-knowledge privacy — because your audience deserves respect, and your brand deserves trust. Delivr doesn’t track your users. We don’t sell data. We don’t run ads. Built for Businesses of Every Size ---------------------------------- Individuals & Small Businesses ------------------------------ Launch campaigns fast. Track results effortlessly. Keep every link and promotion organized. Teams & Global Enterprises -------------------------- Run global product launches. Collaborate securely across departments and agencies. Manage multi‑phase, multi‑market promotions with confidence. From a single café to a multinational brand — Orchestra℠ grows with you. Real Brands. Real Results . ----------------------------- Trusted by leaders in retail, CPG, healthcare, and technology. Powering millions of views every month.

124.title: Privacy Notice
124.content: Privacy Notice URL: https://delivr.com/page/511/privacy-notice Title: Privacy Notice URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/511/privacy-notice Markdown Content: The security of your personal information is important to us. We strive to be as transparent as possible about how we use your data and seek to design a policy to help you feel more confident about the privacy and security of your personal information when accessing any of our services. So that's what we've done. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. Introduction --------------- This Privacy Notice provides guidance and information to Delivr Corporation (“Delivr”) customers regarding the processing of personal data by Delivr. Delivr (" us ", " we " or " our ") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Notice together with the Terms of Service, Cookie Notice , Data Policy and the documents referred to in them sets out the basis on which any personal data we collect from you or that you provide to us (“ Data ”) will be processed by us. Please read this Privacy Notice &Data Policy carefully to understand our treatment and use of Data. In this Privacy Notice, references to “ you” means the person whose personal information we collect, use and process. We will use your personal data only for the purposes and in the manner set forth below, which describes the steps we take to ensure the processing of your personal data is in compliance with the Data Protection Acts 1988 and 2003 and any subsequent data protection and privacy legislation (the “ Acts ”), European Union Law including the General Data Protection Regulation (the “ GDPR ”) and any subsequent amendments (together the “ Data Protection Legislation ”). If you do not agree with or are not comfortable with any aspect of this Privacy Notice, your only remedy is to not become a customer of Delivr. We seek to maintain the privacy, accuracy, and confidentiality of personal information (including your personal data) that we collect and use concerning our customers. 2. Identity of the controller of personal information ----------------------------------------------------- For the purposes of the Data Protection Legislation, the Data Controller is Delivr, a Delaware corporation registered in the United States. Delivr's registered office is at Delivr Corporation, 34 E. Main Street, Suite 392, Smithtown, NY 11787. 3. Contact details of the privacy officer ----------------------------------------- The data protection officer appointed in respect of your entity (if applicable) can be provided – please see clause 13 for further contact information. 4. When does this privacy notice apply -------------------------------------- This Privacy Notice applies to personal information that we collect, use and otherwise process about you in connection with your relationship with us as a customer or potential customer. Children Under the Age of 16 Our Website is not intended for children under 16 years of age. No one under age 16 may provide any personal information on the Website. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If you are under 16, do not use or provide any information on this Website. If we learn we have collected or received personal information from a child under 16 without verification of parental consent, we will delete that information. If you believe we might have any information from or about a child under 16, please contact us as described in clause 13. 5. What personal information is collected and processed? -------------------------------------------------------- We may collect and process the following categories of information about you: your personal information (e.g. name, address, email and phone number); your authentication information (e.g. tokens); and your financial information (e.g. credit card number and billing data). We may collect and process the following categories of information about visitors to your campaign IF you activated a form on your landing pages and you visitor submitted the form: their personal information (e.g. name, address, email and phone number). This information is NOT stored on Delivr servers by default. On default form submit, the data is sent directly to the email you defined for receiving this data. See our Data Policyfor details on how visit data is handled. 6. What do we use your personal information for? ------------------------------------------------ The legal basis for this use and other processing will include (as relevant): process your account; provide services relating to your account and to work on improving our services to you (including service communication, insight, research, customer surveys and feedback); to provide you with relevant marketing communications; to support other administrative purposes; comply with all legal and regulatory requirements; and where you have given us permission, contact you from time to time to keep you up to date with limited offers, new services, company news and other promotions. The main purposes for which we use your personal information are: if you have provided us with your consent to the processing of your personal data; to enable us to perform our obligations under any contract with you; processing for legitimate interests provided these are not overridden by your interests and fundamental rights and freedoms (this includes our own legitimate interests and those of other entities in the Delivr), in particular this is relevant when we use and process your personal data in order to respond to your enquiries and to address our good governance obligations; and we may also disclose your personal information to governmental and regulatory bodies and other third parties where required to do so by applicable law, such as to comply with a court order or a request from a regulator or similar legal process or where otherwise necessary to comply with a legal obligation or for the administration of justice. In addition, in the event of a merger, acquisition, or any form of sale of some or all of our assets to a third party, we may also disclose your personal information to the third parties concerned or their professional advisors. In the event of such a transaction, the personal information held by Delivr will be among the assets transferred to the buyer. The provision of personal data is a contractual requirement and may also be a statutory requirement, and is necessary to process your application or for the performance of a contract. If your personal data cannot be processed this may have an impact on fulfilling our rights and obligations. We do not knowingly process personal data from persons under the age of 13 years. If it comes to our attention that we are processing such personal data, we shall delete such personal data immediately. When you close your account, we may continue to process your personal data, to the extent permitted by applicable law, for the purposes detailed above. 7. International transfers -------------------------- Due to the global nature of Delivr, your personal data will be transferred to Delivr entities located in other countries, including outside the European Economic Area (“ EEA ”). These other countries may either have different data protection laws than your country of residence or they may not have data protection laws. Steps will however be taken to put in place safeguards (including around security) to protect your personal data when it is in other countries. Your personal information may be transferred, stored and processed in one or more countries outside the European Economic Area (“ EEA ”), including the United States of America. For transfers of your personal data to third parties outside of the EEA, we take additional steps in line with data protection laws. These include EU Commission approved forms of contract with the relevant recipients of your information, whether members of Delivr or otherwise. In addition, we take reasonable steps to ensure that your personal information is adequately protected in accordance with the Acts and the GDPR. 8. Period for which the personal data will be stored, or if that is not possible, the criteria used to determine that period. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Your personal data will not be kept for longer than is necessary to fulfill the specific purposes outlined in this Privacy Notice, Data Policy, and Cookie Notice and to allow us to comply with our legal requirements, including, without limitation, any tax and commercial obligations. The criteria we use to determine data retention periods includes the following: Please note that, although reasonable efforts will be taken, it may not always be possible to completely remove or delete all of your personal information from our databases because of back-ups and other technical reasons. Where this is the case, we will take steps to ensure that your personal data is suppressed in order to render it unusable. Retention in case of queries We may retain your personal data for a reasonable period after you have enquired about Services, in case of follow up queries from you. Retention in case of claims We may retain your personal data for the period in which you might legally bring claims against us (this means we will retain it for at least 7 years) if and to the extent this is relevant. Retention in accordance with legal and regulatory requirements We will consider whether we need to retain your personal data after the period of retention in the case of queries or claims (above) because of a legal or regulatory requirement. Some or all of these criteria may be relevant to retention of your personal data collected from you in connection with our Services. Retention permitted under applicable law We will continue to retain personal data where necessary to provide our services to you and the retention of such personal data is necessary for the purposes of pursuing our legitimate interests or where it is necessary for public interest purposes. 9. Your rights -------------- You may have various rights under data privacy laws in your country (where applicable). These may include (as relevant): the right to withdraw your consent to the processing of your personal data. However, we may continue to process your personal information if there is an alternative legal basis for the processing; the right to request access to or a copy of the personal data we hold about you. Please note that there is no fee for this request and any request for a copy of your personal data will be processed within thirty (30) days in accordance with the GDPR; the right to rectification including to require us to correct inaccurate personal data; the right to request restriction of processing concerning you or to object to processing of your personal data if: processing is based on legitimate interests or the performance of a task in the public interest or exercise of official authority; processed for direct marketing; or processed for the purposes of scientific or historical research and statistics; the right to prevent further processing in specific circumstances and where there is no other lawful ground for continuing to process that information. These include for example: where the personal data is no longer necessary in relation to the purpose for which it was originally collected/processed; where you withdraw consent; or where you object to us processing your information; the right to request the erasure of your personal data where it is no longer necessary for us to retain it; the right to block or suppress processing of personal information. While we are entitled to store your personal information, we cannot further process it if you request it to be blocked; the right to data portability including to obtain personal data in a commonly used machine readable format in certain circumstances such as where our processing of it is based on a consent; and the right to object to automated decision making including profiling (if any) that has a legal or significant effect on you as an individual; and the right to withdraw your consent to any processing for which you have previously given that consent. You have the right to be informed of the identity of the privacy local representative (if we are required by law to have a local representative); You also have the right to any details of any persons to whom Delivr disclosed your personal data (unless Delivr is prohibited from providing such information pursuant to applicable law) Please see clause 13 if you wish to exercise any of these rights (as relevant). 9.1 International transfers --------------------------- Without prejudice to any other administrative or judicial remedy you might have, you may have the right under data privacy laws in your country (where applicable) to lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection supervisory authority in your country (i.e. the Office of the Data Protection Commissioner in Ireland) if you consider that we have infringed applicable data privacy laws when processing your personal data. This means the country where you are habitually resident, where you work or where the alleged infringement took place. 10. Security ------------ We endeavour to use appropriate technical and physical security measures to protect your personal data which is transmitted, stored or otherwise processed by us, from accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorised disclosure of, or access. These measures include: storing personal data in a private database which is accessed via an internal control panel protected with the username, password and IP address of our authorized users; storing hashed information as opposed to passwords and using secure cloud storage for database backups. Our service providers are also selected carefully and required to use appropriate protective measures. As effective as modern security practices are, no physical or electronic security system is entirely secure. The transmission of information via the Internet is not completely secure. Although we will do our best to protect your Data, we cannot guarantee the security of your Data transmitted to our Site. Any transmission of Data is at your own risk. Once we receive your Data, we will use appropriate security measures to seek to prevent unauthorised access. We will continue to revise policies and implement additional security features as new technologies become available. In the event that there is an interception or unauthorised access to your personal data, we will not be liable or responsible for any resulting misuse of your personal information. 11. Updating the privacy notice ------------------------------- We may change the terms of this Privacy Notice from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page. 12. Contact us -------------- For further information or if you have any questions about this Privacy Notice, please contact https://delivr.com/page/652/submit-a-support-request Last Updated 9 Mar 2024

126.title: A simple way to scan QR codes from any mobile page.
126.content: A simple way to scan QR codes from any mobile page. URL: https://delivr.com/page/742/qr-code-reader-qr-code-scanner-by-delivr Title: A customizable web app for scanning QR codes. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/742/qr-code-reader-qr-code-scanner-by-delivr Markdown Content: A customizable web app for scanning QR codes. Delivr skip to main content +1.631.750.2785 Contact Support Learning Center Learning Center Documentation Uses of QR Codes Videos Our Values Wonderful Things Start Here Curiosity, Where Connection Begins Connecting Worlds, Safely and Securely The Human-First Product Path Delivr’s Approach to Data Privacy Let’s Build a Greener Future Sustainability & QR Codes Accessibility & QR Codes Security & QR Codes Privacy & Retargeting About Delivr About Delivr The Story of Delivr Image 2: Delivr Plans & Pricing Customers Solutions Solutions Overview Super Simple Serialization GS1 Digital Link Logistics Brand Protection Always Open Smart Label & Connected Packaging Touchless Marketing Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) Shoppable TV Content Management QR Code Reader Engagement Suite The Delivr Engagement Suite The Delivr Difference Dynamic QR Code Generator Custom QR Code Design Mobile Experiences Brand System Campaign & Team Management Intelligent Link Management Advanced Analytics Super Simple Serialization GS1-Compliant Digital Link Privacy-First, Zero-Knowledge Trust Center Register Sign In Image 3: Delivr Our QR codes and short URLs are cookie-free. Our privacy-first tracking anonymizes IP addresses and avoids storing personal or sensitive data, profiling individuals, or fingerprinting devices. Data Policy QR Code Reader A simple way to scan QR codes from any mobile page. Web browser-based. No download. No tracking. A simple way to scan QR codes from any mobile page. Web browser-based. No download. No tracking. -------------------------------------------- Home>Solutions>QR Code Reader A customizable web app for scanning QR codes. Enhance your website by incorporating a personalized QR code scanning feature, enabling visitors to easily scan QR codes using their smartphone's web browser. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Image 4: Click to try the QR Code Reader. Scan for QR Code Reader. Meet the QR Code Reader ----------------------- Scan QR codes directly in your browser—no apps, no setup, no tracking, no friction. Just point, scan, and go. Integration is as simple as adding a link to your mobile site. One tap launches a web-based QR reader that scans instantly—directly from the browser, on any smartphone. No app downloads required. Just point the camera, and QR codes are recognized in real time from the live video feed. Image 5: Click to try the QR Code Reader. Click for QR Code Reader. Meet the QR Code Reader ----------------------- Scan QR codes directly in your browser—no apps, no setup, no tracking, no friction. Just point, scan, and go. Integration is as simple as adding a link to your mobile site. One tap launches a web-based QR reader that scans instantly—directly from the browser, on any smartphone. No app downloads required. Just point the camera, and QR codes are recognized in real time from the live video feed. Top retail use cases. --------------------- If your customers don’t have your app—or if your experience runs in the browser rather than a native app—you can still drive engagement by enabling QR scanning directly on your website. This approach supports a range of use cases, including: Product lookup Product purchase Product registration Launch AR experiences and product demos Scan loyalty cards Gift registry Customization for brands and businesses. ---------------------------------------- Available fully hosted and branded with your logo. Embeddable on your mobile website or campaign landing page. Scanning can be limited to only your authorized QR codes. This tool offers features to help protect your brand, verify product authenticity, and detect instances of counterfeit and unauthorized sales. QR Code Size Guidelines by Viewing Distance: How Big Should Your QR Code Be? For QR codes that will be scanned from a distance, the ratio of the scanning distance to the size of the QR code should be close to 10:1. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- QR codes are encountered in different circumstances, fitting into one of the following distances. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Intimate distance Personal distance Social distance Public distance Sizes listed always refer to an exact square shape because otherwise, your QR code will not function properly. Intimate distance Effectively zero distance. These QR codes are expected to be interacted with from a small distance; it can be as small as the camera focus on your device can go. Examples of QR codes at intimate distances: QR codes inside a magazine or newspaper QR codes on envelopes mailed to you QR codes on business cards QR codes on the menu in a restaurant QR codes on products in a supermarket QR codes on books and DVD covers Minimum size for QR codes at intimate distances 10 mm (.4 inch), excluding the margin Recommend size for QR codes at intimate distances 12 mm (.5 inch), excluding the margin Personal distance This is the distance individuals maintain between each other. The length of the arm plays a major role in defining this distance and it ranges between .5 to 1 meter (1.5-3 feet). QR codes that fit into the personal distance are QR codes that are in your arm distance after extending your arm towards them. Examples of QR codes at personal distances: QR codes on supermarket shelves QR codes on bus stations QR codes in a zoo or museum Minimum size for QR codes at personal distances 5 cm (2 inches), excluding the margin, is the minimum size for scanning at a distance of .5 to 1 meter (1.5-3 feet). Social distance This is the distance that people feel comfortable with, in a social situation. It measures between 1-3 meters (3-10 feet). QR codes that are expected to be interacted within a social distance are QR codes positioned in places where many people are gathered. Examples of QR codes at social distances: QR codes in subway cars QR codes in buses QR codes in underground stations QR codes in bars and restaurants QR codes in movie theaters QR codes on posters and LED screens QR codes on in-store POS / POP displays QR codes on storefront windows Minimum size for QR codes at social distances 10 cm (3.5 inches), excluding the margin, is the minimum size for scanning at a distance of 1 meters (3 feet). 30 cm (12 inches), excluding the margin, is the minimum size for scanning at a distance of 3 meters (10 feet). Public distance This is the distance considered to be well outside any social involvement. It measures more than 3 meters (10 feet and above). QR codes are expected to be interacted in a public zone. Examples of QR codes at public distances: QR codes on billboards QR codes on signage QR codes on T-shirts QR codes on sign posts QR codes on buildings and entrances QR codes on buses Minimum size for QR codes at public distances 30 cm (12 inches), excluding the margin, is the minimum size for scanning at a distance of more than 3 meters (10 feet and above). See formula below for QR codes at a distance . QR codes at a distance Because those scanning may not be directly next to the code, you’ll need to increase the QR code size depending on how far away they will be. For example, if a code on a billboard will be scanned at a distance of 10 meters, the code should be at least 1 meter wide. Ratio of scanning distance to QR code size 10:1 Formula for calculating QR code size based on scanning distance QR code minimum size Scanning distance (in cm or inches) ÷ 10 QR code print and digital size guidelines and best practices Please see, What are the QR Code Printing Guidelines & Best Practices? Top 10 uses of QR codes by automotive dealerships. -------------------------------------------------- QR codes are becoming a powerful tool for automotive dealerships. They help attract attention, provide instant vehicle information, and improve customer experience — both inside and outside the showroom. From increasing walk-in inquiries to supporting after-hours shoppers, QR codes can make a real difference in how dealerships connect with buyers. Below are some of the most effective ways automotive dealerships can use QR codes. 1. Add a QR Code to Every Vehicle in Your Inventory. ---------------------------------------------------- Place a QR code on each car window so customers can scan and instantly access: Full vehicle specifications Pricing details Financing options Car history reports Feature highlights Test drive booking links If customers are not ready to speak to a sales representative, they can review the information later on their own. This reduces pressure and keeps them engaged even after they leave the lot. 2. Display Inventory After Business Hours. ------------------------------------------ Place a QR code on your dealership window so passersby can scan and view: Live inventory Current promotions Featured vehicles Contact details Even when your dealership is closed, customers can browse vehicles and explore offers, helping you capture interest 24/7. 3. Use QR Codes in Advertising. ------------------------------- Incorporate QR codes into: Newspaper ads Monthly newsletters Email signatures TV commercials Direct mail campaigns nstead of simply promoting your dealership, you can direct potential buyers straight to a landing page, booking form, or special offer. This also allows you to track campaign performance more accurately. 4. Add QR Codes to Business Cards. ---------------------------------- Sales staff can include a QR code on the back of their business cards. When scanned, it can lead to. Direct contact information A digital profile Appointment booking Vehicle listings This makes it easier for customers to reconnect without manually entering details. 5. Include a QR Code on Vehicle Listing Pages. ---------------------------------------------- Add a QR code to the final image of a vehicle’s online listing. Buyers viewing the car online can scan to. Schedule a test drive Contact a salesperson View financing pre-approval options This simplifies the next step in the buying process. 6. Place QR Codes on Billboards. -------------------------------- A QR code on a billboard can direct drivers or pedestrians to. Special offers New arrivals Seasonal promotions Your website It turns traditional outdoor advertising into an interactive experience. 7. Improve the Service Department Experience. --------------------------------------------- Place QR codes in the service waiting area so customers can: Book their next service appointment Leave feedback Access maintenance tips View service packages This keeps customers engaged while they wait and encourages repeat visits. 8. Add QR Codes to Loaner Vehicles. ----------------------------------- Loaner vehicles offer a great branding opportunity. A QR code inside the vehicle can link to. Current sales offers Trade-in valuation tools Referral programs Customers using a loaner car are already familiar with your dealership, making them more likely to explore additional services. 9. Use QR Codes on Company Vehicles. ------------------------------------ Adding a QR code to company trucks or cars can help introduce your dealership to a wider audience. The QR code can link to. A short introduction video Customer testimonials Social media accounts Ongoing promotions This builds brand awareness wherever your vehicles travel. 10. Make It Easy to Download Your App. -------------------------------------- If your dealership has a mobile app, use QR codes to simplify downloads. Place them on. Brochures Showroom signage Service counters Website pages A quick scan allows customers to download your app without searching manually, increasing adoption and engagement. QR codes give automotive dealerships a simple way to modernize marketing, improve communication, and support customers throughout the buying journey. From vehicle information and promotions to service engagement and app downloads, QR codes create a smoother and more interactive experience. When used strategically, they turn every car, advertisement, and touchpoint into an opportunity to inform, engage, and convert potential buyers. Data Policy Home>Applications by Industry>QR Codes for Banners QR Codes for Banners. Printed banners are eye-catching and cost-effective marketing tools that are highly visible in busy public spaces. They are easy to design and customize to suit the marketing needs of your business or organization. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- How to use QR codes on banners. ------------------------------- Weatherproof hanging banners and stand up banners are ideal for prime roadside locations while bold vertical banners stand out at conferences, shows, and fairs. And, when you put a QR (or Quick Response) Code on a banner you immediately increase consumer interest and interaction. Why put QR codes on banners? ---------------------------- Using well-designed QR codes on your banners brings together traditional, more visible advertising with online marketing, letting customers interact with your business and product. Use QR codes on banners to grow social media followers, link customers to your menus, inform people of upcoming events, let shoppers know about new products or give them a coupon to generate customer loyalty. Why are banners good marketing tools? ------------------------------------- Outdoor hanging banners and vertical banners are constantly visible, providing a permanent audience interaction rather than the fleeting impact of a TV or radio ad. This active engagement between audience and business is hugely increased when targeted QR codes are added to banners. The advantages of banners with QR codes include their: inexpensive cost in comparison to other forms of advertising continued use - hanging banners can be left in place while stand up banners can be used multiple times versatility - they can be produced in any size and color, designed as retractable banners or even mounted on rotating stands targeted marketing - for example, banners in shopping centers generate sales by catching consumers in a spending mood. What makes a banner stand out? ------------------------------ Whether you are using simple stand up banners or a series of hanging banners and retractable banners as a backdrop for a trade-show stand, they need to make your business stand out from the competition. Displaying a personalized message or company slogan is vital while the banner's color scheme should be in clear contrast to its surroundings. For banners that are visible from yards away, pick a bold and clearly readable font. This is particularly important at trade shows and fairs when you need to stand out from the crowd. On stand up banners, communicate your message with as little text as possible and let your QR code provide further information to potential customers. 130.title: QR Codes for Books & Educational Materials.
130.content: QR Codes for Books & Educational Materials. URL: https://delivr.com/page/718/qr-codes-for-books-and-educational-materials Title: QR Codes for Books & Educational Materials. URL Source: http://delivr.com/page/718/qr-codes-for-books-and-educational-materials Markdown Content: QR codes let readers instantly enter the world of the author, experience interactive content and related media, discover related books, or link to Amazon or an independent bookstore for further reading purchases. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- QR codes have the potential to turn reading into a more interactive experience. All the reader needs is a smartphone or mobile device to scan the QR code and they can unlock windows to a world beyond the printed page. Which books suit QR codes? -------------------------- QR codes for books are easy to design and can be used across a variety of books from textbooks and instruction manuals to cookbooks and children's stories. They are particularly successful as a marketing or branding tool for self-publishing authors. Guidebooks to show amusement parks and historical attractions or luxurious coffee table books are opportunities to use QR codes as well. A good example is Usborne Publishing. Usborne has been making children’s books for over 40 years. Founded in 1973, Usborne is the largest and most successful independent children's publisher in the UK. Usborne books are available around the world, both in English and in over 100 different languages. As a company, Usborne is constantly innovating, looking for new ways to engage children with books and reading. The latest edition of the Usborne Science Encyclopedia has 180 QR codes printed on the pages of the book. The QR codes provide instant access via a mobile phone or tablet to websites with video clips of experiments, animals in their habitats and animated lessons. WATCH THE USBORNE VIDEO. 10 reasons for putting QR codes in books. ----------------------------------------- 1. Potential buyers browsing bookstores can instantly check out whether a book is the right choice for them by reading customer reviews and visiting the author's website. They can also access pricing information and research other books in the series. 2. Other books by the author or titles in the same genre can be suggested, triggering additional book sales. 3. Using a QR code, readers can be brought to a page where they can leave reviews about the book and communicate with the author and other readers as well as post comments on social sites. 4. Providing a link to an interactive element or media attracts more people to reading, and helps them learn more. 5. A QR code can link to a book trailer. 6. Turn printed words into audio. Implementing a QR code on the inside cover of your books can come in handy so readers can choose whether to read or listen. A simple scan of the QR Code redirects them to a mobile page where they can listen to an excerpt from the book. They can listen to it and if they like what they hear, they can click the button on the mobile page which links to the full version of the audiobook. This way, your QR code provides your readers with additional value that comes with every book they purchase. 7. Provide your readers with excerpts. When putting up banners to promote your latest book, you can add a QR code which gives people easy access to the synopsis or excerpts of it. With their smartphones, your readers can scan the QR code and read a few pages to get them interested in purchasing it. And with every QR code, you can provide a link to where they can purchase the book online if they want to finish reading the entire book. 8. With a QR code, books can be purchased directly from publishing houses and instantly downloaded to mobile devices. 9. Boost your sales with a QR code that, when scanned, provides a coupon. 10. QR codes have the power to build the brand and marketing potential of both authors and publishing houses. The further potential of QR codes on books. ------------------------------------------- Children love picture books and they love being read to. What could be better than their favorite author reading their favorite book to them? Scanning a QR code linking to audio or a video can open this world to them. QR codes are also a cost-effective way of flipping social media from a study distraction into a study tool by making textbooks more dynamic and interesting. QR codes can bring everything from school libraries and study rooms to worksheets and homework to life. Create interactive sheet music with QR codes. --------------------------------------------- In just a few steps musicians can benefit from applying QR codes to tag their printed sheet music. The QR codes enrich the score they are studying by linking it to relevant online information, such as recorded performances and background information. Source: https://cleverclogs.org/ How to design a great QR code for books? ---------------------------------------- A lot of thought and effort goes into the design of book content and every book cover. A successful QR code needs to fit neatly into this overall concept without detracting from it. While crisp black and white codes always stand out clearly, bringing color to them allows them to work with the book's design. Be sure to add a a call-to-action to tell the reader what will happen when the code is scanned. For example, “Scan this QR code to enter the world of …”. Printing QR codes onto books. ----------------------------- The high-gloss finish of many books can create light reflection and distortion so careful thought needs to go into the positioning of QR codes on their covers. A good idea is to link it to the book's blurb, either on the back cover or the inside flap. Loose-leaf covers do get damaged or lost so it makes sense to also have the Code within the book itself. CityStory book project, Greenville: Imprints of a City. Sustainable storytelling that goes beyond the page. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Image 1: Greenville: Imprints of a City This artfully designed coffee table book tells the story of Greenville through words and images, presented in black and silver ink with QR codes linking to videos and web pages to enhance the experience. More than just a history of the city, the book focuses on the modern city that Greenville has become, and narrates the story of today’s Greenville, with its people, places and personality. CityStory selected Delivr to power the QR codes used throughout the book to bring stories to life. Last Updated 3 Feb 2026

Data Policy Home>Applications by Industry>QR Codes for Bottles & Cans QR Codes for Bottles & Cans. QR codes are a powerful addition to beverage packaging. Whether printed on bottles, cans, or labels, they allow brands to share more information and create stronger connections with consumers — both at the point of sale and after purchase. With limited space on packaging, QR codes turn ordinary labels into smart packaging that informs, educates, and engages. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Add Value with Transparent Information. --------------------------------------- Today’s consumers want more than just a brand name. They want to know. Nutritional information Calorie count Use of artificial sweeteners GMO status Sustainability practices Carbon footprint details It’s not always possible to fit all of this on a bottle or can. A QR code can link to a dedicated mobile page with detailed product information. This helps brands stay transparent while keeping packaging clean and simple. For smaller beverage producers, QR codes can also link to stories from growers, farmers, or production teams — helping them stand out from large corporations and build authenticity. Using QR Codes on Wine Bottles. ------------------------------- QR codes on wine bottles can enhance the buying experience. When customers scan in-store or after delivery, they can access: Information about grape origin Introductions from growers or wineries Tasting notes Suggested food pairings Vineyard stories This added layer of storytelling helps customers feel more confident in their purchase and builds a stronger emotional connection to the brand. Enhancing Coffee Cups with QR Codes. ------------------------------------ Even takeaway coffee cups can benefit from QR codes. A simple scan can connect customers to. Loyalty programs Discount offers Digital stamp cards Special promotions While enjoying their drink, customers can easily access rewards or offers, increasing repeat visits and customer retention. QR codes for bottles and cans transform beverage packaging into an interactive experience. They provide transparency, share brand stories, and support loyalty initiatives — all without redesigning the label. Simple to implement and easy to update, QR codes are becoming an essential tool for modern beverage brands. Data Policy Home>Applications by Industry>QR Codes for Brands QR Codes for Brands. QR codes give brands a powerful way to connect with consumers while also protecting their products. They bridge the gap between the physical and digital world, turning packaging, print ads, and retail displays into interactive brand experiences. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Consumer Activation. -------------------- Brands need to start thinking, acting, and operating like media companies. There is a content surplus in today’s marketplace, and consumers have limited attention. To stand out, brands must deliver valuable content at the right time, in the right place, and to the right audience. QR codes make this possible. Opportunities are everywhere — from eye-catching billboards in Times Square to product packaging, event signage, or even a disposable coffee cup sleeve. With a simple scan, consumers can instantly access. Product information Exclusive content Offers and coupons Promotions and contests Loyalty programs Direct purchase links This creates an interactive brand experience rather than a passive advertisement. Consumers move seamlessly from the physical world to digital content using their smartphones. At the same time, brands gain measurable insights such as scan data, engagement levels, and campaign performance. By using QR codes strategically, brands can personalize experiences, run time-sensitive campaigns, and update messaging in real time without changing printed materials. Brand Protection. ----------------- Beyond engagement, QR codes also support brand protection. Managing hundreds of thousands of products across multiple markets requires a scalable and secure system. Advanced QR code platforms offer back-end integration capabilities that allow brands to manage large product catalogs while combining consumer activation with brand protection through a single tag. Brand protection capabilities can include. Product authentication Detecting counterfeiting Identifying gray market diversion Track-and-trace functionality across the supply chain These systems can work alongside existing retail point-of-sale systems, inventory management tools, customer relationship management (CRM) platforms, and digital loyalty programs. This ensures smooth operations without disrupting established processes. With cloud-based infrastructure, QR code systems can scale to handle millions of consumer interactions and track-and-trace transactions globally. QR codes for brands are more than just marketing tools. They enable interactive consumer activation, provide real-time campaign flexibility, and strengthen product security. By connecting physical touchpoints to digital experiences, brands can increase engagement, protect their reputation, and operate more efficiently at scale.
